It’s Governor Tate Reeves.

Since I reached out last, so many Mississippi patriots have stepped up to help us meet our mid-month goal.

_But I didn’t see your name on our list of contributors._

**This is our FIRST deadline since we officially launched our re-election campaign, and I need every single conservative on our team to show up. **

name: Jon Tester
subject: I’m sounding the alarm
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
| Folks, it's official.

**_Roll Call_ just ranked me as the most vulnerable Democratic Senator running for reelection in 2024.**

That’s why Mitch McConnell has made this race his top target and national Republicans are already hammering me with attacks. I know we can win in Montana, _but it won’t be easy._

Look—I’m not panicking, but I am sounding the alarm. A wave of outside money and attacks are about to flood into Montana. This will be the most important Senate election in the country, and it’s up to us to build a team strong enough to win.

**Montana is a top battleground and could decide whether or not Democrats hold our narrow majority. That’s why I’m personally counting on you to make a donation today.**

[**Split a donation of $10 or more between Voter Protection Project and my campaign to help my team respond to future attacks and ensure we have the resources to reach voters and keep Mitch McConnell from taking back the Senate majority.**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/45129?t=6&akid=7709%2E878179%2EamJZNv) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Jon Tester and VPP will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $10 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/45130?t=7&akid=7709%2E878179%2EamJZNv)
---
[CONTRIBUTE $25 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/45131?t=8&akid=7709%2E878179%2EamJZNv)
[CONTRIBUTE $50 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/45132?t=9&akid=7709%2E878179%2EamJZNv)
[CONTRIBUTE $100 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/45133?t=10&akid=7709%2E878179%2EamJZNv)
[Or a custom donation »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/45134?t=11&akid=7709%2E878179%2EamJZNv)
So much is on the line: building an economy that works for all of us, getting dark money out of politics, protecting a woman’s right to make her own health care decisions, and much more.

With your help, we can get it done.

— Jon
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=7709%2E878179%2EamJZNv). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=7709%2E878179%2EamJZNv).**

Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=12&akid=7709%2E878179%2EamJZNv). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=7709%2E878179%2EamJZNv)

_We have just hours left, and we still haven’t met our goal._

**In the fight for 2024, Florida is in the spotlight - and the Democrats are determined to make a dent in the freest state in America. **

| Peter,

Sorry to bother you again, but we still need your help to get our fundraising on track. Building a strong foundation is the best way to ensure we have a successful campaign, so we can’t fall behind now.

David Schweikert has spent over 10 years in Congress, but he’s done nothing for the people of Arizona. Now, I’m running for Congress because I know we can finally defeat Schweikert if we come together.

Peter, I wanted to reach out personally one last time before our end of month deadline – here’s why:

**In these first few months of a Republican-controlled House, I’ve been astonished by how low they’re willing to stoop.**

From targeting LGBTQ kids in schools, to trying to cut Social Security and Medicare, to politically motivated witch hunts – _the Republican Party is rotten to the core right now._

And the only way to stop all of this chaos is to take back the House. But with House Republicans out-fundraising Democrats, **we have to start early.**

name: Our Revolution
subject: Helen Gym is under attack, but we have her back for Philly Mayor
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
Peter Willis,

With Our Revolution and Bernie Sanders’
endorsed candidate for the Mayor of Philadelphia within striking distance
of victory tomorrow, Pennsylvania’s wealthiest man is flooding the
airwaves with attack ads in a desperate attempt to stop Helen Gym from
winning.

We expected nothing less. This is what happens when a real progressive
with a background as a teacher and a union organizer gets close to winning
in a city historically controlled by a corrupt political machine.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8599?refcode=EM_NBI_OR_20230515_FR_Philly_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Philly&t=1009&akid=4283%2E5885482%2ECU4pPP ]Our Revolution has 40,000 progressive super-voters in Philly that we’re
targeting for voter outreach — and in a race this close, every dollar will
matter. Please donate here to help us close our $10,421 budget gap and
fund voter turnout in the final days!

If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to
Our Revolution will process immediately.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8600?refcode=EM_NBI_OR_20230515_FR_Philly_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Philly&t=1010&akid=4283%2E5885482%2ECU4pPP ]CHIP IN $10 NOW » [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8601?refcode=EM_NBI_OR_20230515_FR_Philly_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Philly&t=1011&akid=4283%2E5885482%2ECU4pPP ]CHIP IN $18 NOW »
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8602?refcode=EM_NBI_OR_20230515_FR_Philly_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Philly&t=1012&akid=4283%2E5885482%2ECU4pPP ]CHIP IN $27 NOW » [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8603?refcode=EM_NBI_OR_20230515_FR_Philly_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Philly&t=1013&akid=4283%2E5885482%2ECU4pPP ]CHIP IN $100 NOW »

All of the forces holding cities around the country from serving their
citizens, including police unions, public school privatizers, real estate
developers, and the billionaire class — are pouring everything they have
into stopping Helen from winning, and we need your help to fight back and
win tomorrow.

Just like we saw in Chicago, where progressives won big, this election is
a battle between big money that wants to stop change and grassroots
organizing.

If we all stand together and double down on person-to-person voter
turnout, we’re going to win here, just like in Chicago. That’s why our
work is so critical.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8599?refcode=EM_NBI_OR_20230515_FR_Philly_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Philly&t=1016&akid=4283%2E5885482%2ECU4pPP ]Can we count on you to pitch in now to help us get out the vote in
Philadelphia?

When we organize, we win!

Our Revolution

name: Alan Keck
subject: For the very last time.
body:
I’m asking for your support of time, talent or treasure.
[](https://keckforkentucky.cmail19.com/t/y-l-pjdlte-dytiuyidkd-r/) For the very last time, I'm asking for your support of time, talent or treasure because _**TOMORROW, Kentuckians will be heading to the polls, selecting their next Republican candidate for governor of Kentucky.**_ _If it 's God's will, that might just be me and our incredible team.__I hope that I 'm able to count on your vote tomorrow, [_**and if you 're still looking to make an impact on this race, you can!**_](https://keckforkentucky.cmail19.com/t/y-l-pjdlte-dytiuyidkd-j/)_ _**A final donation of time, talent or treasure will keep our ads live for one day longer, keep our volunteers knocking one day more, and support our campaign 's most critical operation, our GOTV, 'get out the vote' operation across the Commonwealth tomorrow.**_But if you remember, I set one final goal for the campaign just a few short weeks ago, a $5,000 goal and we're so close to zipping past it! [__**We 're now only $326 behind! So, would you help me and my primary campaign one last time with a donation of time, talent or treasure of any size?**__](https://keckforkentucky.cmail19.com/t/y-l-pjdlte-dytiuyidkd-t/) [RUSH $25 | 7.6% OF REMAINING GOAL 🌡️](https://keckforkentucky.cmail19.com/t/y-l-pjdlte-dytiuyidkd-i/) [RUSH $50 | 15.3% OF REMAINING GOAL 🌡️](https://keckforkentucky.cmail19.com/t/y-l-pjdlte-dytiuyidkd-d/) [RUSH $100 | 30.6% OF REMAINING GOAL 🌡️](https://keckforkentucky.cmail19.com/t/y-l-pjdlte-dytiuyidkd-h/) [RUSH $500 | **154%** OF REMAINING GOAL 🌡️](https://keckforkentucky.cmail19.com/t/y-l-pjdlte-dytiuyidkd-k/) _**This is the very last time I 'll ask for your support before polls close tomorrow,**_ so if you're ready to make Kentucky win again, if you're ready to solve our workforce crisis, if you're ready to support parents and public schools, if you're ready to stand with our law enforcement-[__**then join me, one final time.**__](https://keckforkentucky.cmail19.com/t/y-l-pjdlte-dytiuyidkd-u/) God Bless. [](https://keckforkentucky.cmail19.com/t/y-l-pjdlte-dytiuyidkd-o/) [](https://keckforkentucky.cmail19.com/t/y-l-pjdlte-dytiuyidkd-b/) Alan Keck ### | [Unsubscribe](https://keckforkentucky.cmail19.com/t/y-u-pjdlte-dytiuyidkd-n/)
---
clean_body: I’m asking for your support of time, talent or treasure. For the very last time, I'm asking for your support of time, talent or treasure because TOMORROW, Kentuckians will be heading to the polls, selecting their next Republican candidate for governor of Kentucky. If it 's God's will, that might just be me and our incredible team.I hope that I 'm able to count on your vote tomorrow, A final donation of time, talent or treasure will keep our ads live for one day longer, keep our volunteers knocking one day more, and support our campaign 's most critical operation, our GOTV, 'get out the vote' operation across the Commonwealth tomorrow.But if you remember, I set one final goal for the campaign just a few short weeks ago, a $5,000 goal and we're so close to zipping past it! This is the very last time I 'll ask for your support before polls close tomorrow,_ so if you're ready to make Kentucky win again, if you're ready to solve our workforce crisis, if you're ready to support parents and public schools, if you're ready to stand with our law enforcement- God Bless. Alan Keck ### |

body:
| | | It's Sen. Schumer.

I'm between meetings, so I'll make this quick: Your name is on our list of inactive Democratic memberships for May, and I need to make sure you activate your membership by tonight’s mid-month fundraising deadline.

If we want to save the Senate and stop Mitch McConnell **_again_** in 2024, we need to begin laying the groundwork immediately. Voting rights, reproductive justice, President Biden's judicial nominees, and our ultra-slim Democratic majority are all on the line. We can't afford for anyone to sit on the sidelines!

name: =?utf-8?Q?Dr=20Cordie=20Williams?=
subject: BACK ON THE ROAD - JOIN US THIS WEEKEND!!
body:
| | |
---
| Dear Fellow Patriot, Have you been paying attention? Do the far-left-loonies and uni-party politicians think that we have forgotten about the last THREE years? I am headed to Fresno and New Haven THIS weekend, to once again, pick up my Megaphone and preach boldly to the heart and souls of all you still proud Americans! I need your help and support! Come join me THIS weekend and let's remind those elite bastards that we will not back down, and we will not quit! The damage is done, but I promise to stand at the front gates, knocking, and I will fight for justice and reclamation! Stand Beside Me! "Thank you for your Support and Patriotism, May the Lord Bless you!

Semper Fi,

Dr. Cordie Williams
USMC Veteran
Founder of 1776 Forever Free

---
| _May 20th (Fresno) & May 22nd (New Haven)_
---
| |
---
|
---
|

If you live near the Fresno or New Haven area, please come join us! Also - SHARE these events on social media!

1818 Marron Rd, #103
Carlsbad, CA 92028

Every dollar we raise right now will make a monumental difference in shaping the future of states like Pennsylvania.
Grassroots donations have been instrumental in fueling our Democratic success. Together, we’ve achieved remarkable milestones. From expanding health care access to protecting voting rights, Democrats are fighting tirelessly to build a fairer, more inclusive America for all.
Here's how your donation can create an immediate impact:
1. **GOTV Efforts:** Your contribution could enable our party to reach thousands of voters, reminding them of critical elections and urging them to exercise their right to vote. We have the chance to build a better future by ensuring Democrats turn out in force.
2. **Targeted Advertising:** By investing in strategic advertising campaigns, we can effectively communicate our messages and get voters off the sidelines. Gifts from grassroots supporters like you will help Democrats reach every corner of Pennsylvania and across the nation.
3. **Grassroots Organizing:** Our volunteers and organizers are the backbone of our movement. With your support, we can provide them with the necessary resources, training, and infrastructure to engage voters, organize events, and foster meaningful connections in states like Pennsylvania.

[Join President Biden, Gov. Shapiro and Sen. Fetterman in supporting the DLCC's work by donating $7 to the DLCC before tomorrow's must-win special elections.](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zawayJU7NskUpAoU2FWeYrplTq_6v4_7gQisubd1A2bEwKkBUYIdx9NMgXEHSBG0YAnxj_E0rMyL5kz-jDX3y9gE9rPVp0-XFpONGp7QR_0v5PqbeL-JROVNG0Ji255oNSbT4Yadq9VOD4rtBFsYFT7-ErA6Qql2c7K7Mm70eTfihyXwhZ4wEa30xG9Cw-_Ms3d5gsZzqkXTncGI1a-lJmVu8IY9-oOvA7yjk420Pe-5gKwPGnp1a3rgcJFCu2jXRf6Jpc8VP4VXb482GDtSJzdJno05lISbEm9yCFGNK25yuitW59Nu_cECzmdGMvvqhAbRMVOPeLxm9aAu0vS--CW-1nibl2nW-s3wn_3ybZlH8AftK3GbBDgFDgkEiZQDhbC126s-VlnqXgmrt9QHUxIZMqGrYpM_gyh9rC2v2hWw/3w8/yqG6StPqSHW4i9HNF5fpcw/h6/T3Dv-hfzWHFiU3XqDDNFqEU4MHynr1ry7mCL8k6tldw) **If Democrats lose both races in Pennsylvania, we'll be forced to hand control back to the GOP – and we can't jeopardize our hard work or allow them to jam through an extreme agenda.**

DLCC Team

If Democrats lose both races in Pennsylvania, we'll be forced to hand control back to the GOP – and we can't jeopardize our hard work or allow them to jam through an extreme agenda. name: Lindsey Graham
subject: I'm standing with President Trump!
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Team Graham, Inc
body:
If you are proud of the conservative policies President Trump implemented during his presidency, will you stand with me and help put him in the White House again? |
Fellow American,

President Trump accomplished more in four years than most other presidents accomplish in a political lifetime.

He was one of the most consequential presidents in American history - **and that's why I still stand by his side, Fellow American.** There is no comparison between what President Trump was able to accomplish and what Biden has attempted over these past two years.

If you are proud of the conservative policies President Trump implemented during his presidency, [**will you stand with me and help put him in the White House again?**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61806378:sg7zacDN9:m:1:877327319:CC7630BBC8F879DE92CF30764CBDF93A:r)

| [**STAND WITH TRUMP ->**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61806378:sg7zacDN9:m:1:877327319:CC7630BBC8F879DE92CF30764CBDF93A:r)
---

**Remember his successes Fellow American?**

**First** - He grew a strong economy. For four years we were experiencing the best economic opportunity in modern American history. We had low taxes, record-low unemployment, and lowered regulations on businesses.

**Second** - he made America - and the rest of the world safer. The leader of ISIS caliphate, Abu Bakr al-Baghdadi, and Qasem Soleimani of Iran, met their fate under his leadership.

Not to mention, the historic peace agreement between the United Arab Emirates and Israel, securing our Southern Border, and withdrawing from the disaster known as the Iran nuclear deal.

**Third** - I was proud to help him confirm over 200 district and circuit court judges, along with three incredibly talented United States Supreme Court justices - Neil Gorsuch, Brett Kavanaugh, and Amy Coney Barrett. These justices are already delivering conservative victories like overturning Roe v. Wade.

For four years, President Trump delivered for Americans and we were all better off for it. Now it's our time to help him and **help our nation get back on track.**

It's time to show our appreciation. Will you make a split contribution to help President Trump return to the White House and then make sure he has a Republican Senate when he gets there?

name: =?UTF-8?B?SGlsbHNkYWxlIENvbGxlZ2UgdmlhIOKYhkNJ?=
subject: Your Supreme Court survey
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vWdiCfcDNR

Hillsdale College

Your participation in Hillsdale College's National Survey
on the United States Supreme Court is requested.

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oWdiCfcDNR

Please see a special message from our
sponsor:

Dear Friend,

Your participation in Hillsdale
College's National Survey on the United States Supreme Court is
requested.

Your response will only take a few
minutes, but the subject is crucial to the future of liberty and
the separation of powers in America.

The American Founders thought that the
proper role of the Supreme Court is to apply the Constitution.

But progressives see the Court
differently. They want activist judges to legislate from the
bench.

Do you agree that the role of the
Supreme Court is to apply the Constitution as it is written and
NOT to make laws or advance a particular policy agenda?

YES

NO

Even worse, progressives dismayed by
recent Supreme Court decisions want to "pack" the bench with
additional justices to advance a preferred policy agenda.

As Sen. Elizabeth Warren (D-Mass.) put
it in a Boston Globe op-ed: "To restore balance and integrity to
a broken institution, Congress must expand the Supreme Court by
four or more seats."

That is why I'm reaching out to you
today...

What is your opinion about the Supreme
Court's role in our constitutional republic?

Please share your thoughts with me
using the College's National Survey on the United States Supreme
Court right away.

Your response will help Hillsdale form
effective strategies to educate millions of Americans about the
importance of the Constitution to liberty-including the proper
role of an independent judiciary that applies the Constitution
instead of legislating from the bench.

You can easily complete your National
Survey on the United States Supreme Court using this secure link:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61807875:WdiCfcDNR:m:3:2532013465:7A1E3E20C69B70C0BB7047D4F52453DA:r

Thank you for your time and
attention-and for your support of liberty.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn

President, Hillsdale College

Pursuing Truth - Defending Liberty
since 1844

Hillsdale College 33 East College St Hillsdale, MI
49242 USA

This message was intended for: dpwillis67@gmail.com
You were added to the system January 18, 2022.
For more information please follow the URL below:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/iWdiCfcDNR

Follow the URL below to update your preferences or opt-out:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oWdiCfcDNR

To unsubscribe from future mailings, send an email to mailto:unsub-72130621757-echo3-1FE0EC52B2B033E6CD63639CF88AFF3E@emailsendr.net?Subject=Unsubscribe&body=Please%20remove%20me%20from%20further%20mailings
with "Unsubscribe" as the subject line.

name: Shift WA
subject: Special session updates
body:
Reports indicate that lawmakers have reached a deal ahead of today's special session. And, like always, we here at Shift WA will be here to inform you of the latest developments. | | [](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/61808454:sO63zcDNF:m:1:2610672541:C47D1EB2098556B551A39BA2F2E9B67D:r "Shift Washington")
---
|
Friends, State lawmakers will reconvene for a special session TODAY. The need for this special session is because Democrats failed to pass new laws to ensure that hard drugs would remain illegal after July 1. The need to ensure the illegality of hard drugs came after the State Supreme Court's so-called "Blake decision" in 2021, a ruling that found the state's felony drug possession law was unconstitutional. But rather than pass a very easy, one-word "Blake-fix" two years ago, Democrats looked for ways to achieve their goal of drug legalization. And this session, the Democrats concentrated on issues that they felt were far more important than ensuring hard drugs remain illegal. Of course, they passed more taxes, increased burdensome regulations, and managed to set a record in state spending. They also passed legislation that allows the state to hide minor children from their parents if the child claim to be struggling with gender identity issues. Reports now indicate that lawmakers have reached a deal ahead of today's special session. And, like always, we here at Shift WA will be here to inform you of the latest developments. To stay in touch, we're launching a new text messaging service. If you are interested in receiving text updates from Shift WA, please sign-up today! You can opt-out at any time. [**SIGN-UP TODAY**](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/61808455:sO63zcDNF:m:1:2610672541:C47D1EB2098556B551A39BA2F2E9B67D:r) Thank you, The Shift WA team | [ DONATE ](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/61808456:sO63zcDNF:m:1:2610672541:C47D1EB2098556B551A39BA2F2E9B67D:r)
---
|
This message was intended for: [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com) and sent from Shift Washington. If you would like to send this message to some of your friends, you can [click here](http://click.shiftwa.org/forwardthis/ft.php?mID=14201470&em=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&ch=49000b887de404a22f48ed48dd2d4356&schema=echo3) to do so.

You can also stay up to date on our efforts to shift the debate in Washington State by following us on [Facebook](https://www.facebook.com/shiftwa/) & [Twitter](https://twitter.com/ShiftWA). If you believe you received this message in error or no longer wish to receive emails from Shift Washington, [click to unsubscribe](http://click.shiftwa.org/p/osO63zcDNF).
---

## Durham Report Blasts FBI
John Durham's [long-awaited report](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0LFyhCAQgOGn0Q4HFvC0oEhjd2lTOgjLuTcoDuCZe_tMUqf-m3--r_t8txRpf3zaDU0Nabau0gtnrpnoGcgZWm8CIqBs0Yh-UCD7mx7a1Tjnb1LDqBfwodfageBqCWJRIwzSDy0Z4CC5Fj0ftZK6c8C1EKOSKDWXfGgUR0815e6ZaK8rhvhOL8ydS1sbzVrrURr50cDUwHRdVxfS945X-e0NTEeKVMmVBiZ_5tVuzKcnCwuxYCmiZ-expujZRqVQ2lmpmVxlgTxGqm8W7cVqPreD5bMUsuzIacE2G39cFCOV_tYo_tgsxb-j-j_QTwAAAP__Gj5ppw) on the FBI is out, and it's full of harsh criticism for the bureau. Former Attorney General Bill Barr tasked Durham with creating the report in 2019. Its purpose was to discover why the FBI had initiated Crossfire Hurricane--an [investigation](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxsj7tu6zAQBb-G6igslw_JBYvbqPNtUwq0uLI2oESDpK3k7wOnTnOaA8xgPq7zNXDi4_4_7OTbmuewNH7RDFYqJ1HP2EW_EiHpjrxyo0HtBjt2m8dBQQwRaSUa4jhaXMjqYQHQyt2c6dgjoAarHFys0bZfEKxSF6NJW9AwCgMUueXSf2Y-2kZr-s4vKv2S9y75rbVHFfqfwEngdJ5nH7441_crcHqzBU5gBU7qPfFZtrBLPl5UG99D43zI9caylef-kOVZK4eu-Pg4OSWubhAG7nvg9Otrf-f_BAAA__-y3Voa) into whether Donald Trump's campaign colluded with the Russians during the 2016 election. The report found that the FBI failed to use analytical rigor and bias resistance when evaluating supposed evidence against Trump--and that the investigation was initiated without [any real evidence](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLFuwyAQQL_G3hwdBwd4YOiSLV07WhiOmArHFsaJ-vdVOnd8esOT3tdtuvlc8uP-6Vd2LW2TDy0_eQIahB5QTthHl5iRZc9OaKtQakO2X5wyNOukwSIKFjpCZLYeklHaJkXcZ4eAEkhoGElJugQEEmJUkiWBBNsp4JjbVi_fW360hVP52Z5cL2Fb--KW1vajkx8dXju8-v3Br-Ot3lBbDoU7vMazLn4dWj3XfajncWQ_7HWbeTBsVRpV8GNIZgQKcyCOMQiwZGiWfXVxf-VS8qFNp-C--lz-0u3_E78BAAD__-S9XX0) of collusion. Conversely, the bureau took little action when presented with credible information regarding foreign interference to Hillary Clinton's benefit--a clear double standard. Durham indicted three individuals, and one of them--former FBI lawyer Kevin Clinesmith--plead guilty to altering an email for a wiretap application. He received one year of probation.
## CNN Ratings Plummet
CNN pulled in 3.3 million viewers during its town hall with Donald Trump. Two days later, it pulled in [fewer viewers](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0LuOpDAQQNGvMVkhP2k6IFhpRdabbogMlJta-YHs2mb670cz8eQ3uDp_H8vDU6T8_OMTThzK4jemFy7SgRpAm0V3-xQQNZoOJzWMVpvh5sbumIJ3bsAhrFpt2uzaqft6C2G0Ybd2VWtHk5baSKcGeXfWuH7T0il1twaNk0aOwkrciUvt_xXKfGCI7_LC2m8ldXE6mM8mzC-hZ6Hn67p6PnD3FN8r-sZfldDzljPE0rABF8h4teQ_gDKclRIyJYTqmfKzAV8Fdv9u4ANjBa7_0wlcrgyHj1GYuWIQ5vdREnZ12s-LYqQ23ISVz-Qpfm_xz0qfAQAA__--wWt9) than three other cable news networks, including Newsmax--a network that was drawing less than 100,000 viewers per night (_Editor 's note: that's less than The Flyover_ 🙂) before Tucker's exodus from Fox. Morale at CNN has sunk along with its ratings; many staffers [were upset](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxsz7FuwyAQgOGnwRvRcYDtDAxdvKVrR-tkjpjqDBahifr2VTt3_odf38dtvVGWXO7vdHDoqa609fzkFbw2o0a74hBDYka2Awczzg7tOPl52AMR0DVOaZoZEoKbE5LdzDaNxidneMgBAS14M8LVO-svG4I35uosWw8WZuWAY-61XT5rLn3nJN_1ye2y1WOQsPd-PpR9U7goXBpFarVILvzbFS6nwmUrRR-1kbCW-tKxFpKoe_s6Tt3rq-idRPSjU0oKl6GFeL6ySH6Mk3JwPyjL363_j_8JAAD__9jAWxw) that Trump got a town hall special and tried every trick possible to avoid working the event. An anonymous on-air personality [said](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxsz7FuwyAQgOGngS3RcXCAB4Yu3tK1o0UwxETYRPYlUd--Urt2_odf39dlusTa6nb7jGsOXPoUE9dXnoBOyp5QTyjnUHLGrGUOynqD2jrycgkqOjDaXWnGYsqcvCKf3FASZFT6irIGBNRAysJARtM5IZBSg9FZE2jwwkCeK_f9fO914yWX9t1feT-nvsoWFubHIfSHwFHgyO_K_NcEjvfnwXW7xj3e-hYFjgdHfh4CR2XJGvJkPQ6Axlpycg_z411bq4d1wsBtjbX9Tvh_808AAAD__-TAVPk) the special was "so bad" and that the network would "get crushed" as a result.
## World’s Oldest Dog Turns 31
The owners of Bobi, the [world's oldest dog](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskD1vwyAQQH-NvRGdj4_AwNAlW7p2tDB3dmiJiYDG6r-v0rnj01ue3sd1voaU0769hzv7vpY5xJ6ePIMWkxEoZxzJr8zIcmQ_GatQmrO2480HWMMyOXfmYEhrXAFDiIuxKpKKGsfkEVCCngw4raQ-RQQ9TU5Jlhok2EEBU-qlnj5L2vuN1_xTnlxPsdzH7G-9P9og3wa8DHgJj52P9lIvqD3FzANeSiZuXVDZxPad9p1bE0spX-IoNZOoHEulJgIqCFZaacg4cGyW6Mg4NNFFYolj9fQ4Us6pmfOgYLuHlP86-v9bfgMAAP__ggFifw), threw a birthday party with over 100 people to celebrate his birthday. Bobi is a _Rafeiro do Alentejo,_ a Portuguese dog bread for guarding livestock. Bobi hasn't done much work in [his long life](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxsz71uwyAUQOGnsTesy-XXA0OXbOna0aJwbVNhiAyNlbev2rnzGY6-j_ty9ymnsr37g1xf6-JDT09aQDGuGYoFx-hWIiQxkuPaShTaKDvuTmlhtIL50yptjAlGao4zcuvXFQDtmBwCClBcw6ykUFNAUJzPUpBQIMAOEiimXs_pq6bSd1rzqz7pnEI9xuz23h9tEG8D3ga8Fbra9PJ7rb95wNtVzxwbqzlS6yzWjfkQ6hlT2dj2nUqh1hhIUNwaOU97P_J4uvi4Us6paTNI2A6f8t-t_4__CQAA__-UAlkl), though--his owners attribute his extraordinary age to a "calm, peaceful environment" and say that he's never been leashed and is used to roaming the forests surrounding his home in Portugal. He means quite a lot to his owner: "_Bobi is special because looking at him is like remembering the people who were part of our family and unfortunately are no longer here, like my father, my brother, or my grandparents who have already left this world._ "

clean_body: John Durham’s long-awaited report on the FBI is out, and it’s full of harsh criticism for the bureau. John Durham’s long-awaited report on the FBI is out, and it’s full of harsh criticism for the bureau. | | | | | | Tuesday, May 16, 2023 ---|--- Good morning! Today we’re covering the long-awaited report on the FBI’s investigation of the Trump campaign, plummeting ratings at CNN, and the world’s oldest dog. Is this your first time reading The Flyover? and never miss a thing. How did our Editor do today? mailto:editor@jointheflyover.com?subject=Feedback for The Flyover and tell us exactly what you liked or didn't like in today's edition. Want to stay informed throughout the day? and stay in touch. | Durham Report Blasts FBI John Durham's on the FBI is out, and it's full of harsh criticism for the bureau. Former Attorney General Bill Barr tasked Durham with creating the report in 2019. Its purpose was to discover why the FBI had initiated Crossfire Hurricane--an into whether Donald Trump's campaign colluded with the Russians during the 2016 election. The report found that the FBI failed to use analytical rigor and bias resistance when evaluating supposed evidence against Trump--and that the investigation was initiated without of collusion. Conversely, the bureau took little action when presented with credible information regarding foreign interference to Hillary Clinton's benefit--a clear double standard. Durham indicted three individuals, and one of them--former FBI lawyer Kevin Clinesmith--plead guilty to altering an email for a wiretap application. He received one year of probation. CNN Ratings Plummet CNN pulled in 3.3 million viewers during its town hall with Donald Trump. Two days later, it pulled in than three other cable news networks, including Newsmax--a network that was drawing less than 100,000 viewers per night (Editor 's note: that's less than The Flyover 🙂) before Tucker's exodus from Fox. Morale at CNN has sunk along with its ratings; many staffers that Trump got a town hall special and tried every trick possible to avoid working the event. An anonymous on-air personality the special was "so bad" and that the network would "get crushed" as a result. World’s Oldest Dog Turns 31 The owners of Bobi, the , threw a birthday party with over 100 people to celebrate his birthday. Bobi is a Rafeiro do Alentejo, a Portuguese dog bread for guarding livestock. Bobi hasn't done much work in , though--his owners attribute his extraordinary age to a "calm, peaceful environment" and say that he's never been leashed and is used to roaming the forests surrounding his home in Portugal. He means quite a lot to his owner: "Bobi is special because looking at him is like remembering the people who were part of our family and unfortunately are no longer here, like my father, my brother, or my grandparents who have already left this world. " ➤ Homeless veterans are getting the boot from hotels in upstate New York. They're not being told why they're being removed, and the move coincides with immigrants arriving from the southern border. () ➤ Kid Rock chipped in $5,000 to Daniel Penny's legal defense fundraiser, and he left a note to mark the occasion: " Mr. Penny is a hero. Alvin Bragg is a POS." () ➤ A 49 year-old man walked into Congressman Gerry Connolly's office with a metal baseball bat and started swinging. He injured two people, including an intern, and is now in custody. () ➤ Donald Trump is walloping the competition in Kentucky. He’s polling 56 points ahead of GOP challengers. () Flying together with Snake River Farms Whether you're a seasoned veteran or a beginner to beef, the pioneers of have got you covered. Americans in Flyover Country appreciate more than anyone, and so we're offering $25 off orders of $149+ on our ribeyes, filets, prime rib, and anything else we offer. You haven't tried beef until you've tried Waygu, and you haven't tried Waygu until you've tried Snake River Farms. SWAPSRF at checkout to get your discount today! ➤ Journeyman QB Carson Wentz may be reduced to a backup position this season. He's received several offers but hasn't jumped at them--an indicator that he's waiting for a better position to open up after a pre-season injury. () ➤ The benches cleared for an old-fashioned brawl at a Phillies/Rockies game. Bryce Harper did not appreciate Rockies reliever Jake Bird's comments toward the Philadelphia bench, and mayhem ensued. () ➤ Former NFL MVP Matt Ryan is taking his talents to the broadcasting booth. He'll join CBS for studio work and color commentary during the upcoming season. () ➤ Digital media company Vice has filed for bankruptcy. The company was valued at over $5 billion in 2016; it will now likely be bought for $250 million. () ➤ Family members of those slain in last year's Buffalo supermarket shooting are suing the parent companies of Reddit, Facebook, Snapchat, and other media companies. The lawsuit is over the companies' alleged roles in radicalizing the mass murderer who killed 10 people last May. () ➤ Scientists have never found a band of radiation surrounding an object outside of our solar system: until now. () ➤ Scotland is introducing autonomous buses into its public transit system. Five of the vehicles will begin working a 14-mile route outside of Edinburgh. () ➤ Residents of Traverse City, MI, were spellbound on Mother's Day by a bear that wouldn't come down from a tree. After some well-placed tranquilizer shots, the bear did come down. (Onto a few mattresses). () ➤ Pieces** of a surfboard and wetsuit that washed ashore in Sydney, Australia, are likely from a surfer who is missing and was presumably killed by a shark. It would be the first fatal shark attack in Australia since February. body:
In 2021, Randi Weingarten, President of the American Federation for Teachers, said this...

| | | ****
---
| | [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=3ecc97a761db48b3a612ee6e7c4c5729&_e=04lDm9K2QscUk8xB8fh9fHTuopRwv62fs9_M_XsjPwWTHOiznepDzFzPtIOIq45-FeHMLMmfMX6hmNkIa9kxdZf9Snqgds0QDgzb2tgjeXRzC7flOq9WQKHFSdK2xJqsMHOGAJowGoKuFqpLj-69DvK_tpIcNRwRyBDZ3g1blWga_rHEuzb5ZpC9MqHLIwrU24m8qWkY9KO0hFwQSvsfSJJLH8KdW07yg-0R91vEsvb0qUzeF5247Sjf_D0NGc3fBxfY3VGivonnmtACwURV6icwX44l9CiGUhHp4Se5hLUP5Tb-RTCR5ZdZNa5YsiR5Gx8uXou-qiDRqLKgBgdDkgKUiG4jAIifgj5pS84lzXgBE0Wr16q2lcwgbjzqaGr2pKKRXz1OIriL5pIl6AyLWQ%3D%3D)
---
| | Friend, **_In 2021,_** Randi Weingarten, President of the American Federation for Teachers, said this... **"****_Parents claim they have the right to shape their kids ' school curriculum. They don't."_** Since then, Weingarten has continued to signal that teachers unions should have the ultimate say on education decisions, **not parents.**

name: Jenny Beth Martin, Tea Party Patriots Action
subject: CTA May 15: Biden wants you to pay more for everything
body:
| | |
---
This week use our AlignAct petitions to stop two initiatives designed to increase consumer costs in favor of a left-wing agenda. This week, you can protect your home energy bill from Biden’s new EPA mandates, and stop the expansion of the Department of Transportation. We also have a small social media action item to do as well.
---
| | |
---
[](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.-CIg-Drf1oetxbhL9BJ_PA)
---
The president has a plan to add more costs to your monthly energy bill. His plan? End operations for nearly 500 coal-fired power plants. That’s 60% of America’s energy supply! You know what cutting supply will do to the price of energy. **[Contact your members of Congress to bring a vote to block Biden’s attack on affordable energy!](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.-cpvw)**
---
[TAKE ACTION](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.)
---
| | |
---
[](http://lnk.teapartypatriots._w5cIcc2S_mK6Xu5jw)
---
Big government regulations on transportation mean America’s supply chain is slow, costly, and sometimes unsafe. Now, some members of Congress want to give the Department of Transportation unimaginable power to cause problems with nonsense regulations. **[Tell your members of Congress: save consumers the headache and higher costs – vote NO on the so-called Railway Safety Act!](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.-J2RPai99vQ)**
---
[TAKE ACTION](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.)

| | |

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: Last chance to help with this special election for two open Pennsylvania State House seats. These elections will determine whether Democrats retain their current one seat majority, or MAGA Republicans take over and make Pennsylvania's schools and malls more dangerous, threaten women's rights and threaten our democracy.
body:
special election today!
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tabcbe3e1-3620-4e2e-8ac6-f4de020eed4d/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, **[Last Chance: Today, we can ensure millions of Americans are safer, happier and healthier.](https://default.salsalabs.org/T68cf180f-6a0f-4eee-906c-349ec34faec7/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)** **_Today, an election for two open Pennsylvania State House seats will determine whether Democrats retain their current one seat majority, or MAGA Republicans take over and make Pennsylvania's schools and malls more dangerous, threaten women's rights and threaten our democracy._** _We must support Democrat Heather Boyd, running to "protect women's bodily autonomy" and Trevor S. Finn, who has vowed to block the permitless carry of guns to protect our kids. We must fight to ensure liberty doesn't die in the very state where it began._ [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T607e7ae4-7671-49f5-af00-d21fbd286a52/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) [**_Please join us in giving $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can to Boyd & Finn to fight for our basic rights and stop the authoritarian policies of MAGA Republicans._**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T87958917-2a17-403b-8b1c-ba62b23abffe/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _Thank you for fighting this fight everywhere it's required!_ Cliff

|

|

| Having trouble viewing this email? [View it in your web browser](https://blueampstrategies.salsalabs.org/paspecialelectionstoday-n?wvpId=368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | |
---
| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T2343232f-8d11-4cee-814a-98365e46f727/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

body:
Half the American people believe national news organizations intend to mislead, misinform, and push their bias and opinions on you and the American public.

| [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d3e80804e60c4de9b311b9f471e919fb&_e=qARspLTtjYRIidDUUkaw_0sWaeRNfF8PWpLm508DlKJ-PWdvL0YqX1GE4kceZutuex9aCaGJcCGj5jlSdk5XYKQSWbs91RsVTecL5tYrZFWDoJ9Iu_lnTQLxKov6M9fGwqQTutGPyxsWTmLOY7sAi5r543RM5lV1ymBD_LnWyD2avNEGQ9J6WaYi0KqMvxR2MoaXbMpD4bytCzTUfz_OXQ%3D%3D)

A massive shift is happening in the American Media. The corporate elite news media has lost the trust of the American people.

**New York Times huge layoffs...

BuzzFeed News out of business...

CNN closing divisions and selling off parts...

CBS downsizing...

Vice News out of business...

MSNBC off the rails...

Washington Post sacking staff...**

Half the American people believe national news organizations intend to mislead, misinform, and push their bias and opinions on you and the American public.

2023 is a critical year for America's future, as we have limited time to correct course and take back our country from the radical Left.

That's why we've **extended the deadline to activate your membership with The Heritage Foundation.**

**You can use this secure link to activate your membership right now:[https://secured.heritage.org/activate/](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zfka24b3l09bmus765p9euj9r1jdhrfs8qofasu0_rp22sh2s8i66o71c9im4o71clh2bs) **

By becoming a Heritage member, you will join the ranks of half a million card-carrying constitutionalists who believe in our mission to go on offense against the radical Left, _**and win.**_

**But we cannot do this without your help.**

By activating your membership today, you will ensure Heritage has the resources to advance conservative policy solutions across the country while providing aggressive and meaningful oversight and accountability to the Biden administration and leaders of the leftist regime.

**Join us today by clicking this secure link before the deadline:[https://secured.heritage.org/activate/](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z08kbqqrmfn4ebd22h025ge8b70o5nsg55crjspo_rp22sh2s8i66o71c9im4o71clh2bs)**

Best,

Kevin D. Roberts, Ph.D.
The Heritage Foundation

body:
I just launched my 2024 campaign to unseat Ken Calvert in California's 41st Congressional District. | _We are alerting Democrats about Will Rollins, a former national security and counter-terrorism prosecutor running to unseat Rep. Ken Calvert in California's 41st Congressional District._This will be one of the most competitive House races in the country._ To learn more about Will, [visit his website.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63374904/406555834/399785365?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzcxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMzI5ZGRjYS0wNGY0LWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=h3usI9ugY3hcD_h3csr44l39N5snK9TNf87mddF-Ivw=&emci=f32a7baf-f1f3-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=e329ddca-04f4-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=12636851) We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here to [unsubscribe](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/K13p5q9VLUmYX2jxivicnQ2?unsubscribedata=ZvLCfGWU0HcYCtuNZUzgvGFdy8uXyZ4NjOuvSomziFiJqZlDcE9CeAsxeILavqPCLnfInX5rhpM%2FKb%2BJYJvJfOSb7omn5FYEpHxTFnVK9eK%2BXq7ttRzOxMflZQxorF9kgq3Ikldnk61c6VFfQzBI0RRkhQPOUX0jMEryqHwjlrXrahMSDVYpipjm1LidzpwMPrVAOAjt1h3ovCFgG%2BsJvh8c1kOUPOpk3ZOvQPvUKOac3EyMOgozGb5r8TX8OV8hrEiqKZH799KoUcwaGdsiGftTTP5jShqcHsCU8mmCr%2FAHC96AdGKKZJLfxO4vUsJe9KaxNUNV09CfHiNaFKvOeSSXIFk00W9WaIVuwORnKX51H6rb6CaxHJFzoiEFwGpVI0CUFqtkTvBq3WIeKSuaobJz4%2BRe3tJYSP4ObITncI2d69jw6ysOZrbAmXKU7NMx)._

Peter,

**I wanted you to be the first to know that I just launched my 2024 campaign to unseat Ken Calvert in California's 41st Congressional District.**

Last year, my race ended up being one of the closest races in the entire country. We stunned political experts by outperforming every election forecast in CA-41, and I was the only Democratic challenger in California to win the independent vote.

Now, I’m running to finish the job in 2024.

[**If that’s all you need to hear, I’m asking you to chip in $3 to become a Founding Donor of my campaign to flip CA-41. We set an ambitious goal of bringing in 2,500 contributions to launch with grassroots momentum, and your support today will go a long way.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63374906/406555836/1321783056?refcode=em-5.16.23-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzcxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMzI5ZGRjYS0wNGY0LWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=h3usI9ugY3hcD_h3csr44l39N5snK9TNf87mddF-Ivw=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [Chip in $10 Now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63374907/406555837/1321783056?refcode=em-5.16.23-all-b&express_lane=true&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzcxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMzI5ZGRjYS0wNGY0LWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=h3usI9ugY3hcD_h3csr44l39N5snK9TNf87mddF-Ivw=)

Here’s more about me and why I’m in this race:

After 9/11, I knew I wanted to work in counterterrorism. That led me to the National Security Division of the U.S. Attorney’s Office where I served as a prosecutor. In recent years, I've seen firsthand that some of the biggest threats we face are right here at home.

More and more, I was handling domestic terrorism cases, many of which involved right-wing extremists who were motivated to do our country harm in the name of a political agenda.

**This type of conspiracy-fueled extremism is a threat to our democracy. We can’t allow it to take root in our politics, let alone the country. We need leaders who will protect our institutions and bring accountability to those who would harm it.**

My opponent Ken Calvert has been one of the worst enablers of the MAGA agenda in Congress. Calvert, and extremists like him, are willing to do and say whatever it takes to hold power -- even if it means undermining democracy and putting lives at risk.

The stakes are high, and we’re also facing unprecedented challenges in 2024. With Trump back on the ballot -- and control of the House and Senate at stake -- reproductive rights, Medicare, Social Security, and voting rights all hang in the balance.

**We came closer than anyone expected to flipping this seat in 2022, and I wouldn’t be in this race if I wasn’t confident we could finish the job. But I can’t do this alone:**

[**Contribute $3 today to become a Founding Donor of my campaign. Peter,
At the end of March – the first quarterly deadline of the year – we really turned on the jets and finished the quarter strong. And I have you to thank for that. I asked you for your support – and you came through.

I sincerely appreciate all of your help.

As you can see below, we’re going to need every donation we can get, so I am not going to be shy about asking for your help.

We’re finding ourselves almost a million behind Aspen Adam, and the liberal Democrats have committed millions upon millions of dollars to target my district.

They want me out, and they want it bad.

The only way that we will stop them is if grassroots conservatives like you, Joey, come together to say NO to their radical woke money.

[**So as we face our May Mid-Month deadline, can I ask you to chip in a quick donation to help us get back some momentum?**](https://1776pac.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0631e376515e4dcd945c8fba9&id=c83d2de997&e=84ee529f47)

name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: What are your thoughts?
body:
There is a very concerning trend occurring in our country that has me worried

|
---
| | | [](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z1fo257kckv6k4aie482sdc024o4e7t0rfj3dok8_rp22sh2s8i66o71c9imcpr6c3h2bs)
---
| Fellow American,

There is a very concerning trend occurring in our country that has me worried for Americans who hold to biblical & faith-based values. [](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z3sirkn4lifdrkj896q681neuousj2k7btj2p0pg_rp22sh2s8i66o71c9imcpr6c3h2bs) After the _Respect for Marriage Act_ was passed by a bi-partisan effort and signed into law, I am fearful that legal persecution will only intensify against Americans holding to faith-based values and who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

[**Are you concerned that America is abandoning a basic tenet of our founding -_Religious Liberty?_**](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zpor1atvjc8klpgkvifm41h553j70pp7cvp6cnr8_rp22sh2s8i66o71c9imcpr6c3h2bs)

In addition to the passing of the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , numerous examples over the past decade have concerned me: KENNEDY v. BREMERTON SCHOOL DISTRICT, MASTERPIECE CAKESHOP v. COLORADO CIVIL RIGHTS COMMISSION, and 303 CREATIVE v. ELENIS are just a few examples of legal persecution against Americans holding to faith-based values who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

Furthermore, an amendment to the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , brought forth by Senator Mike Lee, prohibiting the Federal Government from retaliating against schools, businesses, and organizations because of their religious beliefs about same-sex marriage failed.

**This has the potential to only intensify legal persecution against individuals, businesses, churches, and nonprofits holding to faith-based values. **

The American Cornerstone Institute is a non-profit that I founded to preserve and promote the cornerstones that laid the foundation for the greatest nation the world has ever seen: Faith, Liberty, Community, and Life.

Whether it is a football coach losing his job for praying at midfield after a game, or a baker being sued for not wanting to bake a cake that violates his religious values, **are you concerned as I am with the increase in legal persecution against Americans who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith?**

Please share your thoughts in this quick 2-minute survey concerning religious liberty in America.

**[https://offers.americancornerstone.org/religious-liberty-survey/](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zk64aakjribco0d2iguj0knpsbj7mk3p23dg32vo_rp22sh2s8i66o71c9imcpr6c3h2bs)**

Thank you for your consideration.

Regards,

Dr. Ben Carson
Founder & Chairman American Cornerstone Institute
---
---
| |
---
---
Your donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our country’s most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods to decrease the federal government’s role in society and to improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation’s citizens.
---
|
---

subject: Stick together

body:

Don't be afraid of the Left

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oWW-8ZcDNQ

Friend,

I love America and I love Virginia. They are my home and
I'll always fight to keep them fair and free, but the Left
doesn't see things the same way.

When I ran for office as Lieutenant Governor alongside
Glenn Youngkin and won, I became the first Black Woman in
Virginia elected to statewide office.

But that is NOT the reason I ran - it was to replace the
failed Democrats in office and put common sense back in our
government.

I'm reaching out to you because that needs to happen
again. Senate Republicans told me you are a fine American who is
willing to help us flip Virginia fully RED in 2024.

Conservatives have a chance to flip a Senate seat Red and
retake our Majority from Chuck Schumer and his Democrats. Will
you help us do that by chipping in a few bucks today?

CONTRIBUTE $250 >>

CONTRIBUTE $100 >>

CONTRIBUTE ANY AMOUNT >>

As a former Marine and proud Black Conservative woman, I
know what it means to face adversity. I'm asking for your courage

pitch in anything you can to help us flip the US Senate Red in
2024.

Winsome Earle-Sears

clean_body: Reproductive rights are on this line in a race that will be decided today | | | | | Hey Peter, It's finally here -- it's election day for HD-163. This election is going to be close, and we're doing everything we can to finish strong. This race will decide the majority in the state House. If Katie Ford wins, the radical Republicans in Harrisburg will have the votes to push through a constitutional amendment banning abortion. = These races come down to turnout, and we are doing everything we can to reach voters and make sure they know what is at stake. This is where we need your help. = Heather Boyd winning this special election is the only thing standing between us and a constitutional amendment completely banning abortion .We literally can’t afford to lose this race. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | = | = | | | = | = | | | = | = This fight could not be more crucial in the fight to defend reproductive rights in Pennsylvania. name: Jon Tester
subject: I’m the most vulnerable Democrat running for reelection
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
Folks, it's official.

Roll Call just ranked me as the most vulnerable Democratic Senator running
for reelection in 2024.

That’s why Mitch McConnell has made this race his top target and national
Republicans are already hammering me with attacks. I know we can win in
Montana, but it won’t be easy.

Look—I’m not panicking, but I am sounding the alarm. A wave of outside
money and attacks are about to flood into Montana. This will be the most
important Senate election in the country, and it’s up to us to build a
team strong enough to win.

Montana is a top battleground and could decide whether or not Democrats
hold our narrow majority. That’s why I’m personally counting on you to
make a donation today.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18957?t=1001&akid=3239%2E346206%2ESZmUYz ]Split a donation of $25 or more between Charles Booker and my campaign
to help my team respond to future attacks and ensure we have the resources
to reach voters and keep Mitch McConnell from taking back the Senate
majority.

CHIP IN →

So much is on the line: building an economy that works for all of us,
getting dark money out of politics, protecting a woman’s right to make her
own health care decisions, and much more.

With your help, we can get it done.

— Jon

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18957?t=1002&akid=3239%2E346206%2ESZmUYz ][IMG]

Contribute to Charles Booker: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-email-donate?refcode=em20230516-3239-footer&t=1003&refcode2=3239_346206_SZmUYz&akid=3239%2E346206%2ESZmUYz

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.charlesbooker.org/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=3239%2E346206%2ESZmUYz

Contributions to Booker for Kentucky are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.

Paid for by Booker for Kentucky

name: Andy Kim
subject: A lose-lose situation
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Andy Kim for Congress
body:
The debt ceiling fight is about to come to a head.

Here's some background: the debt ceiling is the amount of money the federal government can borrow to pay its obligations — things like Social Security payments and military servicemember salaries. Currently, Republican leaders in Washington won't agree to raise the debt ceiling without cruel cuts to important programs.

We need a House majority that is full of leaders committed to public service. That's why we're building up our grassroots movement now, and we need you. Will you donate $15 today and power our movement for change? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-andy-kim?refcode=2023-05-16-debtceiling&recurring=&amount=15&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=cd27cd6b-e9f3-ed11-907c-00224832eb73]

We need to be a fiscally responsible country and ensure our programs run as effectively as possible and help as many people as possible. But that's not what this standoff is about.

For one thing: It's worth noting that when Trump was in office, I voted alongside Republicans to raise the debt ceiling without any stipulations, despite the former president adding more to our national debt than any other president with his massive tax cuts for billionaires.

For another, their proposal slashes programs for veterans, rental assistance, education, and food assistance. These programs are not only critical to helping families live with dignity, they also strengthen our economy – slashing them won't lower the national debt.

We need to raise the debt ceiling so we can pay existing obligations. In other words, we have bills due and we have to pay them. Full stop.

The Washington Republicans holding our economy hostage don't care about spending, and they don't care about the people they will hurt because of their political gamesmanship . This debt ceiling fight is based only on partisan politics.

They are putting Americans and America in a lose-lose situation.

If the debt ceiling is not raised, tens of thousands of seniors could lose Social Security benefits, military servicemembers could miss paychecks, and thousands of Americans could lose their jobs.

Instead of coming together to serve the people, Republicans have chosen to hold our country hostage. This is not what leadership looks like.

It's time for a change. Help secure a House majority that cares more about the American people than partisan politics by joining our grassroots movement with a $15 donation. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-andy-kim?refcode=2023-05-16-debtceiling&recurring=&amount=15&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=cd27cd6b-e9f3-ed11-907c-00224832eb73]

I'm committed to fighting for a clean debt ceiling bill that protects Americans.

More soon,

Andy

Folks, it's official.

_**Roll Call**_**just ranked me as the most vulnerable Democratic Senator running for reelection in 2024.**

That’s why Mitch McConnell has made this race his top target and national Republicans are already hammering me with attacks. I know we can win in Montana, _but it won’t be easy._

Look – I’m not panicking, but I am sounding the alarm. A wave of outside money and attacks are about to flood into Montana. This will be the most important Senate election in the country, and it’s up to us to build a team strong enough to win.

name: Team Nina for Philly
subject: Go Vote Today!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nina for Philly
body:

name: Michelle Vallejo
subject: An important announcement:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Michelle Vallejo for Congress
body:
I am running for Congress to represent TX-15. | | | [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/tTBUZwcBH_2q13Ow12s-jc-9PHkp7BkSZ-MbOY7TNqbHMZZ7e6z8fxUUbQYxgrxk6a2v4Aw9Ux80o37VicMJ_2RUROn59OUiTeeVHLXdV7VQ6UP0B003zvnUXl-_g03diwyotAst46rCPNLgvtRv79tiTrpNg7ksxWzM48jDzaGFZJkBygleNFuQIrg-ekCNMGIcB-q25ws62iqmGUWqXren2KOBpQ91KISzs7xqMDNVzRNS4S7FIUQ4V9zYkclohCgXzdqyVsxoB2W8E_WXNQ/3w8/U8He-saeTGan5QJgq_8keQ/h0/9tccVd7NSi5rj9MmGtXvkXbE-IBvNCaYEqfczHrNL7I)
---
**Hola Peter,****my name is Michelle Vallejo, and I am running for Congress to represent TX-15.** In just a bit, I’m going to ask you to become a founding donor to our campaign. But first, I want to tell you a bit about myself and why I’m jumping into this race. I come from a big family of immigrants, farm workers and entrepreneurs. My parents, immigrants who made their way to the Rio Grande Valley from Mexico, did a little bit of everything to make ends meet. But running Pulga (flea market) Los Portales, serving thousands of our community members on a weekly basis and helping dozens of working-class entrepreneurs start their businesses, defined my family's values — our South Texan values. But my life changed forever when I was in college. While at Columbia University, after years of fighting multiple sclerosis, my mother took her last breath at just 46 years old. It was then I decided the best way to honor her legacy is to fight for a better future for my family. To fight for a better future for ALL of us — including you, Peter. Every day, I see how hard the people of South Texas work just to scrape by. At our family’s pulga, dozens of vendors come each week, hoping to make enough to put food on the table. They are the overlooked emprendedores who make our community strong. **I’m working for stronger and healthier neighborhoods in TX-15 and I have a plan to make this happen.** It starts with fighting for quality affordable healthcare, protecting workers, providing good-paying jobs and a thriving economy, protecting women’s reproductive rights — and that’s just the beginning. **[But to accomplish all of this, I need your help to jumpstart this campaign and put us in the best possible position for the fights ahead. Can you make a contribution and become a founding donor today? What we are able to raise today, and in these first few weeks, will be our first chance to show the state — and our opponents — just how much grassroots power we have.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953ySVaDaV5oWUMSiiW973_z_Zv1Lq14huz-FAP2L0N7p1RCpKJIExiZr4YJCorEyLhsf1ZW0m4rKHLrI6p4_HnX9wEKd1oKRayK5q9UnE3tBBU7oINTWH5skh6b7VGWaVRQuWwbj_5H00AS9WkewuEeU5CUd7M6UO2iByrlCNAaorl-5Ceer-5udmg4MPt5voDyMuPquKmH8psvyvOJqqXQGd8wIg8_SPRs4GhtCJgRK7Fz53x7AvOz4BTfygogRYyQDDLIj9qssMvJjAkMM-A3AVEpAryziazgRerIRQLfvVZp7LDcxnLXGkGY3XftG59QIeAFEhxNE0JXX4FpeOsk2/3w8/U8He-saeTGan5QJgq_8keQ/h1/g9lwosb5wU1mpyB25sRzHwzDw6miI02ZUeJAAqWj-sk)** **[Become a Founding Donor](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953ySVaDaV5oWUMSiiW973_z_Zv1Lq14huz-FAP2L0N7p1RCpKJIExiZr4YJCorEyLht-gQCZKI9qQe1U0R-r2jvi3hnNvNbhsyYSGz2YJXyGtVXDAX-Q7rM-F1Qqc6aa8yv7y-Q5HU3njKdap-HtCZQBsN5Jfg6LeoF4gdifUMdMv3aw0RkDLTDxBvVcFFku0Yn08DgFkhKBkINsM6Gy0VVmGhnQ_94XsZAQkVDQ2YTRU-LC0gjoImy2DiIXhBKGT_PhkRMeqTQcHoV3AlAXHqyknkFg8tC2871NIPPpXFdRzk1J8RsOAjr8UCdPG6VRkmTNWbEGXM6-fl7MKvHGh0Lh/3w8/U8He-saeTGan5QJgq_8keQ/h2/LP0KRQKx1pcXqnuWDgkER0MaTMHVaqZsI_M2EUL-A7c)** We’re at a critical moment for the future of South Texas. Monica De La Cruz makes a lot of promises to us, la gente. But in Congress, her record tells a different story. Her budget bill makes devastating cuts, from slashing veterans’ healthcare to taking away millions from our schools, and even jeopardizing Medicare and Social Security. What’s more, she’d let the government interfere in women’s private medical decisions and take away our freedoms. She wants to distract us with extremist issues in hopes that we won’t notice how badly her policies are hurting our communities. And, more importantly, so that we won’t notice how powerful we can be if we all come together to fight for a better world. South Texas needs an advocate — no a una politica vendida. I’m not afraid of the fight ahead because I’ve been underestimated and questioned before. Time and time again while growing up, I dealt with questions about why I spoke Spanglish, or why I mixed English and Spanish, about how I wore my curly hair and whether it looked too frizzy or if it was professional enough. But instead of letting that change me, I chose to proudly represent my roots through my education and work. It’s why I decided to return to the Rio Grande Valley and get to work. And it’s something I’ll continue in this fight to become your next Congresswoman of TX-15. ¡Vamos por Quince! Michelle Vallejo

| [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDPAZiEt8wwS6hp5wOIb3CiJctQ_v6qNYDkBv_RAnJAZbAM3lYTZoty0BFOSiURqdOcOQiutLDYdApxt-UH9d3zpLuLdBhngmRt3rOOmhmGchebx0xe5qltRZVMx77eMq_SPB7CgnQj79lBZBQBok84eNjjdn1f0dxUs4nngkGoq6q-4UWBrg53Ol0jyo3r8Vd5xgrxTE6dtaTKsaKrhzs_go7HkOAKNrnWt6x4mgl4zfrMmpbcHgbL19dMNCDSQM-w/3w8/U8He-saeTGan5QJgq_8keQ/h3/TpfXTQHHuns6ZAISGws_vGoqs1_PXawEnvfTSIepkWQ) | [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDE-osrDsyUs4KS0eRiq-k7R8HGpxDY4CCsZmTqJagCwh7jprfcGcDGL-Zpj2lAaJAxiGGw7CkM8KSVtMUnZ6bMqYPh-6Xw6gs0CaSu_Ws_MeVgpfY1ySB0MpRtHFuhNorImZ7pyvOKUjlHpIAUaT3Fn20KuFCUeM-KIdF_tPN73J5NO9oK5HRxBm5KSqnTkVSPmXajFNrsjfAG89pxuaAephVHQbzkZ7g6uy4O_kUTwF2vkfmGiOdS3vl9qS8Rxoi9wAL4qwfebr1pfslVRN-gI/3w8/U8He-saeTGan5QJgq_8keQ/h4/PpDsVQpDOMTJXRFa55H3BwbryLwh4twgIkltrglf-xg) | [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/dSCQfi9FLISmU3ZE3bfPhvKGKMp2i6JHNHKTwmPMhHD0K4zTcjFBTYCQT75ZzUfwpuQaS-z-i1XgaqtK2KzosLGyhH8Amz5qme-kPC8kEW4atb7fP6aMhTTJU_zVCTRxvoosPDz-P6-QYZuAnzPMux92yWZoDvRr4dtODiMMl6AWtyizCHXVjLMx_7vKsl2QsZ3AeI5Ff2S_ZSTLg7qNxvZOR3qzmO2ChmnXsi9ptiAZzcztj5si4Ow_-NHQCPZZPqQKQM-91nofV-z9bKZ8PQ/3w8/U8He-saeTGan5QJgq_8keQ/h5/ge9I0SzdRU_KgeoZHg2_Jry_hanJbepSuwKl09AN5C0)
---|---|---
[](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/tTBUZwcBH_2q13Ow12s-jc-9PHkp7BkSZ-MbOY7TNqYB1X06XSiFl19oNlsoHBWpI-qgkrwOt8k4UTn9DKyxfhlrzwzyHQs5vTynJ19A7APN2lcqgBVPl6BuPqitd3U0tdJoMzAhai_j6jexT2zgjEKHBtA_PL87QfTomSK3kHU227l4zlECOCw7EFi4Jbdg1wfsB0vPO6B2MmHAlA9WbJxkbeARdbaTy_hThrYBAmdptOSy9LPc5rYG1o4ZPQG6QlUlie-r0LB2VsMiSkYg7A/3w8/U8He-saeTGan5QJgq_8keQ/h6/JuaGjJQbgRkOAE5WI-tL8DF2xi_RuXfgCzneE9-vsFg)
Paid for by Michelle Vallejo for Congress

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with our supporters. But, if you'd like to unsubscribe, please click the link below.

To update your email address, change your name or address, or to stop receiving emails from Michelle Vallejo for TX-15, please [click here](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnl7NBjmTZL5F5oqdT0MFW4Gb-gS5wmRQQurjU7lAwsS9hEHqFIMgl1BZ_4So-PVBJbBpKgM5n49fvjyet1w_uK9mUeNMtZi9IfkAbyUHALEf4-EafIuqBU1pS0Le8sXI3ct0Lx9KpebzbYkAZjdaD3crxMzOqU6dSpYm9m590TfkwfvgxLaayuHzy6ks3mw_okrrPrXMBdTvyMSeAELBMKV/3w8/U8He-saeTGan5QJgq_8keQ/h8/HW6uyYfck0_G3hTHL0_yUMCGo_zP5Rfkjz_VhTnLsfc).

name: American Update
subject: Ancient Christianity: a new free course from Hillsdale
body:
I’ve always been fascinated by the story of the earliest Christians.

This sponsored message from American Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | | [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c666492%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=H2zVOvfiaSnROLYvlpU3%2bg&sysid=1)
---
| | Dear Friend,

I’ve always been fascinated by the story of the earliest Christians.

I wanted to learn more about how they worshipped and prayed, faced persecution and hardship, and settled theological disputes.

But, beyond reading the New Testament and some of the stories of early Christian martyrs, it was daunting to figure out how to proceed. I always got lost in foreign names and locations and the complicated history of Imperial Rome. The result was a large gap in my understanding of how the Christian faith took shape and spread from the apostles through the age of Constantine.

To uncover this fascinating history, we’ve produced our newest online course, “Ancient Christianity,” which we’ll release on May 23.

In this course, Professor Kenneth Calvert is your guide through the first four centuries of Christianity as he explains the remarkable ways the new faith transformed the Roman world.

**You can watch the video trailer for the course and preregister today using the secure link below:

** [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c666493%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=m8kEU0S36rs4tLVVlihRrA&sysid=1)
[**https://online.hillsdale.edu/landing/ancient-christianity/prereg**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c666494%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=lGUB1J2Bo0YEySa6WJ4Etw&sysid=1)

I hope you join us in learning more about the courage and faith of the first Christians.

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, ’09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

American Update
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_

name: =?utf-8?Q?Mark=20Ronchetti?=
subject: SPECIAL EPISODE: Mark Goes To The Border
body:
| | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/07951712641b/big-news-mark-ronchetti-launches-podcast-12236612?e=567664f14c)
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
# _EPISODE 3: The No Doubt About It Podcast Heads To The Border To Document The End Of Title 42_
|
---
The latest episode of the No Doubt About It Podcast is up!
We head to the border on both the US and Mexico side for a special edition podcast on the Biden Administration allowing the Title 42 policy to expire.
In this episode, Mark goes to the border with Darren White, former Bernalillo County Sheriff, and Jay McCleskey, a political consultant and border expert. The podcast exposes the current situation and brings attention to the dishonest media coverage.
Watch the podcast on YouTube to see exclusive footage by clicking the image below ⬇️
[](https://nodoubtabouititpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=c931ae4ee3&e=567664f14c)
| [No Doubt About It Podcast Website](https://nodoubtabouititpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=d937d119b6&e=567664f14c)
---
In this episode, we delve into the expiration of Title 42 and the potential consequencesthat face border states, particularly New Mexico.
We explore conflicting messages in the media, exemplified by the recent headline from the Washington Post.
While the headline suggests a reset at the border without a surge, the article itself reveals record-breaking unlawful crossings of over 10,000 per day.
To get an accurate understanding of the situation, our team embarked on a journey tothe border, driven by a desire to uncover the truth amidst the mixed narratives. Wewitnessed firsthand the Biden administration’s focus on managing optics, clearing outshelters and minimizing crowds to downplay the impact of the crisis.
Our experiences shed light on the change in policies under the current administration, such as the removal of the “Remain in Mexico” policy and the implications of granting parole to migrants claiming asylum.
We invite you to join us in listening to this crucial podcast episode. It offers valuableinsights and a comprehensive view of the border issue, revealing the underlying causesand the challenges faced by law enforcement and border communities.
Listen now on your favorite platform and subscribe to our podcast for future episodes tackling critical issues:
| | | | | | | | | | [Spotify Podcasts](https://nodoubtabouititpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=f5d73bd735&e=567664f14c)
---

---

---

---
You can also watch the show on our YouTube channel:

| [No Doubt About It YouTube Channel](https://nodoubtabouititpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=9320d208a1&e=567664f14c)
---

Lastly, we kindly request your support to help us continue producing high-quality content and shedding light on important topics. Donations are crucial for sustaining our efforts and reaching a wider audience. Please consider making a contribution to support our mission. Your generosity will make a significant difference.
[CLICK HERE TO SUPPORT THE PODCAST](https://nodoubtabouititpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=8787296dbe&e=567664f14c)
Check out episode 3 on your favorite podcast platform.
God bless,
Mark & Krysty Ronchetti

The TRUTH is finally coming out.
Special Counsel John Durham’s report confirms **THE INTELLIGENCE COMMUNITY _NEVER_ HAD ANY ACTUAL EVIDENCE THAT I WAS A RUSSIAN AGENT.**
The Deep State deliberately FRAMED ME as a Russian traitor in an attempt to destroy our campaign and then sabotage our presidency.

_**This was a SILENT COUP against a duly elected president.**_

**As I’ve always said, they’re not really after me. They’re after YOU, I’m just standing in their way.**
**And you better believe that I will keep standing in their way, because I will NEVER, EVER SURRENDER the greatest country in history.**

name: American Action News
subject: Study Ancient Christianity
body:
I’ve always been fascinated by the story of the earliest Christians.

This sponsored message from American Action News is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z9f050m00p2a58r62m3qutodaia3nvcs2ikpnlpg_rp22sh2s8i66o71c9im1pb1cth2bs)
---
| | Dear Friend,

I've always been fascinated by the story of the earliest Christians.

I wanted to learn more about how they worshipped and prayed, faced persecution and hardship, and settled theological disputes.

But, beyond reading the New Testament and some of the stories of early Christian martyrs, it was daunting to figure out how to proceed. I always got lost in foreign names and locations and the complicated history of Imperial Rome. The result was a large gap in my understanding of how the Christian faith took shape and spread from the apostles through the age of Constantine.

To uncover this fascinating history, we've produced our newest online course, "Ancient Christianity," which we'll release on May 23.

In this course, Professor Kenneth Calvert is your guide through the first four centuries of Christianity as he explains the remarkable ways the new faith transformed the Roman world.

**You can watch the video trailer for the course and preregister today using the secure link below:

** [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zfg6uq4t08fn2lr8u4icq1fnhkhp55d7j06kbk10_rp22sh2s8i66o71c9im1pb1cth2bs)
[**https://online.hillsdale.edu/landing/ancient-christianity/prereg**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z2ruf0v9mnk17gmvfi9hpghd6m8b1s20pg2jsbqo_rp22sh2s8i66o71c9im1pb1cth2bs)

I hope you join us in learning more about the courage and faith of the first Christians.

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

American Action News
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_

name: Dan Crenshaw
subject: Here’s Why the Durham Report Matters
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DAN CRENSHAW FOR CONGRESS
body:
---
| | | | | | |
---
|
Peter- The Durham report released yesterday confirms what we already knew: the "Russia collusion" investigation and everything that followed was complete and utter BS.
Political hacks like Lisa Page, Peter Strzok, John Brennan, and others exposed in this report ignored protocol to pursue a faux Russian collusion narrative, all for the purpose of taking down President Trump. They are responsible for irreparable harm to this country along with core institutions like the FBI and they should be held accountable.
Here are the key excerpts from the report:
Durham writes: "Based on the review of Crossfire Hurricane and related intelligence activities, we conclude that the [Justice] Department and FBI failed to uphold their important mission of strict fidelity to the law in connection with certain events and activities described in this report." This is a pretty huge admission. Crossfire Hurricane was the codename for the investigation into supposed ties between Trump and Russian officials to allegedly "interfere" in the 2016 election.
The report goes on: "FBI records prepared by [Peter] Strzok in February and March 2017 show that at the time of the opening of Crossfire Hurricane, the FBI had no information in its holdings indicating that at any time during the campaign anyone in the Trump campaign had been in contact with any Russian intelligence officials." So, the case was opened against a presidential candidate despite no factual evidence.
Durham slammed FBI leaders for a "serious lack of analytical rigor" and for depending on "investigative leads provided or funded (directly or indirectly) by Trump's political opponents." He's talking about Hillary Clinton, who paid for the bogus Steele dossier which fueled this entire witch hunt.
As the Washington Examiner [reports](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001PmuEevzIdPlxllSgntUGox6uuZkIYJoaCgwL_Zz3bvojSsgshJs03aDDc4wbry9mZpcXkt5izo37F-f0IvswXGDzWDeIkcp7_I4nLB20kgrR0pkAYHlG8w_HD53OqNDnJfdo6p-fJDMMm9sVR18dSzPQjbTqrq_7YORPS06JvOQGv0bSkxDCD4OdAaYWUwU8CsJpXLG7U8cFMpKMPPM4HIg8E_zvZ_rAxjd5maQ1sbmAKRS8dXlBUb4ZUObS13ZqWDWE019X9B7Yok95gY86Awhj-pIFvdNQZRtarFpuq78=&c=OrsK2tV90YI2JD2vSDpO7dQHP17SkSyXVRK4LFrjIn49SaFFutkYNQ==&ch=3wjZyO8qqGZ3saDChLjJouXIwFYFGsrigqRCaJadFAX5uRR6GaA98Q==), "The report found that 'upon receipt of unevaluated intelligence information from Australia, the FBI swiftly opened the Crossfire Hurricane investigation' and that at the direction of since-fired FBI Deputy Director Andrew McCabe, since-fired Deputy Assistant Director for Counterintelligence Peter Strzok 'opened Crossfire Hurricane immediately.' Durham noted that 'Strzok, at a minimum, had pronounced hostile feelings toward Trump.'"
Durham writes that if the FBI followed protocol and undertook very basic investigatory steps (like interviewing witnesses essential to the raw intelligence), it "would have learned that their own experienced Russia analysts had no information about Trump being involved with Russian leadership officials, nor were others in sensitive positions at the CIA, the NSA, and the Department of State aware of such evidence concerning the subject."
This report (nearly four years in the making) highlights what was obvious to all of us. Millions of taxpayer dollars were wasted investigating lies. It's beyond infuriating that a few rogue political actors within the FBI and Justice Department have destroyed the institution's credibility with the American people. It will take years to regain the trust of our citizens.
More disturbing - this report demonstrates how unelected, subversive actors within the highest levels of our government sought to destroy a duly-elected president they hated. They weaponized a lie - knowing the media would breathlessly regurgitate that lie - in order to take Donald Trump out of the White House. There must be consequences for this.
---
| In Service,
