clean_body: | | | | | | | | Peter- The Durham report released yesterday confirms what we already knew: the "Russia collusion" investigation and everything that followed was complete and utter BS. Political hacks like Lisa Page, Peter Strzok, John Brennan, and others exposed in this report ignored protocol to pursue a faux Russian collusion narrative, all for the purpose of taking down President Trump. They are responsible for irreparable harm to this country along with core institutions like the FBI and they should be held accountable. Here are the key excerpts from the report: Durham writes: "Based on the review of Crossfire Hurricane and related intelligence activities, we conclude that the [Justice] Department and FBI failed to uphold their important mission of strict fidelity to the law in connection with certain events and activities described in this report." This is a pretty huge admission. Crossfire Hurricane was the codename for the investigation into supposed ties between Trump and Russian officials to allegedly "interfere" in the 2016 election. The report goes on: "FBI records prepared by [Peter] Strzok in February and March 2017 show that at the time of the opening of Crossfire Hurricane, the FBI had no information in its holdings indicating that at any time during the campaign anyone in the Trump campaign had been in contact with any Russian intelligence officials." So, the case was opened against a presidential candidate despite no factual evidence. Durham slammed FBI leaders for a "serious lack of analytical rigor" and for depending on "investigative leads provided or funded (directly or indirectly) by Trump's political opponents." He's talking about Hillary Clinton, who paid for the bogus Steele dossier which fueled this entire witch hunt. As the Washington Examiner ==, "The report found that 'upon receipt of unevaluated intelligence information from Australia, the FBI swiftly opened the Crossfire Hurricane investigation' and that at the direction of since-fired FBI Deputy Director Andrew McCabe, since-fired Deputy Assistant Director for Counterintelligence Peter Strzok 'opened Crossfire Hurricane immediately.' Durham noted that 'Strzok, at a minimum, had pronounced hostile feelings toward Trump.'" Durham writes that if the FBI followed protocol and undertook very basic investigatory steps (like interviewing witnesses essential to the raw intelligence), it "would have learned that their own experienced Russia analysts had no information about Trump being involved with Russian leadership officials, nor were others in sensitive positions at the CIA, the NSA, and the Department of State aware of such evidence concerning the subject." This report (nearly four years in the making) highlights what was obvious to all of us. Millions of taxpayer dollars were wasted investigating lies. It's beyond infuriating that a few rogue political actors within the FBI and Justice Department have destroyed the institution's credibility with the American people. It will take years to regain the trust of our citizens. More disturbing - this report demonstrates how unelected, subversive actors within the highest levels of our government sought to destroy a duly-elected president they hated. They weaponized a lie - knowing the media would breathlessly regurgitate that lie - in order to take Donald Trump out of the White House. There must be consequences for this. | In Service, | == | Dan Crenshaw | | | | | == | If you'd like to donate by check, please make your check payable and mail to: Dan Crenshaw for Congress, 5900 Memorial Drive, Suite 215, Houston, TX 77007. Any questions, comments, or concerns? Simply reply to this email or give Team Crenshaw a call at 281-888-4016. | == == == | | | | | | | | PAID FOR BY DAN CRENSHAW FOR CONGRESS | | Dan Crenshaw for Congress | 5900 Memorial Drive, Suite 215, Houston, TX 77007 | | Sent by mailto:dan.crenshaw@crenshawforcongress.com

name: Bill Spadea
subject: Women for Common Sense
body:
Peter, America's future is not just in our hands, but in our hearts, minds, and collective resolve. Today, we are reaching ou
|
---
| Peter, America's future is in our hands. In our hearts and minds we know what needs to be done. We know we need to get government out from in between moms and dads and their kids. We know that we need to support our law enforcement professionals and stop coddling criminals. We know that family businesses are the foundation of our neighborhoods and need to be protected. And we know that women especially are riding up to fight for change. Today, we are reaching out to the incredible women of New Jersey who believe in the importance of restoring common sense to our state and beyond. **We're excited to invite you to our upcoming Women's Luncheon on Tuesday, June 20th, 2023, at 12:30 PM at the Spring Brook Country Club in Morristown, New Jersey.**
---
| | [CLICK HERE TO LEARN MORE AND SAVE YOUR SPOT NOW](https://xtz223.keap-link004.com/v2/click/6c4b175c461a89a5a8599fdd907e9778/eJyNkN0KglAMgN9l16KpReGdiIn4B1Z4GaIHOmTHw2lGJr57s8KrgmAXY_v2jW0AZKIUGNbgwB0flmWDBopVXHIm0GsFltWra62Wpm1q0HBxDlTbSXCGr8MzMJXNhWlrgL1khOxz14vCNDjGYRoRKUtFO_7ybKz1rPETN4xhHH962YWjfyP1FRxUHZsOqjkdhQfVEH9ClI5hFEWhF1nip9ss97IkydKdT6FTTpJSSibqzwMi1r9V4xPjfGFg)
---
|
---
This gathering is far more than a Luncheon—it's a rallying point for those who recognize the pressing challenges our nation faces. The erosion of parental rights, the dilemma of our open borders, and the turmoil of our economy are just a few of the many problems we're facing that need more than just attention. **They need action.** We are honored to have a distinguished panel of guest speakers, including Bill Spadea, Senator Holly Schepisi, Hon. Jacci Vigilante, and Hon. Lisa Richford.

---
| They will be sharing their insights and experience on how we can overcome the unprecedented challenges our great nation is currently facing.
By attending this Luncheon, you are making a declaration - that you are part of the solution, that you stand for the principles of common sense, and that you are committed to bringing about real change. Your voice and perspective are crucial in shaping the future we want for our nation. [**Please RSVP by clicking here to confirm your attendance.** ](https://xtz223.keap-link004.com/v2/click/6477f9d5b06c02648b7c3d7b8c2eeeae/eJyNkFsLgkAQhf_LPIvmVhS-iWwi3sAKH0NyoSVbl22MTPzvTRd6KgjmYZg55xvODIBCVQqjGjy44o2xKVhgxF5qKRQGrcJq_9yy-cyduhY0Uh1D03YavOGr-SN4jN0JIw_2WpBkU_hBHGXhLomymJS6MnTjL86SLT4YnvpRAuP4kytOEvmF0Gfw0HTiEaiWFAq3piH9AVF7jlOWpV3mKc9WeRHkaZpna05lU0-QSmuh6vcDYtG_UOMd4q9hXw==) Let's come together on June 20th to make a statement, to inspire change, and to take the reins of America's future. We look forward to standing with you. Warm regards, Bill Spadea & The Common Sense Club
---

**Hey friend.**

Listen, I have one simple question for you.

**Are you really on my team?**

My finance team just called and informed me we missed our recent fundraising deadline by - well, to put it bluntly - **a LOT.**

**You can 't blame me for wanting to check on you and confirm your support for conservative values, small government, secure borders, and safe streets.**

In this day and age, who knows what crazy scheme the Dems and Biden could dream up. We need to make sure we're prepared for their attacks come election year, and the preparation starts NOW.

Friend, missing deadlines doesn't just make me look bad - it makes our movement look bad. Which is just more ammunition for the Left to outspend us, outraise us, and **BEAT** us in elections.

**[Please consider chipping in any amount here to support conservative voices like my own.](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=ef6a4e8574804d63b11a37229c1aad3a&_e=ohBPUeP5AsFXwi3xPahpgSKj2mrcB1ZhZzlZoj_au4Saqbmrrk_GOwJNMznwCrKNBWoo7v5D3GlTKorly1tAZTeccEGyPcOUeLr4CCJAuuADlupZwQNiRBmKsmlwHwblkQbpHeWyKDVw7AwKEcWquofdX8kLDRM041dlnD7TMuUHJbghbTNOr0vixfJoqNaQjXNxsMKChxz9hFPH71hykJM2zaoCdNTvRE6L4nzPnXWHu18cYcYeFg9FlCxMKVdJ8jxamHJBWSgj9szGpw0lYvdmOLMPoTHo87AX2e945UnuBddubA7Qzx_jhFBriS8QPPdcvsUiZvC4fHmCdLA2R0Q_kt-b6zYwjrpXzWFbvjqclFS2UGnl39ChrMAElx7YLXvEMRAyRI9TjV0e4luBISzonIN7nCH4b00U2JZIme5xzCvs3TjpSXjkfYUdleEJT3ePrYTf5IBeAHfIgRQaq-KKHPJqQRxqsjPBhW8QZuFhBLEcfQBpEZfQYwH7-F6oIwCrSOqyUlZMi538ucTyJMueCUan7N_lrK2cCqGaJgQ%3D)**

name: Wisconsin Republicans
subject: re: Poll: Which candidate do you support to defeat Biden?

body:

Friend,

Now that Joe Biden has officially announced his bid for re-election, it’s even more important that we do everything we can to secure a Republican win or risk another disastrous four years.
---
**As the top battleground state, voters like YOU will determine who wins the White House next November.**

_And as the race heats up, we want o touch base to keep an accurate tally of who Wisconsinites want to be the Republican nominee so we can properly prepare a winning strategy._

The campaign to save Virginia and save America continued this past week with a well-attended Health Freedom Forum that we hosted in Frederic
| | **Can't see this message?_[View in a browser](https://www.emordforva.com/so/42OWXFdQ1/c?w=qWAZOFqO5Yuh0Gy-7j6DjFdqcDmuRP1zMM2cx3IE3l0.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuZW1vcmRmb3J2YS5jb20vc28vNDJPV1hGZFExP2xhbmd1YWdlVGFnPWVuIiwibSI6Im1haWwiLCJjIjoiODEwMDFlZjItMTg5MS00MGYwLWJmN2QtYjJhNmM2ZjVjZWUyIn0)_**
---
| | |
---
| [](https://www.emordforva.com/so/42OWXFdQ1/c?w=qTmzCy0lqoHLvDp2QVTbAE_dZQKhRYZNrbIuvFT7nvY.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9lbW9yZGZvcnZhLmNvbSIsInIiOiI1OWQ4YjdkYy03NTBlLTQ1MzAtZjFiZS1kYzI2NDNjMjhjYjAiLCJtIjoibWFpbCIsImMiOiI4MTAwMWVmMi0xODkxLTQwZjAtYmY3ZC1iMmE2YzZmNWNlZTIifQ)
---
| | Save Virginia, Save America Weekly Roundup
---
| |
---
| | |
---
| | |
---
| | The campaign to save Virginia and save America continued this past week with a well-attended Health Freedom Forum that we hosted in Fredericksburg, Virginia; interviews with C. L. Bryant on Red State Talk Radio; Eden Hill on the Common Sense America podcast; Mike Adams on [Brighteon.com](https://www.emordforva.com/so/42OWXFdQ1/c?w=5EA3bxS5vvKH8lIHsxS8KfxcgNPshDnnfI0PPLh5K_Y.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cDovL2JyaWdodGVvbi5jb20vIiwiciI6IjIxOGFlYmNmLWE0OGEtNGY3NC0wNTY2LWExOWZlNDUzMDY2ZiIsIm0iOiJtYWlsIiwiYyI6IjgxMDAxZWYyLTE4OTEtNDBmMC1iZjdkLWIyYTZjNmY1Y2VlMiJ9) TV; Andrew Wilkow on Sirius XM Radio; Robert Scott Bell on the Robert Scott Bell Show; and a Parents Rights Forum and premiere screening of the documentary “Battle in Loudoun County” in Clifton, Virginia.
---
| | [](https://www.emordforva.com/so/42OWXFdQ1/c?w=h_UgPKIE6CirAUZ9AAxBg6wj1PkjUKJuuJ3fXD94ACg.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuZmFjZWJvb2suY29tL0pFbW9yZDE3NzYiLCJyIjoiODY0ZTk1ODktZjgxNy00MjI2LWQ0OGEtYzk3NDUxYjdkODQxIiwibSI6Im1haWwiLCJjIjoiODEwMDFlZjItMTg5MS00MGYwLWJmN2QtYjJhNmM2ZjVjZWUyIn0)
---
| | On May 8, 75 people gathered at our Health Freedom Forum at Gourmeltz in Fredericksburg, VA. The expert panel included internationally acclaimed Dr. Robert Verkerk, renowned natural healer Dr. Thomas Roselle, respected pediatrician Dr. Matt Irwin, and more. They discussed the adverse effects of the COVID-19 vaccine and mask mandates on our health, personal autonomy, and individual liberties.
---
| | |
---
| | I had the privilege of being part of this panel, alongside other esteemed individuals, including combat veteran Lieutenant Colonel Ruben G. Toyos (Retired), and Jennifer Herget, a courageous mother sharing her daughter's injuries from the COVID-19 vaccine. The following day, I had the opportunity to be interviewed on Red State Talk Radio by C. L. Bryant and by Mike Adams on [Brighteon.com](https://www.emordforva.com/so/42OWXFdQ1/c?w=BqUcuoP9N8-qInummhYccXZSCnXMtEwA1Rhsv_ODlBE.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cDovL2JyaWdodGVvbi5jb20vIiwiciI6IjY3NmU2ZWE1LTU3MjEtNDcyYy02YTRjLTg4Zjc0MzNkYzE3ZiIsIm0iOiJtYWlsIiwiYyI6IjgxMDAxZWYyLTE4OTEtNDBmMC1iZjdkLWIyYTZjNmY1Y2VlMiJ9) television. I'm grateful for Adams' endorsement and for his call to listeners to contribute to our campaign.
---
| | [](https://www.emordforva.com/so/42OWXFdQ1/c?w=IXLHlQI2QUSmXGaeJ5hgKWKgGYaNPe3b8q0xsCx_xRs.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuZW1vcmRmb3J2YS5jb20vcG9zdC9qb25hdGhhbi1lbW9yZC1vbi1taWtlLWFkYW1zIiwiciI6ImUwZDg4MjdlLTY2N2EtNDU4Ny1lYTg1LTMwZDg1MTQyZjQ1NSIsIm0iOiJtYWlsIiwiYyI6IjgxMDAxZWYyLTE4OTEtNDBmMC1iZjdkLWIyYTZjNmY1Y2VlMiJ9)
---
| | On May 10, I joined Andrew Wilkow on Sirius XM Radio. That same day, we sponsored the Parents Rights Forum, engaging with local leaders in the fight against the “equity, diversity, and inclusion” agenda threatening meritocracy in Virginia schools.
---
| | | [**See our upcoming events here!**](https://www.emordforva.com/so/42OWXFdQ1/c?w=hW5i_np0Dn9gCCTiTokg5m8-sA6CG8Q63FNNPaIrKRA.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuZW1vcmRmb3J2YS5jb20vZXZlbnRzIiwiciI6ImY1MzI1NDg4LTE2NmUtNGZmMi02MWE4LTFiYjM0YWNjNGM5MyIsIm0iOiJtYWlsIiwiYyI6IjgxMDAxZWYyLTE4OTEtNDBmMC1iZjdkLWIyYTZjNmY1Y2VlMiJ9)
---
| |
---
| | We were honored to have award-winning journalist Asra Nomani, former Virginia Board of Education member Suparna Dutta, and vocal critic of critical race theory Xi Van Fleet among our distinguished guests. We also premiered the insightful documentary “Battle in Loudoun County,” featuring Patti Hidalgo Menders and Xi Van Fleet, in the fight against Critical Race Theory in Loudoun County. At the forum, I called for an investigation into the “Loudoun Love Warriors” group under federal and state statutes. It is imperative that we protect our citizens' rights to protest without fear of intimidation or harm.
---

clean_body: The campaign to save Virginia and save America continued this past week with a well-attended Health Freedom Forum that we hosted in Frederic | | Can't see this message? | | | | | | Save Virginia, Save America Weekly Roundup | | | | | | | | | | The campaign to save Virginia and save America continued this past week with a well-attended Health Freedom Forum that we hosted in Fredericksburg, Virginia; interviews with C. L. Bryant on Red State Talk Radio; Eden Hill on the Common Sense America podcast; Mike Adams on TV; Andrew Wilkow on Sirius XM Radio; Robert Scott Bell on the Robert Scott Bell Show; and a Parents Rights Forum and premiere screening of the documentary “Battle in Loudoun County” in Clifton, Virginia. | | | | On May 8, 75 people gathered at our Health Freedom Forum at Gourmeltz in Fredericksburg, VA. The expert panel included internationally acclaimed Dr. Robert Verkerk, renowned natural healer Dr. Thomas Roselle, respected pediatrician Dr. Matt Irwin, and more. They discussed the adverse effects of the COVID-19 vaccine and mask mandates on our health, personal autonomy, and individual liberties. | | | | | I had the privilege of being part of this panel, alongside other esteemed individuals, including combat veteran Lieutenant Colonel Ruben G. Toyos (Retired), and Jennifer Herget, a courageous mother sharing her daughter's injuries from the COVID-19 vaccine. The following day, I had the opportunity to be interviewed on Red State Talk Radio by C. L. Bryant and by Mike Adams on television. I'm grateful for Adams' endorsement and for his call to listeners to contribute to our campaign. | | | | On May 10, I joined Andrew Wilkow on Sirius XM Radio. That same day, we sponsored the Parents Rights Forum, engaging with local leaders in the fight against the “equity, diversity, and inclusion” agenda threatening meritocracy in Virginia schools. | | | | | | | We were honored to have award-winning journalist Asra Nomani, former Virginia Board of Education member Suparna Dutta, and vocal critic of critical race theory Xi Van Fleet among our distinguished guests. We also premiered the insightful documentary “Battle in Loudoun County,” featuring Patti Hidalgo Menders and Xi Van Fleet, in the fight against Critical Race Theory in Loudoun County. At the forum, I called for an investigation into the “Loudoun Love Warriors” group under federal and state statutes. It is imperative that we protect our citizens' rights to protest without fear of intimidation or harm. | | | | On May 11, I appeared on the Robert Scott Bell Show and Eden Hill’s Common Sense America podcast. To conclude the week, my article, “,” was published in Townhall on May 13. Thank you for standing with us. | | See you on the campaign trail, Jonathan | | | | | | | | | | | PRESS RELEASE Veteran constitutional and administrative attorney Jonathan Emord announced today he is a candidate for the U.S. Senate in 2024. | | | Get our latest updates | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Share on social | | | | You've received this email because you are a subscriber of . body:
He might be about to announce his campaign

|

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63361074/406516009/227139380?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNTY3MDczOS1mMmYzLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YLecKOv2dyWFWzNltykvTkj9BYbrx8YjF845ilhr50o=&emci=29fa1440-54f3-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=e5670739-f2f3-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=43566853)

| | Brian Kemp just said he might run for president in 2024.

Which means it’s time for a refresher on just how bad Kemp has been for Georgia.

Brian Kemp is the architect of modern voter suppression in Georgia. When he was the GA Secretary of State, he used his role to shut down polling places in majority Black districts, cancel more than a million voter registrations, and purge hundreds of thousands of eligible voters from the voter rolls _**RIGHT BEFORE THE ELECTION._**

Kemp is also an anti-abortion extremist, bragging about signing “the most extreme anti-abortion bill in the country.”

And he signed a reckless gun law that could make it easier for criminals to carry a concealed weapon in public without a permit, paving the way for more gun violence in Georgia.

**_And now he wants to be president!_**

[**_We can’t let Brian Kemp be the next president, Peter. clean_body: He might be about to announce his campaign | | | Brian Kemp just said he might run for president in 2024. Which means it’s time for a refresher on just how bad Kemp has been for Georgia. Brian Kemp is the architect of modern voter suppression in Georgia. When he was the GA Secretary of State, he used his role to shut down polling places in majority Black districts, cancel more than a million voter registrations, and purge hundreds of thousands of eligible voters from the voter rolls RIGHT BEFORE THE ELECTION. Kemp is also an anti-abortion extremist, bragging about signing “the most extreme anti-abortion bill in the country.” And he signed a reckless gun law that could make it easier for criminals to carry a concealed weapon in public without a permit, paving the way for more gun violence in Georgia. And now he wants to be president! = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: **= = = = = = Brian Kemp has been dangerous and extreme enough as governor, and we’re going to work hard to stop him at every turn. = – GA Dems | | Paid for by the Democratic Party of Georgia. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.georgiademocrat.org | Democratic Party of Georgia P.O. BOX 89202 Atlanta, GA 30312 United States

Every dollar we raise right now will make a monumental difference in shaping the future of states like Pennsylvania.
Grassroots donations have been instrumental in fueling our Democratic success. Together, we’ve achieved remarkable milestones. From expanding health care access to protecting voting rights, Democrats are fighting tirelessly to build a fairer, more inclusive America for all.
Here's how your donation can create an immediate impact:
1. **GOTV Efforts:** Your contribution could enable our party to reach thousands of voters, reminding them of critical elections and urging them to exercise their right to vote. We have the chance to build a better future by ensuring Democrats turn out in force.
2. **Targeted Advertising:** By investing in strategic advertising campaigns, we can effectively communicate our messages and get voters off the sidelines. Gifts from grassroots supporters like you will help Democrats reach every corner of Pennsylvania and across the nation.
3. **Grassroots Organizing:** Our volunteers and organizers are the backbone of our movement. With your support, we can provide them with the necessary resources, training, and infrastructure to engage voters, organize events, and foster meaningful connections in states like Pennsylvania.

[Join President Biden, Gov. Shapiro and Sen. Friends,
You've heard about it in the news. The Biden Administration recently attempted to implement a truly absurd rule that would increase fees on responsible homeowners to subsidize those with bad credit. As if hardworking families haven't suffered enough in Joe Biden's America, now they wanted to punish those who take care of their credit and harm future mortgage borrowers.
In response, all 11 State Freedom Caucuses signed a [letter](https://substack.com/redirect/14e83714-a547-46fa-97a0-e7deb013aeb7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) to FHFA Director Sandra Thompson demanding they rescind this terrible new regulation. It wasn't long after that [they did just that.](https://substack.com/redirect/408353c9-0602-4e3b-9263-580cc2b140c0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Freedom Caucuses don't just make a difference at the state level. When they raise their voices in opposition to the horrible policies of the Biden Admin, they get results for you at the federal level too.
**Arizona:**
It's no surprise, but Democrats are furious at the Arizona Freedom Caucus. The AZFC negotiated a budget with Democrat Governor Katie Hobbs that protected the state's school choice program. Most Democrat lawmakers opposed the bill because they are owned by the teachers' union. The budget, sponsored by AZFC Chairman Jake Hoffman, also delivered some serious tax relief - to the tune of $260 million. The state's most toxic leftist columnist said Hobbs "got rolled" by the AZ Freedom Caucus.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/33fe7ba4-43ae-4fa3-84d8-9edd97101d89?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
The AZ Freedom Caucus also led the way on House passage of HB 2545. The bill would prevent the state from enforcing any rules created by international public health entities like the progressive World Health Organization. The AZFC helped write the bill, pushed it to the House floor, and got it over the finish line.
This is one example of our state freedom caucuses echoing support for the House Freedom Caucus in Washington. HFC member Rep. Andy Biggs of Arizona is the lead sponsor of HR 79, a bill that would require the United States to immediately withdraw from the WHO. The Network also is helping other state freedom caucuses pass similar legislation.
**South Carolina:**
The Palmetto State wrapped up its legislative session last week. You may recall that the year began with the RINO leadership in the House kicking the SC Freedom Caucus out of the GOP caucus for refusing to sign their loyalty pledge to never criticize a fellow Republican. Liberal Republicans were constantly undermining the good work of the SC Freedom Caucus throughout the session.
But the good news is that the conservative grassroots is livid with the RINOs.
The York County GOP became the _**sixth county**_ Republican Party in SC to officially censure the House GOP leadership. This follows similar moves by Lexington, Anderson, Newberry, Pickens, and Greenville. Together, these counties represent over 1.4 million people. That's almost 30 percent of South Carolina's popular. And it represents a huge portion of the state's Republican base.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/9e087148-6b94-4358-acbc-ccb85774e002?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
**Pennsylvania:**
The PA Freedom Caucus is taking on two particularly egregious left-wing agendas in the Keystone State.
Rather than address skyrocketing crime, Democrats in the legislature are attempting to repeal the state's "Stand Your Ground" law, that allows you to legally defend yourself from being attacked.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/f31dfae2-3e0d-449d-a758-ec83898bca63?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
In addition, every PAFC member voted against funding Penn State University due to their hospital's policy of providing sex changes to children. More on that to come this week.
**Louisiana:**
The Bayou State's legislature just began its session and things are already heating up. In our [last email](https://substack.com/redirect/3568b1fd-bfb7-4024-ac33-52d5928d1e03?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), we talked about the madness that occurred at the Capitol after the LA Freedom Caucus led the charge to stop the grooming of children in schools and ban sex changes for minors.
A lot of [victories](https://substack.com/redirect/5fe26528-4354-42dc-8e59-a44ba08e79a2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) have already occurred, such as bills passed banning covid vaccine mandates forever, bumping up the penalties for fentanyl dealers, and requiring financial literacy courses in schools.
More will be coming down the pipeline very soon so stay tuned.
**Idaho:**
Since the Idaho legislature is out of session, two of our IDFC members [traveled](https://substack.com/redirect/e0b08ccb-2113-45a5-8489-70e1f7f76e72?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) to the southern border to witness the crisis unfold firsthand following the end of Title 42.
**Keep fighting,**

**Andy Roth**
_President
State Freedom Caucus Network_
[DONATE](https://substack.com/redirect/1207ae4c-55ad-466c-8844-02da52ffe36b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
P.S. Your help is critical in building out a network of patriots and freedom fighters throughout our nation's state capitols and in your home state. Please consider a [contribution](https://substack.com/redirect/fd922aaa-c62e-423e-8527-4017d8e8d569?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) and join us as we work to advance the cause of liberty.
State Freedom Caucus Network is free today. But if you enjoyed this post, you can tell State Freedom Caucus Network that their writing is valuable by pledging a future subscription. You won't be charged unless they enable payments.
[Pledge your support](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9zZmNuLnN1YnN0YWNrLmNvbS9zdWJzY3JpYmU_dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1wb3N0IiwicCI6MTIxNjYwMDA3LCJzIjoxNDI0NjAyLCJmIjp0cnVlLCJ1Ijo5MDUwMTE5MiwiaWF0IjoxNjg0MjQ2Mjc0LCJleHAiOjE2ODY4MzgyNzQsImlzcyI6InB1Yi0wIiwic3ViIjoibGluay1yZWRpcmVjdCJ9.kxYgLzjVN1GKZzMKy2dtrRs-P2jpjXnfkPqpHWQrqhQ?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=postcta)

name: Lucas Kunce
subject: Josh Hawley’s new book “Manhood” is on sale today
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
body:
This guy thinks he’s a masterclass in masculinity — but all he’s shown us is how to be a fraud and a coward.
#
Peter — Josh Hawley just wrote a book telling all of us that the only way to be a man is to be just like him. **It’s officially on sale today.**
But Missouri is the Show Me State — and the only thing Josh Hawley has shown us is how to be a fraud and a coward.
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/33094?refcode=em20230516-3127&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=3127%2E614464%2E0EieXw)
**[DEFEAT JOSH HAWLEY →](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/33094?refcode=em20230516-3127&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=3127%2E614464%2E0EieXw)**
**My name is Lucas Kunce, and I’m the 13-year Marine veteran and Democrat running to replace Josh Hawley in the U.S. Senate.**
I’m building a movement, without a cent from corporate PACs or shady mega-donors, to take back power from corrupt politicians like Hawley and put everyday Missourians in charge of our country — so we can finally rebuild our forgotten communities, invest into real working people, and fix our government’s broken status quo.
But I can’t do it without your help, Peter. That’s why we’ve set a goal of raising $15,000 online before 11:59PM tomorrow, so we’ll have the resources to get this message in front of voters and defeat Josh Hawley next year.
**[Will you help us get there by adding a donation of $10 or anything you can afford to our campaign right now? Support from people like you in moments like these could make all the difference on Election Day.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/33094?refcode=em20230516-3127&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=3127%2E614464%2E0EieXw)**
If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:
[Contribute $10](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/33095?refcode=em20230516-3127&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=10&t=4&akid=3127%2E614464%2E0EieXw) [Contribute $25](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/33095?refcode=em20230516-3127&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=25&t=5&akid=3127%2E614464%2E0EieXw) [Contribute $30](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/33095?refcode=em20230516-3127&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=30&t=6&akid=3127%2E614464%2E0EieXw) [Contribute $50](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/33095?refcode=em20230516-3127&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=50&t=7&akid=3127%2E614464%2E0EieXw) [Contribute $100](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/33095?refcode=em20230516-3127&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=100&t=8&akid=3127%2E614464%2E0EieXw) [Contribute $250](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/33095?refcode=em20230516-3127&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=250&t=9&akid=3127%2E614464%2E0EieXw) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/33094?refcode=em20230516-3127&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=10&akid=3127%2E614464%2E0EieXw)

Lucas

name: Rick Scott
subject: Mitch McConnell booted me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rick Scott for Florida
body:
| | | Fellow conservative,
---
| | Mitch McConnell removed me from a Senate Committee for challenging him for Republican Leader. This is what happens when you challenge leadership in Washington. It’s the kind of vintage Washington insider move you find here in the swamp. But that won’t stop me from pushing Senate Republican leaders to act like Republicans. I stand by my decision to challenge Mitch McConnell for Minority Leader, and I’ll continue to fight Washington insiders who make Washington work for _them_ instead of _you_. Maybe they’ll take away my parking spot, next? [**Can I count on your support?**](http://links.right-gop.com/u/click?_t=2ba4f933732b46f5b6eae32741d1832c&_m=ea7a93489feb4e4f99b8765f7ccde1e1&_e=3Nb2zcIVWRnz0teT7RxZVYAd9V1FmSpmBik4YtCLNFA6wGgSpnMK_ArliluYCIYtv7pBcq31USlM53mckdP69n8jIzqqhzAEp9HIXKinfR-7Ypzg2M3-xVzoMvC8rFoGrNvQ5LsEcoZbKa8m12EQVUdzPEmdt019Irp5VHdgH4J6LIYP771hYswKxKoTcg5UqXS3UfBEWq3zsfC_xJGF9vR5Rq3LMngdxJGXpNL32Tmv9bwDIA2jT1IwOKQwF3-o__qAOu5qmqFc9iUINMSGWsTZRCr8usy3TkNwzCmKhxrvFRtT9kmW3uECTv15JmGwpuoE-Tl3FntRF4gMSmYRb6i3l5WaSQMfdWiEwOPbEhHBy4W2yaiDbiEzU1v9I-oepT7kFqu8MCvcnfcTiyCqXA%3D%3D)

Maybe they’ll take away my parking spot, next? | | Thank you, Rick Scott | | Paid for by Rick Scott for Florida | | Contributions to this committee are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. subject: re: funding for PBS >>
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC | PO Box 96047, Washington, DC 20090 | **[dscc
body:
We need you to make your voice heard!
| | | **BREAKING: Republicans move to DEFUND PBS!**
_Far-right House Republicans are trying to cut off funding for VITAL public institutions --**we MUST stand against them to SAVE PBS!_**
[](https://go.dscc.org/go/12653?ask=5&t=4&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20230516-AnswerNeeded-DefendPBS2023RF-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20230516-AnswerNeeded-DefendPBS2023RF-Pros-sl1&akid=10710%2E9716520%2EsY4Mx_)
**Tell us: Do you support keeping PBS funded?**
| | | [Yes](https://go.dscc.org/go/12653?ask=5&t=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20230516-AnswerNeeded-DefendPBS2023RF-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20230516-AnswerNeeded-DefendPBS2023RF-Pros-sl1&akid=10710%2E9716520%2EsY4Mx_)

| [No](https://go.dscc.org/go/12653?ask=5&t=6&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20230516-AnswerNeeded-DefendPBS2023RF-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20230516-AnswerNeeded-DefendPBS2023RF-Pros-sl1&akid=10710%2E9716520%2EsY4Mx_)
---

Ultra-conservative Republicans have spent YEARS attacking PBS and its world-class news and children's programming -- **and now, House Republicans have a plan to BAN all federal funding for PBS!**

PBS has brought free, educational programming into American homes for _over fifty years_ \-- we just CAN'T let the far right threaten this amazing resource!

We've launched an urgent LIVE POLL to find out where Democrats stand, but **_your name is missing,_ and we have just hours to go until the poll closes!**

**Tell us:** **Do you support keeping PBS funded?**
| | [Yes](https://go.dscc.org/go/12653?ask=5&t=7&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20230516-AnswerNeeded-DefendPBS2023RF-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20230516-AnswerNeeded-DefendPBS2023RF-Pros-sl1&akid=10710%2E9716520%2EsY4Mx_)

| [No](https://go.dscc.org/go/12653?ask=5&t=8&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20230516-AnswerNeeded-DefendPBS2023RF-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20230516-AnswerNeeded-DefendPBS2023RF-Pros-sl1&akid=10710%2E9716520%2EsY4Mx_)

Team DSCC

subject: We deserve better

body:
Folks, we need a congresswoman representing western and southern Colorado that we can be proud of. I know that if we work together, we can defeat Lauren Boebert and make it happen.
But right now I need your help to meet our people-powered campaign’s first mid-month fundraising goal. We’ve got until midnight, and we are still short of where we need to be.
Will you chip in $25 or the most generous amount you can now? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2305_q2_db_mmg?refcode2=kicker_link1]
Let’s do this!
Debby
P.S. I’m including my team’s message from yesterday about the latest embarrassing allegations against Boebert. Anything you can give will make a big difference. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2305_q2_db_mmg?refcode2=kicker_link2]
-----Original Message-----
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2305_q2_db_mmg?refcode2=logo [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2305_q2_db_mmg?refcode2=logo]
It’s almost here –- our first mid-month fundraising deadline in the people-powered movement to replace far-right extremist Lauren Boebert is tomorrow at midnight. Can you chip in $25 right now to make sure Debby hits her goal so we can build the momentum we need to flip this seat in Congress? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2305_q2_db_mmg?refcode2=link_top]
GIVE NOW » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2305_q2_db_mmg?refcode2=btn_top]
Have you heard the latest? Lauren Boebert is once again facing allegations that she misspent campaign funds and flouted federal regulations designed to protect our democracy.
In case you missed it, here is the headline from The Denver Post :
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2305_q2_db_mmg?refcode2=img [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2305_q2_db_mmg?refcode2=img]Boebert is once again playing fast and loose with campaign finances. Her constituents deserve better than an ineffective, conspiracy-theory promoting, racist, and xenophobic idealogue.
Let’s be clear, Debby is running for Congress to make a difference for families here in western and southern Colorado, not fortune and fame. Unlike Boebert, Debby isn’t relying on special interests and dark money groups. She’s counting on grassroots supporters like you.
That’s why we’re asking if you’ll chip in to help Debby meet the first mid-month fundraising goal of her campaign to replace Boebert and elect a congresswoman CO-03 can be proud of. Click here to rush your mid-month gift right away. » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2305_q2_db_mmg?refcode2=link_cta]
If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

Give $10 now » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2305_q2_db_mmg?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode2=abx10] Give $25 now » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2305_q2_db_mmg?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode2=abx25]

Thanks for standing with us,
Team Debby
Dr. Debby Burnett is running to represent Colorado’s 3rd District in Congress. As a veterinarian of 20+ years, she’s worked with farmers and ranchers across our district to improve their lives and their livelihoods. As the mother of a 16-year-old, she knows how to get 20 things done at once. And as a rural Coloradan who owns a small agriculture business, she understands what the people of western and southern Colorado need -- and that’s why she’s stepping up to give them a real voice in Congress.

Debby Burnett, PO BOX 1761, Gunnison, CO 81230

name: 1600 Daily
subject: Study Ancient Christianity
body:
I’ve always been fascinated by the story of the earliest Christians.

This sponsored message from 1600 Daily is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zqc0dk4m77v0rk08l2n38nr9b590bv5927grdeo8_rp22sh2s8i66o71c9hm0o36cph2bs)
---
| | Dear Friend,

I've always been fascinated by the story of the earliest Christians.

I wanted to learn more about how they worshipped and prayed, faced persecution and hardship, and settled theological disputes.

But, beyond reading the New Testament and some of the stories of early Christian martyrs, it was daunting to figure out how to proceed. I always got lost in foreign names and locations and the complicated history of Imperial Rome. The result was a large gap in my understanding of how the Christian faith took shape and spread from the apostles through the age of Constantine.

To uncover this fascinating history, we've produced our newest online course, "Ancient Christianity," which we'll release on May 23.

In this course, Professor Kenneth Calvert is your guide through the first four centuries of Christianity as he explains the remarkable ways the new faith transformed the Roman world.

**You can watch the video trailer for the course and preregister today using the secure link below:

** [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zqqfq5cbf9isego2qc7r7ejellrohv2bdog3548g_rp22sh2s8i66o71c9hm0o36cph2bs)
[**https://online.hillsdale.edu/landing/ancient-christianity/prereg**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zoqt8tkutnk094hdd2sm3lpjlatd1lgpke3h0548_rp22sh2s8i66o71c9hm0o36cph2bs)

I hope you join us in learning more about the courage and faith of the first Christians.

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

1600 Daily
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_

name: Kash Patel
subject: New J6 Choir song with Donald Trump
body:
Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

[](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zl8njth4f1e74ftta0na7cc8kmldjo7d9jm2bi10_rp22sh2s8i66o71c9hm4o34s5h2bs)

Friend,

Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

**They sing the national anthem.**

And they have sung this song proudly every night for _more than 700 straight nights_. This song is more than just a sign of their patriotism. It's an exercise in their freedom of speech, even from the depths of the D.C. gulag.

We captured that audio and had the greatest President, Donald J. Trump, recite the Pledge of Allegiance. Then we combined those recordings to create a song you need to hear. All net proceeds from the song go to certain Jan 6 families in need.

**The song, Justice for All, is number 1 on the Billboard Digital Charts!**

[](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z0dk5af7ihu6su214has3ampbbf9fqehtaice14o_rp22sh2s8i66o71c9hm4o34s5h2bs)

[_**Please listen to this song and support our efforts to provide legal resources to some Jan 6 families. **_](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zs9860dtjfv394ko6dcnl3mva8f8o8dfd1lu1bpo_rp22sh2s8i66o71c9hm4o34s5h2bs)

We all know the plight of the Jan 6th detainees and their families. Due process has been destroyed for so many of them.

But, with your help, I know we will get justice for them.

Instead of violence, we saw many patriots standing around, talking to police officers, and taking photos of the Capitol grounds. There was no _" deadly insurrection."_ **The video evidence proves it for many!** This is evidence they and their families could have used last year or the year before.

It's time to act and help to support these families.

My goal is to reach 1,000 new donors in the next 48 hours to fund their legal battles in court. **Will you stand up and help Jan 6 families?**

**Click below to show your support today!**

**Support the January 6th Families**

**Email:** dpwillis67@gmail.com
**Donor Status: MISSING
Goal: **1,000 Donors

[_**Donate $500 >>>**_](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zvnnfqen3ue2nkjtduice8tvlmk5i74pkf3cpvm8_rp22sh2s8i66o71c9hm4o34s5h2bs)

**I launched the _Kash Foundation_ to offer legal help to America First families like the ones from the Jan 6th witch hunts. **

I know what it's like. I've been the target of the government gangsters in the Department of Justice myself.

I led the Russiagate investigation for the House Committee and uncovered that the FBI was actively trying to sabotage President Trump.

The FBI used innocent protestors to push their agenda. Now they are doing everything they can to hide any evidence that they tried to provoke the protesters. As the former head of counterterrorism and former senior aide to President Trump, _I will do everything in my power to help out_.

**Friend, I 'm humbly asking you to help us get justice for the Jan 6th detainees and set them free. **

[_**Will you be one of the 1,000 patriots brave enough to fight for some of the Jan 6th detainees and their families? You can show your support by donating $10, $25, $50, or even $100 today. Click here to step up >>>**_](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z9temba1tn3kjpttj1el7842pgk3aupig0ajlnto_rp22sh2s8i66o71c9hm4o34s5h2bs)

Please hurry.

And as moving as it is to hear them sing every night from their prison cells, it will sound so much sweeter when they can sing our national anthem underneath the stars with their freedom restored.

[_**You can rush your urgent donation by clicking here.**_](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z2massu7vaj51ddpvgv7ked4srg3hkg5133mufr8_rp22sh2s8i66o71c9hm4o34s5h2bs)

For Freedom,

Kash Patel

name: American Action News
subject: Study Ancient Christianity
body:
I’ve always been fascinated by the story of the earliest Christians.

This sponsored message from American Action News is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zm8o2vqfth89tvmj7p3fk8g8asfjotilnlao3as0_rp22sh2s8i66o71c9hm0o36cth2bs)
---
| | Dear Friend,

I've always been fascinated by the story of the earliest Christians.

I wanted to learn more about how they worshipped and prayed, faced persecution and hardship, and settled theological disputes.

But, beyond reading the New Testament and some of the stories of early Christian martyrs, it was daunting to figure out how to proceed. I always got lost in foreign names and locations and the complicated history of Imperial Rome. The result was a large gap in my understanding of how the Christian faith took shape and spread from the apostles through the age of Constantine.

To uncover this fascinating history, we've produced our newest online course, "Ancient Christianity," which we'll release on May 23.

In this course, Professor Kenneth Calvert is your guide through the first four centuries of Christianity as he explains the remarkable ways the new faith transformed the Roman world.

**You can watch the video trailer for the course and preregister today using the secure link below:

** [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zoqgki5tg06iksop4kolvaaovc2j6vehm2f8af7o_rp22sh2s8i66o71c9hm0o36cth2bs)
[**https://online.hillsdale.edu/landing/ancient-christianity/prereg**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zun900r9iqh0ilv0iq8gm7t6h8ohqemhbian6308_rp22sh2s8i66o71c9hm0o36cth2bs)

I hope you join us in learning more about the courage and faith of the first Christians.

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

American Action News
---

name: Ashley Ehasz
subject: Ashley here, I’ll be quick

**Hey there, friends — it’s Ashley here. I know today is election day for the PA primaries, so I’ll be quick.** **First:** If you haven’t already voted, I strongly urge you to make your voice heard in local races so we can elect Democrats up and down the ballot. **Second:** Even though my race isn't until 2024, the impact of early money cannot be overstated in this district. I’m running against a GOP candidate propped up by special interests, corporate lobbyists, and GOP mega-donors like Harlan Crow. **Third:** It’s my personal goal to build a grassroots fundraising program — one that is powered by thousands of donors pitching in $5, $10, or $20 at a time. Peter,

**I wanted you to be the first to know that I just launched my 2024 campaign to unseat Ken Calvert in California's 41st Congressional District.**

Last year, my race ended up being one of the closest races in the entire country. We stunned political experts by outperforming every election forecast in CA-41, and I was the only Democratic challenger in California to win the independent vote.

Now, I’m running to finish the job in 2024.

[**If that’s all you need to hear, I’m asking you to chip in $3 to become a Founding Donor of my campaign to flip CA-41. Here’s more about me and why I’m in this race:

After 9/11, I knew I wanted to work in counterterrorism. That led me to the National Security Division of the U.S. Attorney’s Office where I served as a prosecutor. In recent years, I've seen firsthand that some of the biggest threats we face are right here at home.

More and more, I was handling domestic terrorism cases, many of which involved right-wing extremists who were motivated to do our country harm in the name of a political agenda.

**This type of conspiracy-fueled extremism is a threat to our democracy. We can’t allow it to take root in our politics, let alone the country. We need leaders who will protect our institutions and bring accountability to those who would harm it.**

My opponent Ken Calvert has been one of the worst enablers of the MAGA agenda in Congress. Calvert, and extremists like him, are willing to do and say whatever it takes to hold power -- even if it means undermining democracy and putting lives at risk.

The stakes are high, and we’re also facing unprecedented challenges in 2024. With Trump back on the ballot -- and control of the House and Senate at stake -- reproductive rights, Medicare, Social Security, and voting rights all hang in the balance.

**We came closer than anyone expected to flipping this seat in 2022, and I wouldn’t be in this race if I wasn’t confident we could finish the job. But I can’t do this alone:**

[**Contribute $3 today to become a Founding Donor of my campaign. Winning is going to take widespread, grassroots support, and I’m counting on you to be a part of this effort.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63382685/406585779/1321783056?refcode=em-5.16.23-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzcxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNzcxYzQyMy0xYWY0LWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zSs5Jhe9TskNUlflvJmuZyUMMzRsjbV8UAWhITpJ-Gk=)

clean_body: I just launched my 2024 campaign to unseat Ken Calvert in California's 41st Congressional District. | We are alerting Democrats about Will Rollins, a former national security and counter-terrorism prosecutor running to unseat Rep. Ken Calvert in California's 41st Congressional District.This will be one of the most competitive House races in the country. To learn more about Will, We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here to . = Peter, I wanted you to be the first to know that I just launched my 2024 campaign to unseat Ken Calvert in California's 41st Congressional District. Last year, my race ended up being one of the closest races in the entire country. We stunned political experts by outperforming every election forecast in CA-41, and I was the only Democratic challenger in California to win the independent vote. Now, I’m running to finish the job in 2024. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | = Here’s more about me and why I’m in this race: After 9/11, I knew I wanted to work in counterterrorism. That led me to the National Security Division of the U.S. Attorney’s Office where I served as a prosecutor. In recent years, I've seen firsthand that some of the biggest threats we face are right here at home. More and more, I was handling domestic terrorism cases, many of which involved right-wing extremists who were motivated to do our country harm in the name of a political agenda. This type of conspiracy-fueled extremism is a threat to our democracy. We can’t allow it to take root in our politics, let alone the country. We need leaders who will protect our institutions and bring accountability to those who would harm it. My opponent Ken Calvert has been one of the worst enablers of the MAGA agenda in Congress. Calvert, and extremists like him, are willing to do and say whatever it takes to hold power -- even if it means undermining democracy and putting lives at risk. The stakes are high, and we’re also facing unprecedented challenges in 2024. With Trump back on the ballot -- and control of the House and Senate at stake -- reproductive rights, Medicare, Social Security, and voting rights all hang in the balance. We came closer than anyone expected to flipping this seat in 2022, and I wouldn’t be in this race if I wasn’t confident we could finish the job. But I can’t do this alone: = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Thanks for your support, Will Rollins | = Democrat Will Rollins is a former national security and counter-terrorism prosecutor running for Congress in California's 41st Congressional District. body:
| | | Hi Peter, It’s Election Day! Have you voted, dropped your ballot off, or mailed it in yet? If not, ballots need to be returned to a ballot drop box **by 8pm** or be postmarked **today**. Find a ballot drop box near you [here](https://click.everyaction.com/k/63366025/406534365/719410068?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjhiMjcwOTUyLWZhZjMtZWQxMS05MDdjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=YK7Dnb60B7-EF74iUBTVwHRUpIOvacd5p5s2hAYcIEE=&emci=3f24a086-73f3-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=8b270952-faf3-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=2107230)! This year, local government and school board races are front and center. To help you find pro-environment and pro-climate candidates on your ballot, [**we’ve made several endorsements.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/63366029/406534368/485901031?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjhiMjcwOTUyLWZhZjMtZWQxMS05MDdjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=YK7Dnb60B7-EF74iUBTVwHRUpIOvacd5p5s2hAYcIEE=&emci=3f24a086-73f3-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=8b270952-faf3-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=2107230) Though we do not make official endorsements for school board races, we’ve put together an **[Environmental Voter Guide](https://click.everyaction.com/k/63366034/406534372/485901031?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjhiMjcwOTUyLWZhZjMtZWQxMS05MDdjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=YK7Dnb60B7-EF74iUBTVwHRUpIOvacd5p5s2hAYcIEE=&emci=3f24a086-73f3-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=8b270952-faf3-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=2107230#voterguide)** so you can learn where candidates stand on the issues you care about. What's your voting plan for today? Will you be heading to your nearby ballot drop box after filling it out while sipping your morning coffee? Or will you be stopping by the mailbox or post office on your way to work? Elections like this shape our future and our daily lives, so be sure to vote and make your voice heard! Happy Election Day! Britney VanCitters
Organizing Manager, OLCV [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/63366039/406534379/485901031?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjhiMjcwOTUyLWZhZjMtZWQxMS05MDdjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=YK7Dnb60B7-EF74iUBTVwHRUpIOvacd5p5s2hAYcIEE=&emci=3f24a086-73f3-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=8b270952-faf3-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=2107230) Dear Peter, Have you checked your mailbox yet? Election Day is May 16th, and your ballot should have arrived. We need to elect more environmental and social justice champions to create a more inclusive democracy and pass bold climate action. **And it all starts by making sure you, your friends, your family, and everyone in our communities know where candidates stand on the issues you care about.** We hope the information we’re sharing helps you make your voice heard. At OLCV, we’ve endorsed the following pro-climate and pro-environment candidates for the upcoming election:
* **[Ana del Rocío](https://click.everyaction.com/k/63366049/406534383/-100301710?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjhiMjcwOTUyLWZhZjMtZWQxMS05MDdjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=YK7Dnb60B7-EF74iUBTVwHRUpIOvacd5p5s2hAYcIEE=&emci=3f24a086-73f3-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=8b270952-faf3-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=2107230)** for the Multnomah County Commission, representing District 3
* **[Lyndsie Leech](https://click.everyaction.com/k/63366052/406534386/-1919296919?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjhiMjcwOTUyLWZhZjMtZWQxMS05MDdjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=YK7Dnb60B7-EF74iUBTVwHRUpIOvacd5p5s2hAYcIEE=&emci=3f24a086-73f3-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=8b270952-faf3-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=2107230)** for Eugene City Council, representing Ward 7
* **[Jodie Barram](https://click.everyaction.com/k/63366055/406534389/-775621642?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjhiMjcwOTUyLWZhZjMtZWQxMS05MDdjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=YK7Dnb60B7-EF74iUBTVwHRUpIOvacd5p5s2hAYcIEE=&emci=3f24a086-73f3-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=8b270952-faf3-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=2107230)** for Bend Park & Recreation District Board, Seat #2
* **[Miles Palacios](https://click.everyaction.com/k/63366058/406534393/1546454876?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjhiMjcwOTUyLWZhZjMtZWQxMS05MDdjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=YK7Dnb60B7-EF74iUBTVwHRUpIOvacd5p5s2hAYcIEE=&emci=3f24a086-73f3-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=8b270952-faf3-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=2107230)** for Tualatin Hills Parks & Recreation District, Seat 4
* **[Tya Ping](https://click.everyaction.com/k/63366059/406534396/-1789308038?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjhiMjcwOTUyLWZhZjMtZWQxMS05MDdjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=YK7Dnb60B7-EF74iUBTVwHRUpIOvacd5p5s2hAYcIEE=&emci=3f24a086-73f3-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=8b270952-faf3-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=2107230)** for Tualatin Hills Parks & Recreation District, Seat 5

This year is also a big year for school board races. To elect the right leaders shaping the landscape of our future, we need to know where they stand. Though we do not have an endorsement process for school board races, we’ve put together our **[Environmental Voter Guide](https://click.everyaction.com/k/63366060/406534397/485901031?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjhiMjcwOTUyLWZhZjMtZWQxMS05MDdjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=YK7Dnb60B7-EF74iUBTVwHRUpIOvacd5p5s2hAYcIEE=&emci=3f24a086-73f3-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=8b270952-faf3-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=2107230)**. In the voter guide, you’ll find candidates’ answers to three questions centered on their environmental values and how they plan to advance justice, equity, diversity, and inclusion efforts for our kids. Whether you plan to vote by mail, in person, or [drop your ballot off at a drop box](https://click.everyaction.com/k/63366061/406534398/1486974124?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjhiMjcwOTUyLWZhZjMtZWQxMS05MDdjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=YK7Dnb60B7-EF74iUBTVwHRUpIOvacd5p5s2hAYcIEE=&emci=3f24a086-73f3-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=8b270952-faf3-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=2107230), be sure to **[check out the answers from candidates in your local school board race](https://click.everyaction.com/k/63366062/406534399/485901031?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjhiMjcwOTUyLWZhZjMtZWQxMS05MDdjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=YK7Dnb60B7-EF74iUBTVwHRUpIOvacd5p5s2hAYcIEE=&emci=3f24a086-73f3-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=8b270952-faf3-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=2107230)**. clean_body: | | | Hi Peter, It’s Election Day! Have you voted, dropped your ballot off, or mailed it in yet? If not, ballots need to be returned to a ballot drop box by 8pm or be postmarked today. Find a ballot drop box near you ! This year, local government and school board races are front and center. To help you find pro-environment and pro-climate candidates on your ballot, Though we do not make official endorsements for school board races, we’ve put together an so you can learn where candidates stand on the issues you care about. What's your voting plan for today? Will you be heading to your nearby ballot drop box after filling it out while sipping your morning coffee? Or will you be stopping by the mailbox or post office on your way to work? Elections like this shape our future and our daily lives, so be sure to vote and make your voice heard! Happy Election Day! Britney VanCitters Organizing Manager, OLCV Dear Peter, Have you checked your mailbox yet? Election Day is May 16th, and your ballot should have arrived. We need to elect more environmental and social justice champions to create a more inclusive democracy and pass bold climate action. And it all starts by making sure you, your friends, your family, and everyone in our communities know where candidates stand on the issues you care about. We hope the information we’re sharing helps you make your voice heard. At OLCV, we’ve endorsed the following pro-climate and pro-environment candidates for the upcoming election: for the Multnomah County Commission, representing District 3 for Eugene City Council, representing Ward 7 for Bend Park & Recreation District Board, Seat #2 for Tualatin Hills Parks & Recreation District, Seat 4 for Tualatin Hills Parks & Recreation District, Seat 5 This year is also a big year for school board races. To elect the right leaders shaping the landscape of our future, we need to know where they stand. Though we do not have an endorsement process for school board races, we’ve put together our . In the voter guide, you’ll find candidates’ answers to three questions centered on their environmental values and how they plan to advance justice, equity, diversity, and inclusion efforts for our kids. Whether you plan to vote by mail, in person, or , be sure to **. Happy voting! Sincerely, Britney VanCitters Organizing Manager, OLCV | ---|--- | | Connect With Us: | | Contact Info: Oregon League of Conservation Voters 321 SW 4th Ave Ste 600 Portland, OR 97204 United States | ---|--- | If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please. | | | | As of today, we’re halfway through the quarter. That means we’re halfway to the next FEC reporting deadline! name: Jon Tester
subject: When I was a kid, I lost three fingers on my left hand while working in our family’s butcher shop.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gillibrand for Senate
body:
| | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63366398/406535284/1789033467?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk4165-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5OTI3MDk1Mi1mYWYzLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BDjQqWkT9sE_wg4WcGh2lh9-T9UjZmShY-jzMbxQy1w=)
Hi there, can I tell you a little story about me? I grew up on my family’s farm and it’s still home today. That explains a lot about me. When I was a kid, I lost three fingers on my left hand while working in our family’s butcher shop. I don’t even remember putting my hand there — but I can damn sure remember rushing to a local doctor. Here’s why I’m telling you this: just like my $12 flattop haircut from my local barbershop back home and my collection of dirt-stained t-shirts,**my background is a big part of the reason I remain grounded and focused amid the partisan politics and nonsense happening in our government.** With all the chaos in Washington (especially now), you need somebody who will fight to protect our public lands, create good-paying jobs, and ensure rural communities have hospitals within driving distance in case of an emergency. **I’m pretty different from most people who end up in the U.S. Senate. I’m just a dirt farmer trying to do what’s right for the people in my state and across the country.**
**[_Can you split a donation between Kirsten Gillibrand and my campaign to help us block Mitch McConnell from retaking the Senate?_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63366404/406535289/73003207?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk4165-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5OTI3MDk1Mi1mYWYzLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BDjQqWkT9sE_wg4WcGh2lh9-T9UjZmShY-jzMbxQy1w=)**

| FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE TUESDAY, MAY 16, 2023
Washington Examiner: "Georgia can destroy DEI in higher education by defunding it"
JACKSON - In case you missed it, the Washington Examiner published a piece about Lieutenant Governor Burt Jones' push to eliminate the divisive DEI ideology from Georgia's higher education system and ensure that taxpayer dollars are not being used to fund far-left, progressive curriculum. Lieutenant Governor Jones recently wrote a letter to University System of Georgia Chancellor Sonny Perdue asking for a thorough rundown of any spending or initiatives involving DEI in Georgia's Higher Education System as a way to ensure our higher education system is focused on curriculum and programming that best equips all of our students to succeed--and not center on divisive agendas. | [Georgia can destroy DEI in higher education by defunding it](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0011XHnLebn4yIdAdYweCSbOryV9GH3q4F6zW6Y9CY0qKtg-D5zlZwIB2IRx2oKU7-bVxeuqbngCbAohxII3x_h8HLf_-kjELSbX45Yd4iPqJf3rkYYeBiyOxXe5P3bPcvRmjLPG6XjAzMACAolIJ5RPIkDI3rRM6Jb6AyvgHyAxrxe2svQGED5R9_y9a1PkEL_Fo7bjUSN1q3dCLAryad0ezxOk8fk3KLqkXwR_tzj-qNV6ICim9UUwM-9RsQO5nQxOEJ1rhbdj2LjC9YjFcm4dGGa5UsKwBKpvrivl9-1pkw=&c=m7y1YtpZerHJPRNmIDNTQLMhJxIkM9MNAlsbuUvAUlxteteRRhleOQ==&ch=2SstwXe39rop3ceLWMMh-edvdgyWHuYu_diJPzGDju-INyTA9qZkDw==)
Don't look now, but the Peach State may soon join Florida and Texas in eliminating the curse of diversity, equity, and inclusion from colleges and universities.
The chancellor of Georgia's public universities, Sonny Perdue, is locked in a battle with state lawmakers after the state Senate cut $66 million from the higher education system's fiscal 2024 budget. But Lt. Gov. Burt Jones has offered him a way out: Figure out what you're spending on DEI, and get back to us.
We've done the math at the Heritage Foundation, and we can tell Perdue that it's quite a lot. Rather than raise tuition for Georgia's students, as the system's Board of Regents may have to do because of the budget cut, he could simply eliminate these costly positions.
DEI personnel add up to an unnecessary financial cost, but the damage they inflict doesn't stop there. These positions amount to something that is profoundly un-American: political commissars policing speech and actions by students and staff, enforcing a rigid leftist ideology on entire campuses.
One of the many well-known recent cases of speech suppression took place at Stanford University Law School on March 9, with the head of DEI playing a leading role in preventing a conservative judge from speaking.
Tirien Steinbach, associate dean for DEI at Stanford Law School, told 5th Circuit Judge Kyle Duncan, who had been invited by the Federalist Society to speak on campus, that his presence was painful for students. She is now on leave from the university.
Jones mentioned the Stanford case in a letter he wrote to Perdue on April 25, saying, "A series of recent disturbing events, including a public event at Stanford University ... have drawn new attention to the role of DEI programs and personnel on college campuses."
"These programs are particularly concerning when taxpayer funds are used to enforce the type of intellectual and political conformity that appears to be the hallmark of many campus DEI initiatives," Jones added. "In my view, rather than promoting the mission of public education, when used in this way, such programs inhibit the ability of colleges and universities to promote academic and intellectual freedom in both their courses and community events."
Jones then requested the following information: the name of any DEI or related program in the Georgia system, a description of the programs, the number of staff members in them, their job titles, job descriptions, and salaries, additional funds spent on the programs, the total amount, the portion that comes from state funding, and the aggregate amount spent on these programs for the past seven fiscal years.
Jones gave Perdue until June 30 to respond, his office told me via email on Thursday. But wouldn't any Georgian want to know this? And wouldn't any sane official then follow up by eliminating these positions? That's what Florida and Texas are trying to do.
I further asked Jones if he would ask the state Senate to reduce the budget cut if Perdue did the right thing and eliminated the wasteful fat of DEI. The answer was: "I am going to continue to ask the University System to evaluate all of their spending. I believe that's the role of being a fiscal conservative, as I have always been. USG's message of financial struggle is concerning when they receive a tenth of the state budget, equaling around $3.1 billion this past budget cycle."
Then he added ominously, "If this significant amount of taxpayer dollars isn't enough, I believe we need a thorough analysis to ensure they are not misappropriating state funding."
My colleague Jay Greene and James D. Paul, a doctoral fellow at the University of Arkansas, have run the numbers on 65 universities representing 16% of students in four-year institutions. Their July 2021 study was groundbreaking, the first since universities made the promotion of DEI one of their main primary functions -- even though DEI militates against the old primary function: truth discovery.
Greene and Paul found that the average university in their sample has more than 45 staff members promoting DEI, which is 4.2 times the number of people assisting students with disabilities, as required by law, and 1.4 times the number of history professors.
The absolute worst offender was the University of Michigan, with a total of 163 DEI officers and a 15-1 ratio of DEI personnel to Americans with Disabilities Act compliance officers. (Does this suggest that race is a worse disability than a physical handicap?)
But Georgia schools have nothing to brag about. "At Georgia Tech," Greene and Paul wrote, "there were 3.2 times as many DEI staff people as history professors." The Georgia Institute of Technology has 41 DEI officers, while the University of Georgia has 38. Georgia Tech has a DEI-ADA personnel ratio of 5.1.
Greene put his finger on the crux of the logjam in Georgia when he emailed me that "Perdue may be unhappy with cuts in state appropriations to Georgia public universities, but taxpayers in that state also have reasons to be unhappy with the bloated and expensive DEI bureaucracies at those universities that are indoctrinating their children into a political agenda that runs contrary to taxpayers' preferences.
"If Perdue wants to restore his funding he may need to restore faith with Georgia's taxpayers," Greene added. Exactly right.

name: Madeleine Dean
subject: time to vote, PA!

body:
Your vote is your voice! Taking part in our democracy is the right of every citizen and I encourage you to get out and cast your ballot. **** Today is Primary Day here in Pennsylvania and _the polls are now open until 8 PM._

**_Your vote is your voice!_ Taking part in our democracy is the right of every citizen and I encourage you to get out and cast your ballot.**

Will you chip in $1? Nikki Haley is a strong, experienced leader who has a proven track record of winning. As governor of South Carolina, she cut taxes, balanced the budget, and created jobs. She turned South Carolina into the economic Beast of the Southeast. As ambassador to the United Nations, she stood up for America's interests and restored our nation's standing in the world. She took the kick me sign off the United States’ back. Nikki Haley is the leader we need to unite our country and restore America's greatness. She is a conservative who will fight for our values, our jobs, and our security. I know that you are a busy person, but I ask you to take a moment to consider making a $1 donation to Nikki Haley's campaign . Here are some of the ways that your $1 donation can help elect Nikki Haley: - It will help us pay for advertising to spread Nikki’s positive message. - It will fund Nikki Haley's effort to host town halls and meet and greets so she can shake hands and meet voters. - It will help us build a grassroots organization that can turn out voters on Election Day. - It will allow us to pay for things like yard signs and t-shirts.Every dollar counts, and your donation will help elect Nikki Haley President. Chip in $1 now . Thank you for your support! Sincerely, Anna B. Team Haley NIKKI HALEY MERCHANDISE HIGHLIGHT: A great way to show off your support for Nikki Haley this summer is with your very own Strong & Proud not Weak & Woke drink cooler ! All of our merchandise is made in America. ">Contribute now to support Nikki Haley and claim your drink cooler today! > GET YOURS NOW! NIKKI HALEY’S OFFICIAL CAMPAIGN STORE: VISIT STORE → JOIN TEAM HALEY With Election Day more than a year out, you may be wondering: Does my donation today really make an impact? The answer is, unequivocally, YES! Grassroots support is what Nikki’s fight to save America is built on. In fact, grassroots conservatives like YOU are the reason Nikki has never lost an election before – from her run for the state legislature to governor. Your generous support today will allow Nikki and our team to host town halls, hold rallies, meet with voters, and spread her conservative message all around the country. We’re just getting started and would love to have you on Team Haley! ">So, if you can spare it, a donation of $1, $10, or ANY amount goes a long way to help Nikki reach more voters! >> P.S. If you don’t have $1 or more to spare, all we ask is that you take one minute of your time toText NIKKI to 48324 and share this with 5 friends today! DONATE Paid for by Nikki Haley for President. www.nikkihaley.com By providing your phone number, you are consenting to receive SMS/MMS news alerts, action items, and donation requests to the number provided from each of Nikki Haley for President, Stand For America PAC, Stand for America, Team Stand For America, SFA Inc., and Ambassador Nikki Haley (48324) directly or by third parties acting on their behalf. Texts may be sent via an automated telephone dialing system. Consent not required to contribute. Consent not required to contribute. Message frequency varies. Message and data rates may apply.

name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: Will you help me restore America’s guiding values?
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vWLUrtcDbN

American Cornerstone Institute

Where the Left wants bigger government, we'll fight for
limited government and self-determination

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oWLUrtcDbN

Fellow
Patriot,

This is
Dr. Ben Carson, and I'm writing to you today because your name is
on my list of Americans who cherish our nation's guiding values
of life, liberty, community, and faith.

Have you
ever stopped to think about how charitable giving is a brilliant
reflection of freedom?

It's a
way for every American to use our hard-earned money to freely
support the causes we care most about.

This is
democracy in action: because every dollar you give is a vote for
the future you want to see.

I'd like
to personally invite you to join me in advancing common-sense
solutions to our nation's toughest challenges by making a
generous gift of whatever your budget allows.

Your
investment will allow the American Cornerstone Institute to
engage in independent research, grassroots outreach, and
collaboration with conservative leaders to set forth a better
path forward for our country, safeguarding freedom for you and
your family in the coming years.

Will you
join me? If so, you can support these efforts by clicking the
link below:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61809151:WLUrtcDbN:m:3:2532013465:261D8F7902EDB126CE47E0057AD880A3:r

Where the
Left wants bigger government, we'll fight for limited government
and self-determination.

America
is the greatest country that has ever existed. Please help me do
everything possible to make sure it stays that way.

Thank you
for your support,

Dr. Ben
Carson
Founder
and Chairman
American
Cornerstone Institute

P.S. I
know these are uncertain times. But no gift is too small. And
every dollar you give today will have a long-term impact on
restoring our nation's founding values. Click here to give
whatever you can today »

Your
donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and
preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our
country's most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods
to decrease the federal government's role in society and to
improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation's citizens.

Copyright
© 2023 American Cornerstone Institute, All rights reserved.

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.
