name: Lindsey Graham
subject: They hate President Trump
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Team Graham, Inc
body:
If you're not disturbed by the Durham report, you must want to condemn Trump no matter the evidence or lack thereof. |
Fellow American,

It's a dangerous and sad day in America.

The Durham Report confirmed what many of us already believed about the FBI's politically motivated prosecution of President Trump - that there was no justification for this inquiry into Donald J. Trump's 2016 campaign.

Attorney General Merrick Garland should pick up the phone and call all those who were harmed by this and say that "...even though it didn't happen on my watch, _I apologize to you."_

**This is not the Department of Justice that I want to believe in.**

This is what happens when bureaucracies in Washington put politics over - _let's face it_ - common sense.

They turned President Trump's life upside down and tried to create a cloud over his presidency. They even tried to deny his presidency. [**Fellow American, it's time to stand up to this crap!**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61809731:WIM2tcDNo:m:1:877327319:CE3EAE675E9061D26EAE2EE48B6AF7F4:r)

| [** STAND WITH PRESIDENT TRUMP
SECURE THE SENATE ->**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61809731:WIM2tcDNo:m:1:877327319:CE3EAE675E9061D26EAE2EE48B6AF7F4:r)
---

Here's what I have to say to anyone claiming the Durham Report is a dud - **_if this doesn't bother you, your hatred for Trump has just blinded you._**

Fellow American, I am standing with President Trump for his re-election, but we know that the Left will continue to push this false narrative about Russian collusion.

There's no evidence the Trump team colluded with the Russians. The FBI ran every stop sign and kept pushing a warrant against an American citizen based on the Steele Dossier which was a piece of fiction.

Wouldn't it be nice if the FBI would apologize to those whose lives they ruined, or if Attorney General Merrick Garland would pick up the phone and say, _"I'm sorry this happened to you."_

Neither of those are going to happen, so we need to change who is in charge.

[**Fellow American, will you join me in support of President Trump and our effort to SECURE THE SENATE?**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61809731:WIM2tcDNo:m:1:877327319:CE3EAE675E9061D26EAE2EE48B6AF7F4:r)

The Left wants to get Trump and they don't give a damn how they do it. _That's what's so sad to me._

Today, I want to help President Trump and Senate Republicans. [**The best way we can help is by chipping in any amount - whether it's $10 or $100.**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61809731:WIM2tcDNo:m:1:877327319:CE3EAE675E9061D26EAE2EE48B6AF7F4:r)

**I am calling on all of Team Graham to step up in a big way before the end of the day.**

The Left will continue to downplay this report even though it's devastating and damning to the Rule of Law in America because it shows they were wrong about President Trump, and they were wrong about Russian collusion. They will write it off because they want the outcome of destroying Trump.

[**Fellow American, we cannot sit back and let this happen. Join me in standing with President Trump today.**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61809731:WIM2tcDNo:m:1:877327319:CE3EAE675E9061D26EAE2EE48B6AF7F4:r)

Thanks,

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61809731:WIM2tcDNo:m:1:877327319:CE3EAE675E9061D26EAE2EE48B6AF7F4:r)
Lindsey Graham

[** STAND WITH PRESIDENT TRUMP
SECURE THE SENATE ->**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61809731:WIM2tcDNo:m:1:877327319:CE3EAE675E9061D26EAE2EE48B6AF7F4:r)
---

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61809732:WIM2tcDNo:m:1:877327319:CE3EAE675E9061D26EAE2EE48B6AF7F4:r)
For text updates from Team Graham, **[click this link to subscribe!](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61809732:WIM2tcDNo:m:1:877327319:CE3EAE675E9061D26EAE2EE48B6AF7F4:r)**

In the United States Senate, South Carolina's Lindsey Graham has earned a reputation as a conservative, a problem-solver, and a leader who gets things done. He is a great friend to our men and women serving in uniform, a respected voice on national security matters, a leading advocate for cutting the out-of-control spending in Washington, and a champion for confirming conservative judges.

| [** Support Senator Graham! **](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61809733:WIM2tcDNo:m:1:877327319:CE3EAE675E9061D26EAE2EE48B6AF7F4:r)

The Durham Report confirmed what many of us already believed about the FBI's politically motivated prosecution of President Trump - that there was no justification for this inquiry into Donald J. Trump's 2016 campaign. Attorney General Merrick Garland should pick up the phone and call all those who were harmed by this and say that "...even though it didn't happen on my watch, I apologize to you." This is not the Department of Justice that I want to believe in. This is what happens when bureaucracies in Washington put politics over - let's face it - common sense. They turned President Trump's life upside down and tried to create a cloud over his presidency. They even tried to deny his presidency. | Here's what I have to say to anyone claiming the Durham Report is a dud - if this doesn't bother you, your hatred for Trump has just blinded you. Fellow American, I am standing with President Trump for his re-election, but we know that the Left will continue to push this false narrative about Russian collusion. There's no evidence the Trump team colluded with the Russians. The FBI ran every stop sign and kept pushing a warrant against an American citizen based on the Steele Dossier which was a piece of fiction. Wouldn't it be nice if the FBI would apologize to those whose lives they ruined, or if Attorney General Merrick Garland would pick up the phone and say, "I'm sorry this happened to you." Neither of those are going to happen, so we need to change who is in charge. The Left wants to get Trump and they don't give a damn how they do it. That's what's so sad to me. Today, I want to help President Trump and Senate Republicans. I am calling on all of Team Graham to step up in a big way before the end of the day. The Left will continue to downplay this report even though it's devastating and damning to the Rule of Law in America because it shows they were wrong about President Trump, and they were wrong about Russian collusion. They will write it off because they want the outcome of destroying Trump. Thanks, Lindsey Graham For text updates from Team Graham, In the United States Senate, South Carolina's Lindsey Graham has earned a reputation as a conservative, a problem-solver, and a leader who gets things done. He is a great friend to our men and women serving in uniform, a respected voice on national security matters, a leading advocate for cutting the out-of-control spending in Washington, and a champion for confirming conservative judges. | We want to make sure you're a proud member of Team Graham, and we don't want to bother you. To receive only the most important emails, please We'd hate to see you go, but if you'd like to unsubscribe, please . | | | ---|---|---|--- | Paid For By Team Graham, Inc. This message was intended for: mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com You were added to the system April 14, 2015. For more information . |

President Biden let Title 42 expire and as a result...
* ** _Our borders are delving further into chaos._**_(even Biden admits this)_
* **_Border patrol is now being forced to release illegal migrants into our country_**
* ** _A new wave of migrants is rushing to our borders _**

This is going to have devastating effects on our communities and our nation. As a member of the Northern Border Security Caucus, I know how critical it is that we secure our borders. **That's why House Republicans have been working on an extensive border security package to counter this chaos and keep our country safe.**
But while we’re focused on making it happen, Democrats are raising and spending record money to take back the majority and make this crisis permanent. name: Ron Wyden
subject: They want Americans to suffer so billionaires can keep their tax cuts
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Wyden for Senate
body:
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63373309/406550523/2140832878?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTQxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZDY2ODliYi0wMmY0LWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dJ6abaOS_b0Bj-Z51bICAfx-Vzq3OvcL5xEyVMDMBmA=&emci=fd932182-6cf3-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=6d6689bb-02f4-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=9818364)
---

| | The debt ceiling has been making headlines – so I wanted to take some time to explain what's going on. Back in 2017, Republicans blew a $2 trillion hole in the deficit to give a tax handout to billionaires and corporations. I warned back then that Republicans would turn on working people and the middle class to pay for their tax giveaways, and unfortunately, now I'm being proven right. **To pay for their tax cuts, instead of making billionaires and corporations pay their fair share, Republicans in Congress want working families to foot the bill.** They're gunning for everything from food assistance programs, to public education, veterans' benefits, and everything else in between. **Republicans are showing the American people their true colors** – working overtime to slash taxes for their billionaire donors and taking food away from kids to pay for it, and threatening to force our country into default if Democrats don't support their scam to help the rich get richer. Let me be clear: **Republicans' plan is a nonstarter in the Senate.** I will not support any legislation that makes it harder for vulnerable families to get the help they need. **Nothing unites Republicans like cutting taxes for the rich and forcing kids into poverty, but I know our movement is stronger.** I will not stop fighting with all my heart to protect American families from Republicans' schemes. clean_body: | | | | The debt ceiling has been making headlines – so I wanted to take some time to explain what's going on. Back in 2017, Republicans blew a $2 trillion hole in the deficit to give a tax handout to billionaires and corporations. I warned back then that Republicans would turn on working people and the middle class to pay for their tax giveaways, and unfortunately, now I'm being proven right. To pay for their tax cuts, instead of making billionaires and corporations pay their fair share, Republicans in Congress want working families to foot the bill. They're gunning for everything from food assistance programs, to public education, veterans' benefits, and everything else in between. Republicans are showing the American people their true colors – working overtime to slash taxes for their billionaire donors and taking food away from kids to pay for it, and threatening to force our country into default if Democrats don't support their scam to help the rich get richer. Let me be clear: Republicans' plan is a nonstarter in the Senate. I will not support any legislation that makes it harder for vulnerable families to get the help they need. Nothing unites Republicans like cutting taxes for the rich and forcing kids into poverty, but I know our movement is stronger. I will not stop fighting with all my heart to protect American families from Republicans' schemes. More soon, Ron | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: | = | = | = | = ---|---|---|--- | | Paid for and authorized by Wyden for Senate. | This email was sent by Wyden for Senate P.O. [Army Veteran's diagnoses reveals celiac disease](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zfcg5updqrei7d457dhog3nh54cb36s0e2jd8k7g_rp22sh2s8i66o71c9hmeoj2c1h238h5e8he485he5o7csn7kui3bd9ieir38cth6kpjactmekpradrmeej3fddnk9g64pj7k1imf933cui34tdkumhnacbl69q37djlk4qb8dpjmur7adjlk9qj6t9k66r7b9hl66qb8dhlk4qbct9k6pqjf8h5u)
Army Veteran Susan struggled with gastrointestinal (GI) issues for years with no real answers and various diagnoses. After doing an eliminations diet and researching online, she talked to her primary care provider about the possibility of celiac disease. Follow up blood work and additional testing showed she did indeed have celiac disease.

subject: Trump should be sued for his disgusting comments during the CNN town hall
body:
| | | | |

# [Add your name: Trump should be sued AGAIN for defamation after mocking E. Jean Carroll >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/T39e2e135-b003-4322-8c9d-3e44d2b3921b/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

---
| | | Last week, Trump was found liable for sexual abuse and defamation and ordered to pay $5 Million in damages to author E. Jean Carroll. Then just one day later, Trump mocked E. Jean Carroll during his CNN town hall circus, calling her a “wack job” and calling the trial a “rigged deal.” His comments were vile and hurtful, and Carroll is now considering suing Trump AGAIN. We fully support Carroll suing Trump again if she chooses to, and think Trump deserves everything that’s coming for him. [Add your name if you agree Trump should be sued AGAIN for defamation after mocking E. Jean Carroll >> ](https://default.salsalabs.org/T505cf64b-c3c5-41a3-86e8-fd3ab1d0cb44/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

name: =?utf-8?Q?Caleb=20Heimlich?=
subject: Save the Date: 46th Annual Washington State Republican Party Dinner
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Washington State Republican Party
body:
Join us at our upcoming 46th Annual Dinner - Get your tickets now!

http://wsrp.org
Ballots Are Out, Vote By November 2nd!

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=WeGlgXqOx-Y

With ballots out, now is the perfect time to get out there and volunteer on a conservative campaign. Every door you knock on in these local races matter a lot and the results of this election year will be used as a bellwether for the 2022 midterms.

We are also hosting another WSRP Statewide Day Of Action on Saturday, October 30th! Bring a friend or neighbor to volunteer for a few hours to help local conservatives win in November! Sign up here to join our Statewide Day Of Action! (https://form.jotform.com/212737084845058)
State Sen. Gildon On Vaccine Mandates
https://soundcloud.com/user-450836972/wagop-report-state-sen-chris-gildon-on-vaccine-mandates-and-democrat-anti-policing-laws
State Senator Chris Gildon (R - Puyallup) joins the podcast this week to discuss vaccine mandates, anti-policing laws, the Long-Term Care Tax, and how he got his start in politics. WAGOP is now on Apple Podcasts and Spotify, follow us and never miss an episode! Listen here. (https://soundcloud.com/user-450836972/wagop-report-state-sen-chris-gildon-on-vaccine-mandates-and-democrat-anti-policing-laws)
Republican Leaders Fight Inslee's Mandate
Thanks to our Republican leaders in the State House and Senate for fighting back and offering a strong rebuke of Inslee's harmful vaccine mandate. Below is an excerpt of their most recent statement to the press:

“We are already experiencing higher prices and empty shelves partially as a result of COVID's shutdowns and workforce shortages. Today's deadline, with its unnecessarily hardline consequences, will only make that worse when hundreds, if not thousands, lose their jobs and are denied unemployment benefits. It also threatens public safety by reducing our police forces at a time when crime is already rising. People feel unsafe. They are afraid of what criminals will do when there are even fewer law enforcement officers to respond. And they are worried about people's chances of survival if there aren't enough first responders to help in an emergency. The governor underestimates the potential impact of his actions.

“Coercion, intimidation, threats and public shaming are not tactics a leader should be using against the people. The governor's obvious disdain for those who are choosing to lose their jobs rather than compromise their right to make their own medical decisions is unhelpful. He is dividing the public – segregating us and turning people against each other. Yesterday, even unvaccinated health-care workers were heroes. Today, they become villains in the governor's narrative."

Read the full statement. (https://jtwilcox.houserepublicans.wa.gov/2021/10/18/republican-leaders-todays-vaccine-deadline-threatens-critical-services-public-safety/?fbclid=IwAR3WxI9H29hbbmfbZhdkDS9QjqdVd2TIRCdjNjUkUlLdeThtbUjK_WBWJuw)
Smiley Campaign Shows Grassroots Support In Latest Fundraising Quarter
Tiffany Smiley is fighting hard to retire Patty Murray and her latest fundraising numbers show not only has Tiffany raised more than $1.6 million but she also has unequivocal grassroots support, with over 10,000 donors from Washington State. Flipping a U.S. Senate seat is hard work but Tiffany has shown in the only 5 months since starting her campaign, that she is a force to be reckoned with. Learn more about how Tiffany stands on the issues here (https://www.smileyforwashington.com/issues) .
Contact:
Steve Johnson
Communications Director
Washington State Republican Party
(425) 460-0570
steve@wsrp.org (mailto:steve@wsrp.org)

============================================================

Your interest in the Washington State Republican Party, National Republican Committee or Washington state Republican Candidates

USA

You can ** update your preferences (https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/profile?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=4f90cbb438&e=6a281f566d&c=07e0cc68b5)
or ** unsubscribe from this list (https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=4f90cbb438&e=6a281f566d&c=07e0cc68b5)
.

Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

name: KatiePorter.com
subject: Only 19% of people will open this email →
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate
body:
Did you know?
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14558?t=1&akid=23011%2E3422442%2EC_7fci)
Derek,
Did you know that, on average, just 19% of the folks who get this email will actually open it?
And out of those 19%, about 2% will click one of our links.
....And out of that 2%, only _half_ of those folks actually donate, finish our survey, or sign our petition.
All of that to say: **You reading this right now, Derek, is a big deal.**
But it’s also a testament to how much you mean to our campaign.
Katie doesn’t accept donations from corporate PACs or federal lobbyists, so we rely on grassroots supporters like yourself—especially those who donate via emails like this one.
**[Can you join the top 1% of Porter Supporters reading this email and make a contribution of $5 today? Every single donation makes a difference in a competitive primary like ours.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230516-1?amount=5&refcode=EMAH16_1_PER_20230516_V1_F&refcode2=23011_3422442_C_7fci&akid=23011%2E3422442%2EC_7fci)**

Thank you for opening this email and supporting our campaign.
—Team Katie Porter

Katie is running for the U.S. Senate because Californians deserve a warrior fighting for them in Washington. Our campaign is people-powered, we don’t take a dime from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or executives from Big Oil or Big Pharma. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-footer?refcode=EMAH16_1_PER_20230516_V1_F&t=2&refcode2=23011_3422442_C_7fci&akid=23011%2E3422442%2EC_7fci)**
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/receive-fewer-kp4s-emails/?t=3&akid=23011%2E3422442%2EC_7fci)

* [Unsubscribe](https://act.katieporter.com/unsubscribe/kp4s-unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=23011%2E3422442%2EC_7fci)

Katie Porter for Senate

Irvine, CA 92616

body:
Just a few hours ago Michelle officially launched her campaign to represent TX-15 in Congress. | | | [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/tTBUZwcBH_2q13Ow12s-jc-9PHkp7BkSZ-MbOY7TNqbHMZZ7e6z8fxUUbQYxgrxk6a2v4Aw9Ux80o37VicMJ_2RUROn59OUiTeeVHLXdV7VQ6UP0B003zvnUXl-_g03dDSsEU6G0XY1vfjO-5vZ2El0H9xdlQ_XG5oj0y3-vMlMpT2brxyOcQR2lRhjOm60BHjhTfPfe-dBA17YBSSlU-HufZYQMw2FAnGxvbZH4w8bfTHdiHaqNfnaG2u8HOAFhe7IKg_bZ4wdY1u80D82BdQ/3w8/0btGQyHnRISGr-zmuA_ALA/h0/wRl2VQJmG5TRCi3bzJld3KgazBMkUuJJAJP2mjw9mT0)
---
Peter, just a few hours ago Michelle officially launched her campaign to represent TX-15 in Congress. AND we also unveiled our first official campaign ad — have you seen our launch video yet? We are so excited to share it with you: [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953ySVaDaV5oWUMSiiW973_z_Zv1Lq14huz-FAP2L0N7p1RCpKJIExiZr4YJCorEyLhvVhXijO1SyDxAScPbCq-odFerciTUbvUv3Uoxh4bgU0VpuCXz_XBMaMhy8spPwdQLK0i6JfLKnERUidQUIC16Lt7uUHeYotPFandrpVwZu6DHTFA_SUlh1ka7-mCx_sAzn-3aQ3nU5WCh6zSDDrHdDj5J_OsaXtaDaTEfoBc8nBxBa_vp9q-a_58hAPYGTrVwunDqp63w5EMyajmESr8zaoVS974kCCdtV3etwApTSynfxRLeNdznTVjNG8hJhkzI9SY6B21WSjZDtGeuzzNYY/3w8/0btGQyHnRISGr-zmuA_ALA/h1/87z18gazF-uKy2zPiAwa55Gp5gGEsUJSWh95nPJWXb4) [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953ySVaDaV5oWUMSiiW973_z_Zv1Lq14huz-FAP2L0N7p1RCpKJIExiZr4YJCorEyLhuTVuvUxnInnWr_aJSZGiSOzcGoF6qspRUz1JK8bGBRmmw1tN2Jlt14OWpM0nZTxGAOE1bBZ4zQdHMU3YKW8xZVcGT5IO4EquYasAla3g9nV0cc6dtHKyedrKxlU9goCT1hUPrV7ZHms-iP1IPEyjqJd1wXFLRs0gPhp5WW0TWx51ZUbaK1iziqkpoZydkD1YjCS_h8Aqmk3C1KjMCsg8oazG9noeLZli9JPklBsYB0mjuSqJNIIO79rzRWXgIHr-Se1HsX1aC-wr8phuCQpa4g/3w8/0btGQyHnRISGr-zmuA_ALA/h2/qnnoJHFQlKYLjfHvBY1IY5BnowtbQSxd8vrJ5_A1aAc)Sharing this video as far and wide as we can is the best way for us to reach people from every walk of life, from every corner of this district and beyond, spreading our message and showing people they have a place in this movement. To do that, we need to ramp up our spending on digital ads. With your help, we’ll get this in front of as many Texans as possible to let them know Michelle is running for them. **[Can you make a contribution right now to help us promote our very first campaign ad? clean_body: Just a few hours ago Michelle officially launched her campaign to represent TX-15 in Congress. | | | Peter, just a few hours ago Michelle officially launched her campaign to represent TX-15 in Congress. AND we also unveiled our first official campaign ad — have you seen our launch video yet? We are so excited to share it with you: this video as far and wide as we can is the best way for us to reach people from every walk of life, from every corner of this district and beyond, spreading our message and showing people they have a place in this movement. To do that, we need to ramp up our spending on digital ads. With your help, we’ll get this in front of as many Texans as possible to let them know Michelle is running for them. The more people we have on board in this campaign, the more people power we’ll have to elect a leader like Michelle who is ready to fight for South Texans every day in Washington and get Monica De La Cruz OUT of TX-15. We are determined to make this a grassroots campaign starting on Day 1, but that means, for digital pushes like this, we are counting on supporters like you to do what you can. Whether it’s sharing this video, talking to your neighbors about a better future for South Texas, or just donating $5 to run ads to spread this video all over the internet, every bit of support makes a huge difference. Juntos, we are going to show politicians like Monica who have taken advantage of our land, our neighbors, and our families that we are ready to fight back — starting with voting new leadership into power. ¡Si, se puede! Team Vallejo | | | ---|---|--- Paid for by Michelle Vallejo for Congress Michelle Vallejo for Congress PO Box 1265 Mission, TX 78573

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: A June 20th primary could decide if Glenn Youngkin has the votes to ban abortion in Virginia next year.
body:
Protect abortion in Virginia
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T650ba4e0-ec2b-4c1e-83fd-bc105777fb10/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, **[June 20th may determine if abortion remains legal in Virginia](https://default.salsalabs.org/Td7270875-e394-4627-9c90-d30b666bc39a/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9).**_ **Democrats control the VA State Senate by 2 votes, while Republicans have the governor & state house. Yet, it gets worse.** _**_One of the 2 Democrats, Joe Morrissey, has a history of sordid behavior and says he's a "pro-life" Democrat._ ** **_Morissey was *twice* disbarred as state prosecutor for fistfights and contempt of court citations. He was charged with "delinquency of a minor" for having a relationship with, and marrying, a 17-yr old law firm receptionist._** _Add in his will to control all women's bodies, and it's not surprising this happened:_ [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T7cc5bba5-d474-4b22-a54f-5bd939c4db8f/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _We don't know how the November general election will go, we could lose pro-choice seats._ **_Yet, we can remove a morally bankrupt anti-choicer and replace him with former Delegate Lashrecse Aird. __Aird has made Abortion rights the centerpiece of their campaign with a "Roe Not Joe" tour around the district._** [_The primary's June 20th, but early voting has begun! If we want another crucial pro-choice vote from a Democratic district, _we must help Aird NOW_ , or risk Glenn Youngkin banning abortion next year. _**_Will you join Blue Amp's "Roe Not Joe," effort by supporting Lashrecse Aird with $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Td65f1230-6ece-48b9-beda-7b9fdf86f96a/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _We must remove anti-abortion extremists, even when they dress up as Democrats. _ Cliff
---
|

---

|

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T59a7a4ac-210a-4401-97e7-fc5b630a2dd1/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

So instead of fighting them on it, I’ve decided to just embrace it. Caution: puns ahead! I know it’s easy to want to turn back when the next election seems so far away, but this is right when the trail really starts to get tough. Here’s a trade secret I’ve learned running in three nationally-targeted battleground races: **A dedicated base of supporters is the foundation of a successful campaign.** High-dollar donations are nice, but there’s no replacement for a grassroots team like this one. So when I noticed that our May fundraising is off to a rocky start and we’re at risk of falling off the edge of a cliff if we don’t turn things around ASAP, I knew I could count on you to pull us back to safety. We’re in between a rock and a hard place. name: Tennessee Democratic Party
subject: The weeks ahead are gonna be wild
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63375229/406557238/-53242616?refcode=AU_TNDP_FR_GEN_GEN_NO_20230516_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NzEzNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNzMzOWQzMy0wNmY0LWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kQ1LSe6ubRR5TpMsnHA0cZrXMhWNb-DF5cUG0Ywatow=)
---
Peter, a few days ago, this guy, House Speaker Cameron Sexton, said we were no longer tolerating the failed status quo and protecting our communities from violence. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63375232/406557240/-53242616?amount=3&refcode=AU_TNDP_FR_GEN_GEN_NO_20230516_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NzEzNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNzMzOWQzMy0wNmY0LWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kQ1LSe6ubRR5TpMsnHA0cZrXMhWNb-DF5cUG0Ywatow=)_via Tennessee Lookout_ And yet, he and his party REFUSED to pass any legislation before session ended that would keep guns out of the hands of dangerous individuals, all because they’d rather finance their campaigns from the warchest of the NRA and the rest of the gun lobby. [**Can our team count on you to add a contribution of $3 today to help us build our team’s capacity ahead of August’s special elections?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63375234/406557243/-53242616?amount=3&refcode=AU_TNDP_FR_GEN_GEN_NO_20230516_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NzEzNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNzMzOWQzMy0wNmY0LWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kQ1LSe6ubRR5TpMsnHA0cZrXMhWNb-DF5cUG0Ywatow=) | [CHIP IN $3](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63375236/406557245/-53242616?amount=3&refcode=AU_TNDP_FR_GEN_GEN_NO_20230516_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NzEzNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNzMzOWQzMy0wNmY0LWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kQ1LSe6ubRR5TpMsnHA0cZrXMhWNb-DF5cUG0Ywatow=)
---
Thanks to supporters like you, we’re building a grassroots coalition that will match this movement and fight for the safe schools and communities that Tennesseeans deserve. We can and must live free from gun violence, and that starts by ensuring they don’t fall into the wrong hands.
We’re so glad to know you’re on the same team, Peter, and we hope you’ll donate ahead of August. The weeks ahead will be wild, so we have to be ready.
[**Add your donation of $3 today >>**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63375238/406557247/-53242616?amount=3&refcode=AU_TNDP_FR_GEN_GEN_NO_20230516_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NzEzNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNzMzOWQzMy0wNmY0LWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kQ1LSe6ubRR5TpMsnHA0cZrXMhWNb-DF5cUG0Ywatow=)
Thanks again for everything you do.
— Team TNDP
Tennessee Democratic Party
4900 Centennial Blvd
Suite 300
Nashville, TN 37209
United States **[tndp.org](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63375240/406557249/-1458193909?refcode=AU_TNDP_FR_GEN_GEN_NO_20230516_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NzEzNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNzMzOWQzMy0wNmY0LWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kQ1LSe6ubRR5TpMsnHA0cZrXMhWNb-DF5cUG0Ywatow=&emci=060e75e1-ecf3-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=07339d33-06f4-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=6362892) | [info@tndp.org](mailto:info@tndp.org)** | CAROL V. name: Team Granite Solutions
subject: Help us Support Parental Rights
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Granite Solutions, Joe Sweeney Chairman
body:
Send your Legislator a message today!

| | | | | [](https://5wbjs096.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fsecure.winred.com%2Fgranitesolutions%2Fexpand-majorities/1/0100018825646df2-d221a04b-1ade-45cf-b6a4-6c02b40a2d59-000000/iqwocaEwLY8U-3XishurDi3BSv8=322)
---
| | Derek,

Parents have the fundamental right and responsibility to direct the upbringing, education, and care of your children. Unfortunately, government officials and agencies can sometimes interfere with your parental decisions, even when you are acting in your children's best interests.

---
[](http://5wbjs096.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/http:%2F%2Fwww.ProtectNHKids.com/1/0100018825646df2-d221a04b-1ade-45cf-b6a4-6c02b40a2d59-000000/adh7tk17T7SJ53v14jyMuICzR90=322)
---
But to make this a reality, we need your help. The best way to support the Parental Bill of Rights is to contact your state legislator and urge them to support it. You can do this quickly and easily by visiting [www.ProtectNHKids.com](http://5wbjs096.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/http:%2F%2Fwww.protectnhkids.com%2F/1/0100018825646df2-d221a04b-1ade-45cf-b6a4-6c02b40a2d59-000000/s5euRdZxv3nOmG-08k7A06PwhYY=322) and sending an email to your representative.

By taking this simple action, you can help protect your parental rights and those of all New Hampshire families. We need your voice to be heard and your support to make a difference. Please visit [www.ProtectNHKids.com](http://5wbjs096.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/http:%2F%2Fwww.protectnhkids.com%2F/2/0100018825646df2-d221a04b-1ade-45cf-b6a4-6c02b40a2d59-000000/xTK6w1p_elLZXamAAJlgBV6wmf0=322) today and send an email to your legislator in support of the Parental Bill of Rights.

Thank you for your support and commitment to protecting parental rights in New Hampshire.

\- Team Granite Solutions

clean_body: Send your Legislator a message today! | | | | | | | Derek, Parents have the fundamental right and responsibility to direct the upbringing, education, and care of your children. Unfortunately, government officials and agencies can sometimes interfere with your parental decisions, even when you are acting in your children's best interests. But to make this a reality, we need your help. The best way to support the Parental Bill of Rights is to contact your state legislator and urge them to support it. You can do this quickly and easily by visiting and sending an email to your representative. By taking this simple action, you can help protect your parental rights and those of all New Hampshire families. We need your voice to be heard and your support to make a difference. Please visit today and send an email to your legislator in support of the Parental Bill of Rights. Team: There is a clear trendline in the polling of this race, and it points to Helen Gym as Philly’s next Mayor.

3 WEEKS AGO: Helen was stuck in a five-way statistical logjam with her moderate opponents and two self-funding millionaires.

2 WEEKS AGO: Helen and one other candidate pulled ahead of the pack — into a two-way tie at 21%.

NOW: Helen and our team just knocked on 40,000 doors in one weekend, held the biggest mayoral rally in recent Philadelphia history, and leapt into a razor-thin lead in the race’s final poll — with 23% of the vote in a massive nine-candidate field.

Let’s be clear, though: Polls won’t decide Philadelphia’s next Mayor. Voters will.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Zak=20Malamed?=
subject: Is there anything I can say to get you to donate to unseat George Santos?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Zak for Congress
body:
#
We launched our campaign just about 24 hours ago. Already, we’re seeing a surge in momentum. But knowing the steep uphill we have to climb to flip this district and unseat George Santos, I have to ask...
[Is there anything I could tell you that might convince you to make a contribution before our first 24 hours are up?](https://zakforcongress.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=30c2554cf0cbb2d4d7d50d7c7&id=cade41d865&e=15d98230e6)
\- What if I told you that my opponent, George Santos, represents a wave of right-wing extremism that undermines the values we hold dear?
\- What if I mentioned that this district, New York’s 3rd, voted for Joe Biden in 2020 but is now a toss-up that could shift the balance of power in the House?
\- What if I told you that pundits and press are watching this race closely, recognizing its potential to be one of the closest and most important of the year?
\- And what if I shared that running a competitive campaign in NY-03 is a costly endeavor? Given the district's critical importance, we expect the Republicans to pour millions into defending Santos, escalating our own campaign expenses.
Our goal is to raise enough to send an unmistakable message to the pundits and press about the strength of our campaign. But we can’t do it without seeing one more big surge right now. So, I’m asking you:
[**Can I count on you to contribute to kickstart our campaign launch? Every dollar you can give now will make a significant difference in these crucial early hours.**](https://zakforcongress.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=30c2554cf0cbb2d4d7d50d7c7&id=dca6600690&e=15d98230e6)
**[Become a Founding Donor ››](https://zakforcongress.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=30c2554cf0cbb2d4d7d50d7c7&id=9c4554f34a&e=15d98230e6)**
Thank you for being with us from day one. Let's reclaim NY-03 together.
Sincerely,
**Zak Malamed
** Candidate for NY-03

[](https://zakforcongress.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=30c2554cf0cbb2d4d7d50d7c7&id=b5695a96eb&e=15d98230e6)
**[Donate](https://zakforcongress.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=30c2554cf0cbb2d4d7d50d7c7&id=b0cbc42360&e=15d98230e6)**
---
Paid for by Zak for Congress
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://zakforcongress.us21.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=30c2554cf0cbb2d4d7d50d7c7&id=9bec16b14b&e=15d98230e6&c=357fe2c049). Mail us: Zak for Congress, PO Box 220421, Great Neck, NY 11022.

name: Jon Tester
subject: Roll Call just ranked me as the most vulnerable Democratic Senator running for reelection in 2024
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Seth Moulton for Congress
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/moulton-tester [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/moulton-tester]
Folks, it's official.
Roll Call just ranked me as the most vulnerable Democratic Senator running for reelection in 2024.
That’s why Mitch McConnell has made this race his top target and national Republicans are already hammering me with attacks. I know we can win in Montana, but it won’t be easy.
Look—I’m not panicking, but I am sounding the alarm. A wave of outside money and attacks are about to flood into Montana. This will be the most important Senate election in the country, and it’s up to us to build a team strong enough to win.
Montana is a top battleground and could decide whether or not Democrats hold our narrow majority. That’s why I’m personally counting on you to make a donation today.
Split a donation of $25 or more between Seth Moulton and my campaign to help my team respond to future attacks and ensure we have the resources to reach voters and keep Mitch McConnell from taking back the Senate majority. [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/moulton-tester]
Donate [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/moulton-tester]
So much is on the line: building an economy that works for all of us, getting dark money out of politics, protecting a woman’s right to make her own health care decisions, and much more.
With your help, we can get it done.
Jon
Donate [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/moulton-tester]

name: VoteRef
subject: 15 states FAILED on this scorecard
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Voter Reference Foundation |
body:
Changes to election laws are causing voters to worry. And they have every reason to. | | | **THERE’S A SERIOUS PROBLEM WITH AMERICA’S ELECTIONS** Michele Bissonnette, Wareham, MA Town Clerk, recently retired due to concerns over elections. Recent **_[changes to state law](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=d42dba4b24d4451ab89e6b4630c9639d&_e=sQorGcBWbUw60Ri76GlmnJxTdxxPnoo9hvRSU3UirTOPVnxmMK9FjvIG57gPg5NlsM5ilIMpJGouLxAKYv-in_yw3Es2SB4VxHGt5BFaDfqk-an-7pJL80jr4jgzaStNV61uBilE68v8scCskvYb6eiPYGinGOIOqAMnPwBN3UHnTaSgFhqUahhZ84-Q5oYp4z7sgyltXoXG9gWRe8NklqoynCYZmHqjPI15DJNnwKJZc5GdVubZwxcFqLtYf8FbZTMgVoNi36bbF3UhLIa05FRVKnnxcqMdTYXXB6S5q9lZnCA9e7Wbq-iIYp2gjXO8ISb_CUKtGHGgqYb_dHqKo7cGbn1e2KLfy4crjBFB21k%3D)_** expanded early voting and made sending mail-in ballots easier for voters but _did not_ increase resources for town clerk offices. Because of this, Michele said she was worried about keeping our elections fair and accurate and no longer wanted to have a role in them. **_"I just don't believe in the system, the way it is." - Michele Bissonnette, Town Clerk_**
---
[**HELP US FIX THE PROBLEM**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=d42dba4b24d4451ab89e6b4630c9639d&_e=sQorGcBWbUw60Ri76GlmnJxTdxxPnoo9hvRSU3UirTOPVnxmMK9FjvIG57gPg5NlsM5ilIMpJGouLxAKYv-in_yw3Es2SB4VxHGt5BFaDfqk-an-7pJL80jr4jgzaStNV61uBilE68v8scCskvYb6eiPYGinGOIOqAMnPwBN3UHnTaSgFhqUahhZ84-Q5oYp4z7sgyltXoXG9gWRe8NklnXRpbvM5wrVCMnsXju4gfnZC_XHvK9QAtJF-Buz1K8QHN12PFvy4eCXurmIYfdFT2iP5l6UilZGv7yWh6kOtRDrcVIgXnnMS7H2v03GT3ZLhMTlGXdln3EXskPG9-lW5O-ScyTBIBsEQBGaGpNu634%3D)
---
| | Peter, American elections **DO** have a problem. It's not a conspiracy; it's a fact, and we can prove it...
---
[](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=d42dba4b24d4451ab89e6b4630c9639d&_e=sQorGcBWbUw60Ri76GlmnJxTdxxPnoo9hvRSU3UirTOPVnxmMK9FjvIG57gPg5NlsM5ilIMpJGouLxAKYv-in_yw3Es2SB4VxHGt5BFaDfqk-an-7pJL80jr4jgzaStNV61uBilE68v8scCskvYb6eiPYGinGOIOqAMnPwBN3UHnTaSgFhqUahhZ84-Q5oYp4z7sgyltXoXG9gWRe8NklvP8Z3OQ_DsYew3d3wKv-ZAnP_GtDFELMhDiTG_yrHzxXNZqgHdf_445aVWeYZY6F7LBqRiL_QUgKB7GKon8_hOSnAJ9CxF0MUmG-OM6fJQqLet8X-SURJeqYJycjolamlKBlj86_19PZP3zDnJMkMA%3D)
---
No games, no gimmicks; those are just the facts. And the facts point toward some major problems that need fixing if we are to restore confidence in the system. **Voter Reference Foundation is fighting RIGHT NOW to restore public oversight of our elections. Here's what that means:** **1\. UPDATING VOTER LISTS** The Motor Voter Act established that oversight of voter lists belongs to the public, but states have made it complicated and expensive to access the data. Because of this, the inaccuracies on these lists are growing fast. We are the first organization to collect, sort, and distribute the data to the public free of charge. _**[HELP US DO IT >>](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=d42dba4b24d4451ab89e6b4630c9639d&_e=sQorGcBWbUw60Ri76GlmnJxTdxxPnoo9hvRSU3UirTOPVnxmMK9FjvIG57gPg5NlsM5ilIMpJGouLxAKYv-in_yw3Es2SB4VxHGt5BFaDfqk-an-7pJL80jr4jgzaStNV61uBilE68v8scCskvYb6eiPYGinGOIOqAMnPwBN3UHnTaSgFhqUahhZ84-Q5oYp4z7sgyltXoXG9gWRe8Nklje9xJEHoBWLwZlPFjagLDr2vll3VJpaKG6ajxb8-Mv2PiMHYYwpUJwTAh8pnjXabplPsZQ3L_dQmIYoSSbQC8_kvYJoNCVnGYh5otTSWh0nPvnbSbOqSK-2QB50ZuFgjE98hw6jFvQe7HAFKjdyy7U%3D)**_ **2\. FIXING ISSUES WITH MAIL-IN BALLOTS** Our data shows that states nationwide are experiencing issues with mail-in ballots. Some get counted too late, some include potentially invalid signatures, and others allow unmonitored dropboxes, destroying voter confidence and leaving gaping holes in the security of our elections. **[HELP US FIGHT FOR CHANGE>>](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=d42dba4b24d4451ab89e6b4630c9639d&_e=sQorGcBWbUw60Ri76GlmnJxTdxxPnoo9hvRSU3UirTOPVnxmMK9FjvIG57gPg5NlsM5ilIMpJGouLxAKYv-in_yw3Es2SB4VxHGt5BFaDfqk-an-7pJL80jr4jgzaStNV61uBilE68v8scCskvYb6eiPYGinGOIOqAMnPwBN3UHnTaSgFhqUahhZ84-Q5oYp4z7sgyltXoXG9gWRe8NklpfYgvWDmqfFSEkKnyToPiZ5YfgUsRt365KhhsLbj-3NniIGW1Mic8iiJNc9AwIv-FgfbTapdnGqVz5U4-gKahxhaeRmvwPzwTbjt3pIijq59nRMauhjyrW76Zz1-yBvPICy-FCeh9_K_Vhy06KmK5E%3D)** **3\. IMPROVING OUR ELECTIONS PROCESS** We won't stop fighting until every election in America is fair, free, and transparent. _**[JOIN THE FIGHT >>](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=d42dba4b24d4451ab89e6b4630c9639d&_e=sQorGcBWbUw60Ri76GlmnJxTdxxPnoo9hvRSU3UirTOPVnxmMK9FjvIG57gPg5NlsM5ilIMpJGouLxAKYv-in_yw3Es2SB4VxHGt5BFaDfqk-an-7pJL80jr4jgzaStNV61uBilE68v8scCskvYb6eiPYGinGOIOqAMnPwBN3UHnTaSgFhqUahhZ84-Q5oYp4z7sgyltXoXG9gWRe8Nklso-LL_HRDJ6Hx8p3KU8tbxZ_HyUFUSuKvSWa7oQVXxSMFvDvxSwY5LmgRfj6cXaa20ohHbtYhcDfJwA8x4Lx76U7g8469Ihr67mOpb8j-ygieqMctwCau3wD7Jjn_Qe1dxm0i4DPzQrCyifMnZs8uc%3D)**_
---
[**CHIP IN TO SECURE OUR ELECTIONS**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=d42dba4b24d4451ab89e6b4630c9639d&_e=sQorGcBWbUw60Ri76GlmnJxTdxxPnoo9hvRSU3UirTOPVnxmMK9FjvIG57gPg5NlsM5ilIMpJGouLxAKYv-in_yw3Es2SB4VxHGt5BFaDfqk-an-7pJL80jr4jgzaStNV61uBilE68v8scCskvYb6eiPYGinGOIOqAMnPwBN3UHnTaSgFhqUahhZ84-Q5oYp4z7sgyltXoXG9gWRe8Nklj2LRkx_AD1Jv0zMzEpVt9Cl5MBx_VPHsvI5Sxuzv0pgdp165qreRNzRsSjXliAB5f3WB7zMmyW_B61uCMGWc43jgkdmnEUHVVEa_JKmDX0pMVvMRby_TOb_NbKwShu5VPsrJvIpkdzI82w1HU381I0%3D)

clean_body: Changes to election laws are causing voters to worry. And they have every reason to. | | | THERE’S A SERIOUS PROBLEM WITH AMERICA’S ELECTIONS Michele Bissonnette, Wareham, MA Town Clerk, recently retired due to concerns over elections. Recent expanded early voting and made sending mail-in ballots easier for voters but did not increase resources for town clerk offices. Because of this, Michele said she was worried about keeping our elections fair and accurate and no longer wanted to have a role in them. "I just don't believe in the system, the way it is." - Michele Bissonnette, Town Clerk | | Peter, American elections DO have a problem. It's not a conspiracy; it's a fact, and we can prove it... No games, no gimmicks; those are just the facts. And the facts point toward some major problems that need fixing if we are to restore confidence in the system. Voter Reference Foundation is fighting RIGHT NOW to restore public oversight of our elections. Here's what that means: 1\. UPDATING VOTER LISTS The Motor Voter Act established that oversight of voter lists belongs to the public, but states have made it complicated and expensive to access the data. Because of this, the inaccuracies on these lists are growing fast. We are the first organization to collect, sort, and distribute the data to the public free of charge. 2\. FIXING ISSUES WITH MAIL-IN BALLOTS Our data shows that states nationwide are experiencing issues with mail-in ballots. Some get counted too late, some include potentially invalid signatures, and others allow unmonitored dropboxes, destroying voter confidence and leaving gaping holes in the security of our elections. 3\. IMPROVING OUR ELECTIONS PROCESS We won't stop fighting until every election in America is fair, free, and transparent. Restoring the integrity of our elections is vital to ensuring our republic’s survival. We truly appreciate your support. Thank you, Voter Reference Foundation | | | . | | | | Paid for by Voter Reference Foundation | | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com | | |

body:
It’s Election Day, fellow activist, and I’m hard at work fostering our democracy.

[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/63376146/406560985/550347785?refcode=EM_FR_230516PrimaryDay_N_KK_90do_5_NG_B_LOGO&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjA0MDBmOWU4LTA5ZjQtZWQxMS05MDdjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=pzSTSJ8-F_3iiOcnVZo3CwXsgGygq5NLqKf4b6ySbd0=)
| Fellow activist,

I’m on the ground today educating and engaging voters alongside the incredible team you all have helped me build these last two years, but I wanted to take a moment to urge you to join us in fostering our democracy in whatever way you can.

Democracy doesn't just happen; it requires our active participation and cultivation.

Today’s elections are a vital part of this process. Judges and local elected officials have a HUGE impact on our everyday lives – sometimes more than federal ones. Building a government that truly serves us starts with voting for candidates who represent and reflect our communities.

And in Delaware County’s Special Election, the majority in the State House is again at stake, meaning **our freedom to vote and abortion access are also on the line today.** [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/63376147/406560987/550347785?refcode=EM_FR_230516PrimaryDay_N_KK_90do_5_NG_B_G1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjA0MDBmOWU4LTA5ZjQtZWQxMS05MDdjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=pzSTSJ8-F_3iiOcnVZo3CwXsgGygq5NLqKf4b6ySbd0=) The New Pennsylvania Project was honored to be joined this morning by Speaker of the Pennsylvania House and NPP Board Member, Rep. Joanna McClinton, at our Delaware County GOTV launch.

**[With all this on the line, and turnout threatening to repeat its historical low for elections like these, we need all the help we can get. Will you chip in $10 right now to help us get out the vote and strengthen our democracy?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/63376148/406560988/550347785?refcode=EM_FR_230516PrimaryDay_N_KK_90do_5_NG_B_L1&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjA0MDBmOWU4LTA5ZjQtZWQxMS05MDdjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=pzSTSJ8-F_3iiOcnVZo3CwXsgGygq5NLqKf4b6ySbd0=)** $50](https://click.everyaction.com/k/63376149/406560990/550347785?refcode=EM_FR_230516PrimaryDay_N_KK_90do_5_NG_B_EB50&express_lane=true&amount=50&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjA0MDBmOWU4LTA5ZjQtZWQxMS05MDdjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=pzSTSJ8-F_3iiOcnVZo3CwXsgGygq5NLqKf4b6ySbd0=) [REGISTER TWO VOTERS → $100](https://click.everyaction.com/k/63376150/406560992/550347785?refcode=EM_FR_230516PrimaryDay_N_KK_90do_5_NG_B_EB100&express_lane=true&amount=100&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjA0MDBmOWU4LTA5ZjQtZWQxMS05MDdjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=pzSTSJ8-F_3iiOcnVZo3CwXsgGygq5NLqKf4b6ySbd0=) [Whatever works for you](https://click.everyaction.com/k/63376152/406560995/550347785?refcode=EM_FR_230516PrimaryDay_N_KK_90do_5_NG_B_EBother&express_lane=true&amount=other&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjA0MDBmOWU4LTA5ZjQtZWQxMS05MDdjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=pzSTSJ8-F_3iiOcnVZo3CwXsgGygq5NLqKf4b6ySbd0=) In solidarity,

Kadida Kenner
_Chief Executive Officer
The New Pennsylvania Project_ [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/63376153/406560997/409185284?refcode=EM_FR_230516PrimaryDay_N_KK_90do_5_NG_B_Signoff&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjA0MDBmOWU4LTA5ZjQtZWQxMS05MDdjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=pzSTSJ8-F_3iiOcnVZo3CwXsgGygq5NLqKf4b6ySbd0=) | _The New Pennsylvania Project was founded in May 2021 to expand Pennsylvania’s electorate, so it reflects the Commonwealth’s demographically changing population. In the next four years, NPP will engage and empower young residents and those living in underrepresented immigrant communities and communities of color. We register communities to vote, provide civic education about the issues that matter in their neighborhoods, and mobilize Pennsylvanians to vote in every election._ _[**______**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/63376154/406560999/550347785?refcode=EM_FR_230516PrimaryDay_N_KK_90do_5_NG_B_BIO&amount=40&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjA0MDBmOWU4LTA5ZjQtZWQxMS05MDdjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=pzSTSJ8-F_3iiOcnVZo3CwXsgGygq5NLqKf4b6ySbd0=)**[DONATE MONTHLY](https://click.everyaction.com/k/63376155/406561000/550347785?refcode=EM_FR_230516PrimaryDay_N_KK_90do_5_NG_B_BIO&recurring=auto&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjA0MDBmOWU4LTA5ZjQtZWQxMS05MDdjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=pzSTSJ8-F_3iiOcnVZo3CwXsgGygq5NLqKf4b6ySbd0=)**_

clean_body: It’s Election Day, fellow activist, and I’m hard at work fostering our democracy. = | Fellow activist, I’m on the ground today educating and engaging voters alongside the incredible team you all have helped me build these last two years, but I wanted to take a moment to urge you to join us in fostering our democracy in whatever way you can. Democracy doesn't just happen; it requires our active participation and cultivation. Today’s elections are a vital part of this process. Judges and local elected officials have a HUGE impact on our everyday lives – sometimes more than federal ones. Building a government that truly serves us starts with voting for candidates who represent and reflect our communities. And in Delaware County’s Special Election, the majority in the State House is again at stake, meaning our freedom to vote and abortion access are also on the line today. = The New Pennsylvania Project was honored to be joined this morning by Speaker of the Pennsylvania House and NPP Board Member, Rep. Joanna McClinton, at our Delaware County GOTV launch. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. = = = = PS: Don’t forget to vote and encourage your friends, family, and community to do the same. In solidarity, Kadida Kenner Chief Executive Officer The New Pennsylvania Project = | The New Pennsylvania Project was founded in May 2021 to expand Pennsylvania’s electorate, so it reflects the Commonwealth’s demographically changing population. In the next four years, NPP will engage and empower young residents and those living in underrepresented immigrant communities and communities of color. We register communities to vote, provide civic education about the issues that matter in their neighborhoods, and mobilize Pennsylvanians to vote in every election. = PA ELECTION DATES : Municipal/Local/Judicial Primary: May 16, 2023 Municipal/Local/Judicial Election: November 7, 2023 Last day to : October 23, 2023 Last day to : October 31, 2023 || || || New Pennsylvania Project PO Box 443 West Chester, PA 19381 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please. to receive fewer emails from us. to stop receiving any fundraising emails from us. name: Rick Larsen
subject: Good news for us, bad news for climate change.
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Citizens to Elect Rick Larsen
body:
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63376485/406563831/-201694504?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ODczNDUxMi0wYmY0LWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nMiKqnM2LPeJ1Kk8pSP3Zp_-vpHn0WRr7ozrxHx45Ls=&emci=5f19757f-0cf1-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=68734512-0bf4-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=9494239)

| | Protecting our environment from the effects of climate change is one of my highest priorities in Congress. And today I am proud to announce new efforts to combat climate change right here in Washington's Second Congressional District. NOAA has recommended**more than $37 million in spending to restore wildlife habitats throughout Northwest Washington, build climate resilience in underserved communities, and protect and restore tidal marsh in Padilla Bay.** **These investments will include restoration of 1200 acres** in South Whidbey Basin in the Puget Sound. This will restore the three biggest salmon producing rivers and nearly 70 percent of its remaining tidal wetlands. **Additionally these restoration projects will increase fish habitats in tribal communities.** Work in Padilla Bay will help to **restore and protect 74.5 acres of former and current tidal marsh**. The investment in this area will help prevent flooding for roadways that are the only utility corridor for the Samish Island community. These historic investments are a great step in the right direction. I am committed to improving our infrastructure, restoring our environment, and combating the growing risks of climate change. Our coalition is about mobilizing grassroots supporters to keep up the fight for these critical climate change investments. **[Can you pitch in $7 today and help us mobilize the grassroots to combat climate change and invest in our future?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63376486/406563833/1596212816?refcode=2023-05-16-environment&recurring=0&amount=7&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=68734512-0bf4-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ODczNDUxMi0wYmY0LWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nMiKqnM2LPeJ1Kk8pSP3Zp_-vpHn0WRr7ozrxHx45Ls=)** | | Our movement is growing! **The American people know that there is something rotten on Capitol Hill — that members are writing legislation while thinking of their stock portfolios;** that members are buying stocks with information the public doesn't have. It's wrong. We need to end it. And we have a growing coalition to make that happen. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63376758/406564413/1812292949?refcode=2023-05-16-stockbanarticle2&recurring=0&amount=17&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=6c734512-0bf4-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTMyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YzczNDUxMi0wYmY0LWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cSpOob0tdL90CuNmBLC8CWBEn3j-l1Dkw3Ca2x8Luf4=) **[Read Article Now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63376760/406564417/1812292949?refcode=2023-05-16-stockbanarticle2&recurring=0&amount=17&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=6c734512-0bf4-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTMyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YzczNDUxMi0wYmY0LWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cSpOob0tdL90CuNmBLC8CWBEn3j-l1Dkw3Ca2x8Luf4=)** When I worked to ban Congressional stock trading in the past, I was met with indifference from many of my colleagues, and downright stonewalling from others, but this time is different. Today, there is an appetite to make a change —**to ensure that this kind of conflict of interest is gone forever.** The actions we are taking today are not possible without our grassroots movement. We need to grow our movement every day if we want to root out corruption. clean_body: | | | | Our movement is growing! The American people know that there is something rotten on Capitol Hill — that members are writing legislation while thinking of their stock portfolios; that members are buying stocks with information the public doesn't have. It's wrong. We need to end it. And we have a growing coalition to make that happen. = = When I worked to ban Congressional stock trading in the past, I was met with indifference from many of my colleagues, and downright stonewalling from others, but this time is different. Today, there is an appetite to make a change —to ensure that this kind of conflict of interest is gone forever. The actions we are taking today are not possible without our grassroots movement. We need to grow our movement every day if we want to root out corruption. After all, grassroots donations make it possible for those of us who reject corporate PAC money to power our campaigns. = Onward! name: =?UTF-8?B?SGlsbHNkYWxlIENvbGxlZ2UgdmlhIOKYhkNJ?=
subject: Ancient Christianity: a new free course from Hillsdale
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vsp-fXcDcN

I've always been fascinated by the story of the earliest
Christians.

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/osp-fXcDcN

Please see a special message from our
sponsor:

Dear
Friend,

I've
always been fascinated by the story of the earliest Christians.

I wanted
to learn more about how they worshipped and prayed, faced
persecution and hardship, and settled theological disputes.

But,
beyond reading the New Testament and some of the stories of early
Christian martyrs, it was daunting to figure out how to proceed.
I always got lost in foreign names and locations and the
complicated history of Imperial Rome. The result was a large gap
in my understanding of how the Christian faith took shape and
spread from the apostles through the age of Constantine.

To
uncover this fascinating history, we've produced our newest
online course, "Ancient Christianity," which we'll release on May
23.

In this
course, Professor Kenneth Calvert is your guide through the first
four centuries of Christianity as he explains the remarkable ways
the new faith transformed the Roman world.

You can
watch the video trailer for the course and preregister today
using the secure link below:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61809185:sp-fXcDcN:m:3:2532013465:B26EEDB0723ABEBFEE479A5BB8BE9916:r

I hope
you join us in learning more about the courage and faith of the
first Christians.

Best
regards,

Kyle
Murnen, '09
Director
of Online Learning
Hillsdale
College

body:
I've always been fascinated by the story of the earliest Christians.

| This sponsored message from Conservative Liberty Wire is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=91a8b83c50774b1ebb63a4ab970c94d8&_e=91w0OkOplAmPhKRukocgv9cWPxtNCpXmpH_G-_foS5BqUU0yT7YsVQXP607VKaFbF8awA0RSF0BBtdDFIYWLfFSInci3KGmuACA2kZckYEHoYOsy-zopnt7ygxb1LI6lM854bJEzJdssYkZSv3BJQLrddwb15y64FfhVGOXSFxX_SQqFQRHoNSa_5CLEuiVo38jcFISo61Ht8TbuLu0ezggB7C-NlLKNlhKh1YCO8_66vRc3aG5H8Lm9wdc8NTlEgn7jGDAlN2asHQVZDiyNZPfSe2vqXa4mE6oigX_R8sS9dT4r8tS9DElz1EpPH0yjXYs42sxgGcSUH7T8TqqjQI_iAIV6dvl9ejHM9tgIMrjhJK3iQJLob7HhFCH9tBW6Gf4nYSI0jDVD_aNHRoUj5ri6BxgxDNk8EpJgd2NEiDI%3D)

| | Dear Friend,

I've always been fascinated by the story of the earliest Christians.

I wanted to learn more about how they worshipped and prayed, faced persecution and hardship, and settled theological disputes.

But, beyond reading the New Testament and some of the stories of early Christian martyrs, it was daunting to figure out how to proceed. I always got lost in foreign names and locations and the complicated history of Imperial Rome. The result was a large gap in my understanding of how the Christian faith took shape and spread from the apostles through the age of Constantine.

To uncover this fascinating history, we've produced our newest online course, "Ancient Christianity," which we'll release on May 23.

In this course, Professor Kenneth Calvert is your guide through the first four centuries of Christianity as he explains the remarkable ways the new faith transformed the Roman world.

**You can watch the video trailer for the course and preregister today using the secure link below:**

clean_body: I've always been fascinated by the story of the earliest Christians. | This sponsored message from Conservative Liberty Wire is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | | | Dear Friend, I've always been fascinated by the story of the earliest Christians. I wanted to learn more about how they worshipped and prayed, faced persecution and hardship, and settled theological disputes. But, beyond reading the New Testament and some of the stories of early Christian martyrs, it was daunting to figure out how to proceed. I always got lost in foreign names and locations and the complicated history of Imperial Rome. The result was a large gap in my understanding of how the Christian faith took shape and spread from the apostles through the age of Constantine. To uncover this fascinating history, we've produced our newest online course, "Ancient Christianity," which we'll release on May 23. In this course, Professor Kenneth Calvert is your guide through the first four centuries of Christianity as he explains the remarkable ways the new faith transformed the Roman world. You can watch the video trailer for the course and preregister today using the secure link below: I hope you join us in learning more about the courage and faith of the first Christians. Best regards, Kyle Murnen, '09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College | | Conservative Liberty Wire 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 | _

I’m a 4th generation Texan, born and raised in Dallas by a single mom. My mom was a public school teacher and sometimes worked two jobs to make ends meet. Thanks to my family and a strong support system of teachers, coaches, and the good folks at the YMCA, I earned a full ride football scholarship to Baylor University and then went on to play in the NFL.

But playing football was never my only dream – from a young age I knew I wanted to help people. So I became a civil rights attorney to defend what I believe is our most fundamental right: the right to vote. I proudly served in President Obama’s administration before I came home to Dallas, where I’m now raising my family.

I ran for Congress because I wanted more kids in North Texas to have the opportunity to achieve their version of the American dream and protect the fundamental values of our democracy – and I beat the odds to defeat an 11-term Republican incumbent, helping Democrats flip the House blue in 2018.

_Now, I’m ready for my next challenge:__taking on Ted Cruz._ I know it won’t be easy, but I also know that Texans deserve so much better than Ted Cruz’s cynical partisan politics. Everything Ted Cruz does is for Ted Cruz – when I’m in the Senate, everything I do will be to help people like you. But I can’t get there alone:
**[That’s why I’m asking you to chip in right now to become a founding donor of my campaign on day one. We’re going to need an unprecedented grassroots movement to unseat Ted Cruz and I’m counting on you to be a part of it. Please, split $15 or whatever you can spare between my campaign and American Bridge PAC to help win in Texas, defeat Ted Cruz and defend our Democratic Senate majority →](https://click.everyaction.com/k/63377586/406566844/1711913910?&amounts=15,25,50,100,250&amount=15&refcode=jtk2598-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Nzc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjliMGUxY2M5LTBiZjQtZWQxMS05MDdjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=MGvl0xskEAmJwLBrmGkIDE-QIxkpnt3r2ILXOkFNym8=)**
Thank you so much for helping me launch this campaign. We have a long way to go, but together, I know we’ve got what it takes to win this thing.

Let’s do this,

Colin Allred

name: VoteVets
subject: The PACT Act is a risk
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS, VOTEVETS
body:
Republicans in Congress just proposed that we throw the guarantees we made to Veterans in the garbage.
#
[](https://act.votevets.org/signup/230516_vv_em_pact/?source=em230516-1-15?refcode2=8946.3013755.6upfr0&akid=8946%2E3013755%2E6upfr0)
They wrap themselves in the flag. They wear their America First shirts. They’re patriots, the pro-Veteran party. Don’t you forget it.
And now, Republicans in the House just put up a plan to undermine health care for the men and women that served our country — slashing funding in the PACT Act’s Toxic Exposure Fund by $14.7 billion.
We fought for YEARS to get coverage for Veterans suffering after exposure to toxic burn pits, and last year we got those benefits signed into law.
Republicans in Congress just proposed that we throw the guarantees we made to those Veterans in the garbage.
It’s like Jon Stewart said: “They don’t support the troops, they just support the war machine.”
We need every person reading this email to tell the GOP that we will not let them break the promises we made to our Vets.
**[Add your name, and help us protect the PACT Act. This is important, so don’t delay. Do it now.](https://act.votevets.org/signup/230516_vv_em_pact/?source=em230516-1-15?refcode2=8946.3013755.6upfr0&akid=8946%2E3013755%2E6upfr0)**

---

The team at VoteVets

name: Kash Patel
subject: BREAKING - J6 Choir tops music charts
body:
Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

[](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=49db1a7f44c0427584af705e27f11739&_e=xPQ2CYc94DCyYyhxlHVBjY_OdsGhAE5scS-hd_wwjkPk6xh8QWumotET8D7jw3c8D_sn8z1bj0C2U8L-iC15P6VC7M2omx3Fu-ar7-zu6-YSdix3YtUkipsO_TiWPJSFvGMM9JuMd2LzLa2uFtB26SPKT5aDanwR4a_vQC2VRfI5olteu597XLsyoACXdl_HM0HNUZdSLWC7eMr7lv-97MbRWojdIr2nM-TBEu-jd37Ark-gUvzpJersCwgz9XwkR3PR_dtPNfNvSOtJu9iFxA%3D%3D)

Friend,

Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

**They sing the national anthem.**

And they have sung this song proudly every night for _more than 700 straight nights_. This song is more than just a sign of their patriotism. It's an exercise in their freedom of speech, even from the depths of the D.C. gulag.

We captured that audio and had the greatest President, Donald J. Trump, recite the Pledge of Allegiance. Then we combined those recordings to create a song you need to hear. All net proceeds from the song go to certain Jan 6 families in need.

**The song, Justice for All, is number 1 on the Billboard Digital Charts!**

[](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=49db1a7f44c0427584af705e27f11739&_e=xPQ2CYc94DCyYyhxlHVBjY_OdsGhAE5scS-hd_wwjkPk6xh8QWumotET8D7jw3c8D_sn8z1bj0C2U8L-iC15P6VC7M2omx3Fu-ar7-zu6-YSdix3YtUkipsO_TiWPJSFwpt5qwci-DjMzO4KbaUCUhN8or3VLflm1hZ_4lUJGKDJ4gqZAyrVGR5fpLMuG5CF6n1sVPaHZA_LwReRf3NF-7nPB1tqyS5PXeIOHqpY7MR52KjbLJxvaW7kL_U5pz7YG5OFuC97BY9QZu-7uAwLUw%3D%3D)

[_**Please listen to this song and support our efforts to provide legal resources to some Jan 6 families. **_](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=49db1a7f44c0427584af705e27f11739&_e=xPQ2CYc94DCyYyhxlHVBjY_OdsGhAE5scS-hd_wwjkPk6xh8QWumotET8D7jw3c8D_sn8z1bj0C2U8L-iC15P6VC7M2omx3Fu-ar7-zu6-YSdix3YtUkipsO_TiWPJSF3icw70CpPI9-Ug0mvU_gbG0qWHWt0D8znYmaJnlvh5iUJb--dFV3zhZE4PAGLpcnpLpowF3lZBQmrro5ACywUvA22ADsNM7wP5StHfQI6smMyhNzNx0T5uVbcj89nEZ1BVZcJ2nDwsHdPvmpxyiOew%3D%3D)

We all know the plight of the Jan 6th detainees and their families. Due process has been destroyed for so many of them.

But, with your help, I know we will get justice for them.

Instead of violence, we saw many patriots standing around, talking to police officers, and taking photos of the Capitol grounds. There was no _" deadly insurrection."_ **The video evidence proves it for many!** This is evidence they and their families could have used last year or the year before.

It's time to act and help to support these families.

My goal is to reach 1,000 new donors in the next 48 hours to fund their legal battles in court. **Will you stand up and help Jan 6 families?**

**Click below to show your support today!**

**Support the January 6th Families**

**Email:** dpwillis67@gmail.com
**Donor Status: MISSING
Goal: **1,000 Donors

[** _Donate Now >>_**](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=49db1a7f44c0427584af705e27f11739&_e=xPQ2CYc94DCyYyhxlHVBjY_OdsGhAE5scS-hd_wwjkPk6xh8QWumotET8D7jw3c8D_sn8z1bj0C2U8L-iC15P6VC7M2omx3Fu-ar7-zu6-YSdix3YtUkipsO_TiWPJSF-qo3pdEjm7sT8mTUUs15tXplOeqS7XplDUGfkW8dtlnliLBn0hGXxoa1pxfHXaipFMKPGPvjCQHvkLONe7SCLlk5_bdQ93V8nQn2eMS_FOhnk2n_y-8oRvEPvci4C5zZtyDvyU2Ge1ub8f046eIocg%3D%3D)

**I launched the _Kash Foundation_ to offer legal help to America First families like the ones from the Jan 6th witch hunts. **

I know what it's like. I've been the target of the government gangsters in the Department of Justice myself.

**Friend, I 'm humbly asking you to help us get justice for the Jan 6th detainees and set them free. **

[_**Will you be one of the 1,000 patriots brave enough to fight for some of the Jan 6th detainees and their families? You can show your support by donating $10, $25, $50, or even $100 today. Click here to step up >>>**_](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=49db1a7f44c0427584af705e27f11739&_e=xPQ2CYc94DCyYyhxlHVBjY_OdsGhAE5scS-hd_wwjkPk6xh8QWumotET8D7jw3c8D_sn8z1bj0C2U8L-iC15P6VC7M2omx3Fu-ar7-zu6-YSdix3YtUkipsO_TiWPJSFjVtyARO221sj3POHebOysyKZteWOk__ZwnlRmZQSsRQBiiDGv-GWm5ssqLF1jDIPhgQo2ujQe9e5BFZCPbUR7QkCUZPDlkOSBKtADhpQQ1CUWSbiXyOx_SHgui035XRjE5G4KkKf6KZDQpnn59Vw0Q%3D%3D)

clean_body: Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells? Friend, Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells? They sing the national anthem. And they have sung this song proudly every night for more than 700 straight nights. This song is more than just a sign of their patriotism. It's an exercise in their freedom of speech, even from the depths of the D.C. gulag. We captured that audio and had the greatest President, Donald J. Trump, recite the Pledge of Allegiance. Then we combined those recordings to create a song you need to hear. All net proceeds from the song go to certain Jan 6 families in need. The song, Justice for All, is number 1 on the Billboard Digital Charts! We all know the plight of the Jan 6th detainees and their families. Due process has been destroyed for so many of them. But, with your help, I know we will get justice for them. Instead of violence, we saw many patriots standing around, talking to police officers, and taking photos of the Capitol grounds. There was no " deadly insurrection." The video evidence proves it for many! This is evidence they and their families could have used last year or the year before. It's time to act and help to support these families. My goal is to reach 1,000 new donors in the next 48 hours to fund their legal battles in court. Will you stand up and help Jan 6 families? Click below to show your support today! Support the January 6th Families Email: dpwillis67@gmail.com Donor Status: MISSING Goal: 1,000 Donors I launched the Kash Foundation to offer legal help to America First families like the ones from the Jan 6th witch hunts. I know what it's like. I've been the target of the government gangsters in the Department of Justice myself. I led the Russiagate investigation for the House Committee and uncovered that the FBI was actively trying to sabotage President Trump. The FBI used innocent protestors to push their agenda. Now they are doing everything they can to hide any evidence that they tried to provoke the protesters. As the former head of counterterrorism and former senior aide to President Trump, I will do everything in my power to help out. Friend, I 'm humbly asking you to help us get justice for the Jan 6th detainees and set them free. Please hurry. And as moving as it is to hear them sing every night from their prison cells, it will sound so much sweeter when they can sing our national anthem underneath the stars with their freedom restored. For Freedom, Kash Patel The Kash Foundation is a 501(c)(3) nonprofit. All donations are tax-deductible. Full Mag News 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 |

A man used to be able to work a blue-collar job and feed and provide for his family, but those days are gone— now we have men who aren't even _looking_ for work. | Friend
In honor of National Police Week, we as a country need to recognize the sacrifices police officers make in order to protect the communities we live in.
They are the first line of defense against criminals, and they are willing to put their lives on the line to ensure we are kept safe and sound.
Yet, despite their duty, they have come under attack by the Radical Left. Across the country, dozens of radical city councils have slashed police funding, lowered recruitment numbers, and made it harder for our police to do their jobs, and criminals are taking advantage....

| | | Progressive radical and "Squad" member Rashida Tlaib just tried to host an anti-semitic event decrying the 1948 founding of Israel as a "catastrophe".

**So, I just CANCELED her event, and will instead throw a commemoration of Israel 's 75th anniversary.**

Let me be clear: I will not stand for the Squad's anti-semitism.

* Adam Schiff's abuse of his position on the Intel Committee to LIE in pursuit of President Trump proves his inability to put national security and integrity over partisan games.
* Eric Swalwell's relationship with a Chinese spy is quite literally the definition of jeopardizing national security, which is why the FBI briefed me on the matter.
* And Ilhan Omar's openly anti-semitic statements and stance directly imperil our alliance with our #1 ally in the Middle East: Israel.

Now, Rashida Tlaib is DOUBLING DOWN on bringing HATE to the halls of Congress...

I promised I'd restore accountability to your government. Now I am delivering, and the Democrats are FURIOUS.
