name: Defend the Constitution
subject: Ancient Christianity: a new free course from Hillsdale
body:
I've always been fascinated by the story of the earliest Christians.

| This sponsored message from Defend the Constitution is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=cf04241491ac4f3b98946455debf1019&_e=9uCXl-ByYmc92cqCUcHthIxjDu2RL4nFOw3XbvHwhSEU5GlkzMOnenwYEK1k6vpjzZcWULW4nrPEedxZVZ95J7HacCI_6ktMgUTfeVTU21Md5vgIpqu74jXUIg0Xy0NtkX8lSY26DgtE5bojHSWeuk3_bjpfLcgSLByCHKpmU3oRMZF55QMeNE2eEE7lm9MiKmpdLiDa9o16Vz6qVlagC_lPuhzJEgvfzk3-eYqorT9qyyzkZBh544wPtspfZKrmqyMHrWSwzz6loqjTno5FZ9be9J3SETO1drwc-2d7JeQwOnD2YwvO7kGRd59k_LttowmOwqmV8Du3s7NTaIh5JMG3j66kwZjEOPHuh7LwBvxORYWsOM1p36EKN-5vu85F5476PcR_dmypZ3sjzEwzKB-761JMUK1pi5y3cfjLmEM%3D)
---
| | Dear Friend,

I've always been fascinated by the story of the earliest Christians.

I wanted to learn more about how they worshipped and prayed, faced persecution and hardship, and settled theological disputes.

But, beyond reading the New Testament and some of the stories of early Christian martyrs, it was daunting to figure out how to proceed. I always got lost in foreign names and locations and the complicated history of Imperial Rome. The result was a large gap in my understanding of how the Christian faith took shape and spread from the apostles through the age of Constantine.

To uncover this fascinating history, we've produced our newest online course, "Ancient Christianity," which we'll release on May 23.

In this course, Professor Kenneth Calvert is your guide through the first four centuries of Christianity as he explains the remarkable ways the new faith transformed the Roman world.

**You can watch the video trailer for the course and preregister today using the secure link below:**

**[https://online.hillsdale.edu/landing/ancient-christianity/prereg](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=cf04241491ac4f3b98946455debf1019&_e=9uCXl-ByYmc92cqCUcHthIxjDu2RL4nFOw3XbvHwhSEU5GlkzMOnenwYEK1k6vpjzZcWULW4nrPEedxZVZ95J7HacCI_6ktMgUTfeVTU21Md5vgIpqu74jXUIg0Xy0NtkX8lSY26DgtE5bojHSWeuk3_bjpfLcgSLByCHKpmU3oRMZF55QMeNE2eEE7lm9MiKmpdLiDa9o16Vz6qVlagC_lPuhzJEgvfzk3-eYqorT9qyyzkZBh544wPtspfZKrmqyMHrWSwzz6loqjTno5FZ9GBNUKhbbjuaWKD1dkpcMecGF5WTnMtgOomxRY6AN87z5C7sffgSzT0iOu4TgHISUi2C9wHAKz_tJp5nip-GdXeh8VXooDTKAFkT6lO8VCwyfiO38USz8RMwpJKw5RjjcpF-J8y-sByMJ_L3RsBCU0%3D)**
I hope you join us in learning more about the courage and faith of the first Christians.

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

Defend the Constitution
---

I wanted to learn more about how they worshipped and prayed, faced persecution and hardship, and settled theological disputes. But, beyond reading the New Testament and some of the stories of early Christian martyrs, it was daunting to figure out how to proceed. I always got lost in foreign names and locations and the complicated history of Imperial Rome. The result was a large gap in my understanding of how the Christian faith took shape and spread from the apostles through the age of Constantine. To uncover this fascinating history, we've produced our newest online course, "Ancient Christianity," which we'll release on May 23. In this course, Professor Kenneth Calvert is your guide through the first four centuries of Christianity as he explains the remarkable ways the new faith transformed the Roman world. You can watch the video trailer for the course and preregister today using the secure link below: I hope you join us in learning more about the courage and faith of the first Christians. Best regards, Kyle Murnen, '09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College | | Defend the Constitution 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 | _

| | Peter,

| TODAY, our fellow conservatives at Nebraskans for Founders' Values are organizing a prayerful presence at the State Capitol in SUPPORT of Senator Kauth and LB574. We are inviting you to come on down and join us.

Here's what you need to know:

**Where?** Capitol Rotunda
**When?** Today, from 3pm - 5pm
**Additional Activity** \- Jericho Prayer walk begins at 5:15pm.

Later tonight, LB 574 will be in the spotlight on the Senate floor at 7pm, with a vote likely around 9pm.
{We expect a big crowd from the other side, so every friendly face counts!}

Once the prayer and presence wraps up, Nebraskans for Founders' Values is leading a Prayer Walk around the Capitol at 5:15pm. Whether you've been at the Rotunda in prayer or you're just able to make it for the walk, we'd appreciate seeing you there. Meet us at the southeast corner of the capitol square (16th & H Street).

See you soon,

Dawn Liphardt

name: Team Fetterman
subject: Polls are OPEN
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
PA's primary and special elections are happening today.
#
Hey Derek, it's Tuesday, May 16th -- Election Day for the state of Pennsylvania.
**PA judicial, municipal, and some state special elections are happening TODAY.** An open state Supreme Court seat is up for a primary election, two special state House races are being contested, and worryingly, some election deniers are running for key county-level offices.
Now's the time to make sure our team turns out to vote. **[Polls are open today from 7:00 AM ET through 8:00 PM ET. If you haven't already, will you make a plan to vote by finding your voting location now?](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/18244?t=1&akid=8377%2E434096%2E1Do91o)**
**[Voting Locator »](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/18244?t=2&akid=8377%2E434096%2E1Do91o)**
Derek, change doesn't just come from elections for the White House or the U.S. Senate. At the local level, making our voices heard can be just as impactful, if not more so.
It's urgent that we get out the vote before the polls close -- so do you know where you're voting today, if you haven't already? **[Make a plan to vote before polls close at 8:00 PM ET at this link.](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/18244?t=3&akid=8377%2E434096%2E1Do91o)**
THANK YOU for making an impact at every level -- and see you at the polls!! 🗳️🗳️🗳️
– Team Fetterman 💛

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20230516-8377-footer&t=4&refcode2=8377_434096_1Do91o&akid=8377%2E434096%2E1Do91o)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=5&akid=8377%2E434096%2E1Do91o)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=6&akid=8377%2E434096%2E1Do91o)

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.

name: Taking the Hill
subject: Continuing the Winning Streak
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Taking The Hill PAC
body:
Friend -

Every day in America, we see a growing divide. Partisan politics continue to push us apart during a time where we need to pull closer together. With each election cycle, we see louder, more strident voices coming to the forefront, threatening progress with performative roadblocks.

What's the solution? Putting a new generation of Veterans into elected office.

In the melting pot of the Armed Forces, men and women of different backgrounds and belief systems come together in service of their country, and work as a team to accomplish the mission of keeping our country safe. They work through their problems and disagreements to accomplish the mission - because the alternative is unthinkable.

Through your support of the TTH PAC, you've helped put these talented and dedicated Veterans into office.

Veterans like Wes Moore, a combat veteran of the Army's 82nd Airborne Division and successful business leader who became Maryland's first Black governor.

Veterans like Mikie Sherrill, the Naval Academy graduate and helicopter pilot elected to the House from her home state of New Jersey.

Veterans like Pat Ryan, the West Point graduate who is now representing his alma mater's Hudson Valley, NY, district in Congress.

These are the Veterans we've helped in the last election cycle - and we need your support to assist those who step up - **[will you help](https://act.myngp.com/el/81mI8ffMI0MTELxXuw-IsZO9F83yR42YQMP2RVpjNNA=/ni8KHc_9Jq0UDFggdTt3y7rauGjRIshOD2GR0p_tv98=)**?

[**https://secure.actblue.com/donate/taking-the-hill-pac-2**](https://act.myngp.com/el/81mI8ffMI0MTELxXuw-IsZO9F83yR42YQMP2RVpjNNA=/ni8KHc_9Jq0UDFggdTt3y7rauGjRIshOD2GR0p_tv98=)

Yours in the fight,

Taking the Hill

Paid for by Taking The Hill PAC
---
Taking The Hill PAC
PO Box 2134
Bristol PA 19007 United States

name: Freedom Nation Today
subject: Study Ancient Christianity
body:
I've always been fascinated by the story of the earliest Christians.

This sponsored message from Freedom Nation Today is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | | [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d767d7273aa548dd81c8e2db7700923d&_e=RApvq-H8cqkB1daqQbWS4j-NG95WvVLuzmzzRtGLt97H-qXbu0nYCJ_kwB4rsR4ZuRixi1daHYDJGLNO4iYQMqP_sjliQKeqyqE8b3kbc5XNjQ1h_kzV76k8fmAvmz75iFQxnN2sP6tH1vjCQZ-X4gpG9ORPOuJVYwo_8Svs1HSl_qbcCwS5ufoNEM31-qd_zSj5Txp8HgwWGn3UAEb6DJW9rTfmVGpFh1L1tED0l2RYQbDN8A7gvjdCkz2YNWd8U3pDky83OnuDw2Je0rRE0OFL7kW-TWGaWjwMcot6XDh5c7wQGTzRB3fropqVdgTWN7zUc64FNuKUeiFAONIw2my7QXA_N3Uc3HayvmqQ_O_pYc4bda3vVuhSYB5w78bw1z9X6iGpHmisUmNfT3UgfO4CjlP50nCDxiAmpWVbXlgcVbQS0BHzqveTt21yrlFr)
---
| | Dear Friend,

I've always been fascinated by the story of the earliest Christians.

I wanted to learn more about how they worshipped and prayed, faced persecution and hardship, and settled theological disputes.

But, beyond reading the New Testament and some of the stories of early Christian martyrs, it was daunting to figure out how to proceed. I always got lost in foreign names and locations and the complicated history of Imperial Rome. The result was a large gap in my understanding of how the Christian faith took shape and spread from the apostles through the age of Constantine.

To uncover this fascinating history, we've produced our newest online course, "Ancient Christianity," which we'll release on May 23.

In this course, Professor Kenneth Calvert is your guide through the first four centuries of Christianity as he explains the remarkable ways the new faith transformed the Roman world.

**You can watch the video trailer for the course and preregister today using the secure link below:

** [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d767d7273aa548dd81c8e2db7700923d&_e=RApvq-H8cqkB1daqQbWS4j-NG95WvVLuzmzzRtGLt97H-qXbu0nYCJ_kwB4rsR4ZuRixi1daHYDJGLNO4iYQMqP_sjliQKeqyqE8b3kbc5XNjQ1h_kzV76k8fmAvmz75iFQxnN2sP6tH1vjCQZ-X4gpG9ORPOuJVYwo_8Svs1HSl_qbcCwS5ufoNEM31-qd_zSj5Txp8HgwWGn3UAEb6DJW9rTfmVGpFh1L1tED0l2RYQbDN8A7gvjdCkz2YNWd8U3pDky83OnuDw2Je0rRE0IpaIfRtG7CNsopeHea4kPf3yPALanOLuDUrfLYm5dfRYs0YfB0obPl8Qyf1O0v8Cb2xNqDOwUvXiVoegPHS2XImB-L47cSzUh1JJ8JUem8PLNfAzGBzDsej1eW8raVCtYIoq-eAPFEGyVR3J6LWc14bF1YDj58LoVpzJe2joKft)

clean_body: I've always been fascinated by the story of the earliest Christians. This sponsored message from Freedom Nation Today is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | | | | Dear Friend, I've always been fascinated by the story of the earliest Christians. I wanted to learn more about how they worshipped and prayed, faced persecution and hardship, and settled theological disputes. But, beyond reading the New Testament and some of the stories of early Christian martyrs, it was daunting to figure out how to proceed. I always got lost in foreign names and locations and the complicated history of Imperial Rome. The result was a large gap in my understanding of how the Christian faith took shape and spread from the apostles through the age of Constantine. To uncover this fascinating history, we've produced our newest online course, "Ancient Christianity," which we'll release on May 23. In this course, Professor Kenneth Calvert is your guide through the first four centuries of Christianity as he explains the remarkable ways the new faith transformed the Roman world. You can watch the video trailer for the course and preregister today using the secure link below: I hope you join us in learning more about the courage and faith of the first Christians. Best regards, Kyle Murnen, '09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College | | Freedom Nation Today 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 | _

Hey there, I wanted to make sure you got my team’s message. As you may have already seen, extremist Washington Republicans just launched a massive, misleading ad campaign against me.
| Hey there, I wanted to make sure you got my team’s message. As you may have already seen, extremist Washington Republicans just launched a massive, misleading ad campaign against me.

**But here’s what the attack ad fails to mention: The GOP is pushing a reckless and radical agenda in Washington. **They are holding our economy hostage as they push for dangerous cuts to Social Security, Medicare, veterans’ benefits, food assistance programs, cancer research, and more. Our working families cannot afford for them to succeed, and I am proud to be holding the line against these cruel policies.

Look, this ad campaign is nothing but a deceitful and desperate attempt to distract from the GOP’s true extremist agenda. It’s never been more important to set the record straight.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63380793/406578738/1120393829?refcode=em-wrapper&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MGM4MmE0MS0xNGY0LWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cCxZzjVxt3WY1smarHyfCH1pPv673zzpyJG6Vc5UfgQ=&emci=8bc82a41-14f4-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=90c82a41-14f4-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=6830379)
Peter,

Today the Texas Senate will hold a final vote on H.B. 2127, which would wipe out virtually all local Texas laws that protect workers and renters.

_**This is one of the most dangerous laws being voted on in Texas, but there’s been little media coverage.**_ Let me explain what’s going on.

This bill would undo and block water breaks protections for workers, fair chance hiring rules, paid sick days, eviction protections, tenants’ right to organize, and so much more.

This bill would end ALL of those protections and would ban them in the future. It would trample on the rights of workers and the rights of local towns and cities to protect residents.

[**Can you chip in $20, or whatever you can, to support Team Casar as we fight for workers rights and push back on disastrous bills like H.B. 2127?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63380794/406578739/-569515757?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MGM4MmE0MS0xNGY0LWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cCxZzjVxt3WY1smarHyfCH1pPv673zzpyJG6Vc5UfgQ=)

---
Peter, Greg Abbott and his far-right allies in the legislature are on a power trip.

For years they have failed to pass legislation to protect workers, hold big corporations accountable, or tackle pollution. But now, they’re trying to block local communities from taking action to improve the lives of their residents—because they want to crush local progressive organizing, to the benefit of their special interest megadonors.
Back in 2010, when he was a 21-year-old labor organizer, Greg worked with local construction workers to successfully push the City of Austin to guarantee water breaks. Since then, cities across Texas have made efforts to protect workers rights, pass paid sick leave, and crack down on corporations polluting their communities.

**Local communities will protect their workers and tenants, even if Greg Abbott and his megadonors won’t. We must defeat H.B. 2127 and stand up for workers’ rights across our state.**

[**Help us fight back—chip in $20 or whatever you can to help us push back on this disastrous bill and fight for workers’ rights and renters’ rights in Congress.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63380798/406578743/-569515757?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MGM4MmE0MS0xNGY0LWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cCxZzjVxt3WY1smarHyfCH1pPv673zzpyJG6Vc5UfgQ=)

Thank you,
-Tara

body:
Hundreds of radical Democrats have just signed on to support a move that would make ultra-woke Washington DC our 51st state.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Tyler=20B.=20Jones?=
subject: Join Jim Herring for a book signing!
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/mspolicy/leadershipacademy-8133048?e=5703353baa)
---
| |
---
|
Dear Friend,
One of the Mississippi Center for Public Policy's board members has written a book!

**Join James "Jim" Herring, the former Mississippi Republican Party State Chairman, as he premiers and signs copies of his new book, "The Switcher."**
---
| [ ](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=cb10092c7e&e=5703353baa)
---
**_Click on the image above for more information!_**
| **"The Switcher" is Jim Herring’s vivid, birds-eye account of the politicians, parties, and principles that competed for voters’ allegiances from the 1960s through 2008 in Mississippi.**

Readers witness unfurling political events, power plays, and personalities as the state’s upstart Republicans battled to achieve a viable two-party system against the state Democratic machine that was set on preserving its good-old-boy, powerful vice grip on state politics.

The son of passionate conservative Democrats, Jim Herring ultimately became the only State Chairman of the Mississippi Republican Party to serve previously on the Mississippi Democratic Party Executive Committee. Jim was elected in 2001 as Mississippi Republican Party Chairman, a post he held through 2008. Jim also rose nationally to become the Republican National Committee’s Chairman of the State Chairmen, a role that placed him on the Republican National Committee Executive Committee as a leader at the 2008 Republican National Convention.

**Tickets to the event are free, and reservations are not required! We hope to see you there!**
---
| [Forward this email to a friend!](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=44ffba61df&e=5703353baa "Forward this email to a friend!")
---
| |
---
All the Best,

Tyler B. Jones
Director of Communications and Legislative Affairs

---

name: Julie Chavez Rodriguez (via JoeBiden.com)
subject: Nice to meet you!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
Today is my first day as campaign manager for the Biden-Harris reelection campaign, and I could not be more excited. | | |
---
Peter, I wanted to take a moment to introduce myself: I’m Julie Chavez Rodriguez, and today is my first day on the job as campaign manager for President Biden and Vice President Harris’s reelection campaign. I come from a family of organizers and political activists. Some of my earliest memories are from marches and rallies -- raising my voice and fighting for justice alongside my grandfather, Cesar Chavez, to improve the lives of farm workers. **Fighting for the people has been the throughline of my life --_and it’s why I’m so proud to be working on this campaign._** **[Joe and Kamala are building a people-powered campaign, and they’re relying on grassroots donations from supporters like you to power it. Can you donate $25 to become a Founding Donor of the campaign today?](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yEOQgSlkg29MQMFLkzVkhZolpNtnxhhD-1AkF4SxfyYkjCYJCv2caeuzF8aIRa566WImfgD_0W06kylJpX6f9K4ANd6StIrVrVyLHJ9J5M8XIKbzTPCpDr4RPFD0DqGco1ejt1rHpYt1y8yRt5M2qxl2NxLeoq6uqf348YsA4-5zdzHmCMRySTxmAoCjwUcy4KOVKOGJvsroc5WI4b9bMFHmdXn9vIb1AIU8CGIa57-BpV4z82bN8T77n1Eje0jE5PClcsyeSnlRgEU3kFR0YCApS5cTTecS7P49uWNnvsAfMfclXoPRqHC0y5vZSFwOLMNDvzvUvspH-ut2_GD29XqbF9adXW6HKfNzn1kuW_IA/3w8/XAd1HEDQQsKz-FUEnvqd3A/h0/BDyHnBG25mYd6Sg6ctGzSGP2NexkD25ZzBvrAQ6Mi4c)** Joe and Kamala have dedicated their careers to fighting for the people -- and they have accomplished so much in the last two years. One of the things I’m proudest of is how, after they were sworn in, they hit the ground running to pass the American Rescue Plan -- which enabled us to get vaccines out, reopen businesses and schools, and get the pandemic under control. But that wasn’t all: Joe and Kamala made sure the American Rescue Plan wouldn’t just rebuild our economy the way it was _before_ the pandemic. They made sure the American Rescue Plan would help rebuild our economy from the bottom up and the middle out, so that _everyone_ has a chance to get ahead. **Peter, I’ve worked with Joe and Kamala for a few years now and this is just one of countless examples of how dedicated they are to fighting for the people.** **[Now, they’re relying on this team to help them secure four more years in the Oval Office, which is why I am reaching out to you. We are still fighting for justice and to move our country forward. I’m proud to be in this fight alongside Joe, Kamala, and you. And I hope to see you on the campaign trail soon. Julie Julie Chavez Rodriguez Campaign Manager Biden-Harris 2024 | If you would like to unsubscribe from emails like these, Paid for by Biden for President.

name: Barbara Boxer
subject: Major announcement:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
| [ ](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/45318?t=6&akid=7744%2E878179%2EHTsENa) **Friend, I’ve got a huge announcement that should bring a smile to your face and hope to your heart:** former federal prosecutor, Will Rollins just announced his campaign for Congress in California’s 41st district -- one of the most important races in the country in the effort by Democrats to retake the House.

Will stunned political experts in 2022 when he came so close to winning against right wing Republican, Ken Calvert. It ended up being one of the closest races in the country. He outperformed every projection and was the only Democratic challenger in California to win the independent vote. That’s a big deal.

There is no question in my mind that in this upcoming election, with the Presidency on the ballot, the larger turnout will be the key to victory IF we have a strong campaign.

I have committed my energy, time and money to this race and today I am asking you to start Will off with a show of support that will send him a message that we are behind him 100 percent.

[**I’ll share more about why I'm backing Will, but first, I have an important request: Could you split a $10 donation between Will’s campaign and Voter Protection Project to help him launch with strength? Will can win this thing, so please donate now.**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/45318?t=7&akid=7744%2E878179%2EHTsENa) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Will Rollins and VPP will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $10 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/45319?t=8&akid=7744%2E878179%2EHTsENa)
---
[CONTRIBUTE $25 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/45320?t=9&akid=7744%2E878179%2EHTsENa)
[CONTRIBUTE $50 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/45321?t=10&akid=7744%2E878179%2EHTsENa)
[CONTRIBUTE $100 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/45322?t=11&akid=7744%2E878179%2EHTsENa)
[Or a custom donation »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/45318?t=12&akid=7744%2E878179%2EHTsENa)
Here’s why Democrats across the country should pay close attention to this race:

**1\. We need candidates like Will in Congress.** As a former federal prosecutor, he understands the ongoing danger that extremism poses to our democracy. He brought justice to insurrectionists, and I know he'll take the oath to defend democracy as seriously now as he did in the Justice Department.

**2\. Retaking the House runs through CA-41.** After the new lines were drawn, CA-41 became a true swing seat. It’s the type of district Democrats MUST WIN to regain Congress.

**3\. GOP super PACs.** Despite the tough midterm environment in 2022, Will was the third most “overperforming” Dem challenger in the country. He was also heavily outspent by the GOP’s dark money machine. If Democrats help Will keep pace, he can flip this seat!

**4\. Will’s opponent Ken Calvert has got to go.** Calvert voted to overturn the 2020 presidential election. He backs the extreme ban on abortion -- including for instances of rape, and wants doctors who perform them to go to jail. CA-41 is home to one of the most LGBTQ-friendly cities in Palm Springs, yet Calvert staunchly opposes gay marriage.

The rematch is on, folks. Will came so close to winning in 2022, and this is our chance to finish the job. But it depends on widespread, grassroots support.

[**Please split a $10 contribution between Will Rollins’ campaign for Congress and Voter Protection Project today. I’m telling you, this will be one of the most critical races in the country, so don’t sit this one out! We need lots of Democrats to step up right out of the gate.**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/45318?t=13&akid=7744%2E878179%2EHTsENa)
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Will Rollins and VPP will go through immediately:
[CONTRIBUTE $10 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/45319?t=14&akid=7744%2E878179%2EHTsENa)
---
[CONTRIBUTE $25 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/45320?t=15&akid=7744%2E878179%2EHTsENa)
[CONTRIBUTE $50 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/45321?t=16&akid=7744%2E878179%2EHTsENa)
[CONTRIBUTE $100 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/45322?t=17&akid=7744%2E878179%2EHTsENa)
[Or a custom donation »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/45318?t=18&akid=7744%2E878179%2EHTsENa)
Thanks,

Barbara Boxer
Former U.S. Senator, California
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=7744%2E878179%2EHTsENa). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=7744%2E878179%2EHTsENa).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=7744%2E878179%2EHTsENa) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=19&akid=7744%2E878179%2EHTsENa). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=7744%2E878179%2EHTsENa)
---
[Donate Just One Time »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/124?t=5&akid=7744%2E878179%2EHTsENa)

[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=a46b610db76e4a1a9740e71177c91763&_e=skoKYYotmEAVMn7UTJrGCeWnSRguTILxaegMNLDhvtBUsGROxelLPJ7baZuqSC_y74j3rBk07JSSEs1tNaoTwbHmjypR-D3NR5AwU2sgwYm4wiGoo7dA6YzQyYnkP3o8oPj7qYcpb5wCE_CDTeq_ibW6nSZhQ-2vkR7H06CeozOO5Xo0WUNPIgdNrJKoKgN6GLn-uQ4bsI0Fi4HDj5nv5ffg9zShROFBtY1QHparguIZbFLcaC5mJrX3GpjW1LtEfgMXSe_ZpfUCCzCVEyP4-jIGtQYXu6L9UH9LSMCBD0HdWRQ082MstuCaQ4UhvUAY56lZ6w8w7tSepT97n31XYYShkrvhK3pIQUD0LVOCZZrFgBwBtMVKx3tZ6o6qCwrseOsNh-IjzuRvVcVNWUUQkQ9TaElR5vh-9GFaUT3ig7CN93Sa79Fr84xwtAe-i8u2)

Fellow American,

Believe it or not, I did not grow up dreaming of being a politician. In fact, the only thing I ever wanted to do since I was a kid was to run a successful business and stand up for law and order—and that is exactly what I did.

I began my career as a prosecutor, primarily serving victims of domestic violence and abuse. I then opened a small business in the Upstate of South Carolina. In every stage of my early career, I noticed the same problem:**government regulations and taxes put hardworking Americans LAST.**

**Families and small businesses were treated like the problem not the solution. That is wrong.**

And that is what inspired me to run for public office in the first place.

Americans now face some very real problems because of some really poor leadership. I believe every single level of government could use more transparency and true accountability. That is why I am so proud to serve on the U.S. House Committee on Oversight and Accountability.

This committee allows me the opportunity to question power hungry politicians and big government bureaucrats. America wants answers.

That is why I am coming to you today with one simple request: [**will you support my campaign so we can deliver real change? Your investment of $10, $25, $50, or more will help us keep the GOP majority in the House.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=a46b610db76e4a1a9740e71177c91763&_e=skoKYYotmEAVMn7UTJrGCeWnSRguTILxaegMNLDhvtBUsGROxelLPJ7baZuqSC_y74j3rBk07JSSEs1tNaoTwbHmjypR-D3NR5AwU2sgwYm4wiGoo7dA6YzQyYnkP3o8oPj7qYcpb5wCE_CDTeq_ibW6nSZhQ-2vkR7H06CeozOO5Xo0WUNPIgdNrJKoKgN6GLn-uQ4bsI0Fi4HDj5nv5ffg9zShROFBtY1QHparguIZbFLcaC5mJrX3GpjW1LtEfgMXSe_ZpfUCCzCVEyP4-v529uMxJUMCoD1qaxa1pJWux9gDyYrOv_UE3blEmhMjURLTj0zaS4YcuFH3TKZI_qW8UnSSzFoAhWW7fHGtjWuA2O_umfS2JYgI_0h6JepSN5c9G5Jc0B_cuJEeiFqPJB8Hi1bcFV9gKyXM7AB6yWBDdy6UeSV57J_4o5NO6hrP)

_Fellow American, let me tell you the truth about the state of our nation’s capital these days:_ some of the longest-serving, career politicians do not want our country to thrive. They would rather have America play the victim than become the victor.

As crazy as it sounds, some of our kids are now being taught to hate their families and the America we grew up in. Wokeism is ruining our country.

Progressive politicians are to blame. We have a crisis at our southern border with deadly drugs flooding into each and every state. Violent crime rates are rising almost as high as inflation rates. The liberals answer? Spend more money and try to take our guns.

Our freedom and our shared conservative values are under attack.

[**We need conservative leaders who will fight for our nation._And I need men and women who will invest in my campaign to turn this country around and begin to put America back on top._**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=a46b610db76e4a1a9740e71177c91763&_e=skoKYYotmEAVMn7UTJrGCeWnSRguTILxaegMNLDhvtBUsGROxelLPJ7baZuqSC_y74j3rBk07JSSEs1tNaoTwbHmjypR-D3NR5AwU2sgwYm4wiGoo7dA6YzQyYnkP3o8oPj7qYcpb5wCE_CDTeq_ibW6nSZhQ-2vkR7H06CeozOO5Xo0WUNPIgdNrJKoKgN6GLn-uQ4bsI0Fi4HDj5nv5ffg9zShROFBtY1QHparguIZbFLcaC5mJrX3GpjW1LtEfgMXSe_ZpfUCCzCVEyP4-jtR12Odb9cAzlcN8GGqQQ4Mzl_ZNsFhghp3OiqnfX6NFOkv1qyQKw4ZZJhAQMiQwkiKJKdKHuQaxKXjiIBQbr4Nv7UgqHbvEXoF3Uo-vEyIM-H3hlfVLm1_1e1HxsykrbGaFIR3RcnI_7-9POIZL8Q2dhONFxU8pibMB9EKwxO-)

Today, I am asking you to join my campaign. [**I hope I can count on your support today.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=a46b610db76e4a1a9740e71177c91763&_e=skoKYYotmEAVMn7UTJrGCeWnSRguTILxaegMNLDhvtBUsGROxelLPJ7baZuqSC_y74j3rBk07JSSEs1tNaoTwbHmjypR-D3NR5AwU2sgwYm4wiGoo7dA6YzQyYnkP3o8oPj7qYcpb5wCE_CDTeq_ibW6nSZhQ-2vkR7H06CeozOO5Xo0WUNPIgdNrJKoKgN6GLn-uQ4bsI0Fi4HDj5nv5ffg9zShROFBtY1QHparguIZbFLcaC5mJrX3GpjW1LtEfgMXSe_ZpfUCCzCVEyP4-kchrSjUEa5-z7ldF8Gj1tn4GGWHFEEr7DpbBx8fuun-KgBghDfhFh-phQAkYpVaZSUld3ehxLy9_CqBFaXQ7iUl05C2HhsECYjHRF35IlJDgdRXg8ASU_nWOk3v_0pONhE19_-oXHUwM7kfNP4_2O5Zg4Wq-IArAolU-1TUEiNd)

Respectfully,

[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=a46b610db76e4a1a9740e71177c91763&_e=skoKYYotmEAVMn7UTJrGCeWnSRguTILxaegMNLDhvtBUsGROxelLPJ7baZuqSC_y74j3rBk07JSSEs1tNaoTwbHmjypR-D3NR5AwU2sgwYm4wiGoo7dA6YzQyYnkP3o8oPj7qYcpb5wCE_CDTeq_ibW6nSZhQ-2vkR7H06CeozOO5Xo0WUNPIgdNrJKoKgN6GLn-uQ4bsI0Fi4HDj5nv5ffg9zShROFBtY1QHparguIZbFLcaC5mJrX3GpjW1LtEfgMXSe_ZpfUCCzCVEyP4-ixNlO-1SO2WM-7HhRWXIjxkHtDAoonxTvQOThvYGEo_G6PUpjhQtQG7ryvIwugyNKvyQ6OjzfaHMpD6W0rmnbje_Jn3GGd5LczLDCkzZ2CRxQ5iKJYE02Uk3jrkjG-mCAMBkv3XrKyfo8AKvgmd0G9xIBGPFfa1KQRQeAXUbXti)

William Timmons

| **ABOUT WILLIAM TIMMONS**
* * *
William Timmons is a conservative reformer with a small business background committed to finding solutions to everyday problems. He is honored to represent South Carolina’s 4th Congressional District in the United States Congress, where he has been fighting for our Upstate conservative values since 2019.

clean_body: Believe it or not, I did not grow up dreaming of being a politician. In fact, the only thing I ever wanted to do since I was a kid was to run a successful business and stand up for law and order—and that is exactly what I did. | No longer want to receive emails from Timmons for Congress? You may . Fellow American, Believe it or not, I did not grow up dreaming of being a politician. In fact, the only thing I ever wanted to do since I was a kid was to run a successful business and stand up for law and order—and that is exactly what I did. I began my career as a prosecutor, primarily serving victims of domestic violence and abuse. I then opened a small business in the Upstate of South Carolina. In every stage of my early career, I noticed the same problem:government regulations and taxes put hardworking Americans LAST. Families and small businesses were treated like the problem not the solution. That is wrong. And that is what inspired me to run for public office in the first place. Americans now face some very real problems because of some really poor leadership. I believe every single level of government could use more transparency and true accountability. That is why I am so proud to serve on the U.S. House Committee on Oversight and Accountability. This committee allows me the opportunity to question power hungry politicians and big government bureaucrats. America wants answers. That is why I am coming to you today with one simple request: Fellow American, let me tell you the truth about the state of our nation’s capital these days: some of the longest-serving, career politicians do not want our country to thrive. They would rather have America play the victim than become the victor. As crazy as it sounds, some of our kids are now being taught to hate their families and the America we grew up in. Wokeism is ruining our country. Progressive politicians are to blame. We have a crisis at our southern border with deadly drugs flooding into each and every state. Violent crime rates are rising almost as high as inflation rates. The liberals answer? Spend more money and try to take our guns. Our freedom and our shared conservative values are under attack. - Today, I am asking you to join my campaign. Respectfully, William Timmons | ABOUT WILLIAM TIMMONS * William Timmons is a conservative reformer with a small business background committed to finding solutions to everyday problems. He is honored to represent South Carolina’s 4th Congressional District in the United States Congress, where he has been fighting for our Upstate conservative values since 2019. | Paid for by William Timmons for Congress

name: Brittany Pettersen (personal)

body:
Hey — my senior team reached out yesterday, but I need to follow up very quickly.

****Hey — my senior team reached out yesterday, but I need to follow up very quickly. Our campaign is falling short of projections halfway through May. We got a boost yesterday after we sounded the alarm, but we need a little more help to make up the gap. I know it’s only May, but the truth is, we need to do the work now to prepare to win a tough race next year — and that means setting aside the resources to run ads, hire organizers all across the district, and go toe-to-toe with the GOP extremists who want to flip this seat red. I promise that I will keep working my tail off to protect abortion rights, defend our democracy, and fight for the regular families whose needs so often go overlooked in Washington. It is truly an honor and a privilege to do this work, Team. But I can’t do it alone. **If you can pitch in — whether it’s $5 or $25 or $100 — it would help us hit our May fundraising projections and power our fight to flip the House blue next year. Here is a secure link to donate:****[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pettersen-core-team-may-2023](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63382003/406583304/-1627345757?refcode=email_051623_mmfr2&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MDIyOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NzA0OGRjYy0xN2Y0LWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=64TezpjXU3d2fbHWzQn5UjDzeNJObxSeg8YEw3TjnPw=)** Thanks so much. I’m truly grateful for everything you do. Brittany

The first African-American woman in Wisconsin history to serve in the U.S. House of Representatives, Congresswoman Gwen Moore, took her official oath of office on January 4, 2005. She served in the Wisconsin State Senate from 1993-2004. Before her election to the Senate, Congresswoman Moore served two consecutive terms in the Wisconsin State Assembly from 1989-92.

clean_body: Our orange nemesis is at it again| | | | | ATTENTION GWEN NATION! Our radical, anti-democracy orange nemesis, Donald J. Trump, continues his unfounded denial that Wisconsin played a major role in giving him the boot from the Oval Office in 2020. = It's time to halt his delusions from causing more damage and ensure he never sets foot in the White House again. = Thank you, Gwen NATION! Together, #WeRepresent! | | Proudly representing Wisconsin's 4th Congressional District Proud Co-Leader of the Violence Against Women Act 100% Pro-Choice 100% Democracy Defender | The first African-American woman in Wisconsin history to serve in the U.S. House of Representatives, Congresswoman Gwen Moore, took her official oath of office on January 4, 2005. She served in the Wisconsin State Senate from 1993-2004. Before her election to the Senate, Congresswoman Moore served two consecutive terms in the Wisconsin State Assembly from 1989-92. = | | | = | =| = ---|---|--- Paid for and Authorized by Gwen Moore for Congress Gwen Moore for Congress P.O. body: Background on release of Durham report criticizing FBI investigation of Trump [NEWSLINK] BREAKING NEWS... [600x300] [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=63382&L=29537&F=T&&hash=97027a11a677b1efcd36ab893c2effa2006891f306e2e0f383ffc1fc825ad67d] John Durham releases final report, concludes FBI had no verified intel when it opened probe on Trump [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=63382&L=29537&F=T&&hash=97027a11a677b1efcd36ab893c2effa2006891f306e2e0f383ffc1fc825ad67d] Source: Just the News [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=63382&L=29537&F=T&&hash=97027a11a677b1efcd36ab893c2effa2006891f306e2e0f383ffc1fc825ad67d] Special Counsel John Durham released a damning final report Monday after more than three years investigating the Russia collusion probe, declaring the FBI had no verified intelligence or evidence when it opened the Crossfire Hurricane probe of President Donald Trump's campaign in the summer of 2016. The prosecutor, however, recommended no new criminal charges. clean_body: Background on release of Durham report criticizing FBI investigation of Trump [NEWSLINK] BREAKING NEWS... [600x300] [] John Durham releases final report, concludes FBI had no verified intel when it opened probe on Trump [] Source: Just the News [] Special Counsel John Durham released a damning final report Monday after more than three years investigating the Russia collusion probe, declaring the FBI had no verified intelligence or evidence when it opened the Crossfire Hurricane probe of President Donald Trump's campaign in the summer of 2016. The prosecutor, however, recommended no new criminal charges. [13x13x1] [] READ MORE [] Background Notes from Judicial Watch [180x150x1] [] 2023-03-22 Justice Department Records Show Special Counsel Durham’s FY 2022 Budget over $8.5 Million [] Source: Judicial Watch [] “Special Counsel Durham has spent millions in tax dollars to investigate the worst government corruption scandal in American history – the abuse of Trump – to little good end,” said Judicial Watch President Tom Fitton. “That we had to file a federal lawsuit to get basic budget information about this historic investigation speaks volumes. And that the Garland DOJ is still hiding documents adds to the scandal.” [13x13x1] [] READ MORE [] [180x150x2] [] 2023-05-15 Durham Let the American People Down [] Source: Judicial Watch [] Judicial Watch President Tom Fitton: "Never in American history has so much government corruption faced so little accountability. Let me be clear, the FBI and Justice Department – and their political masters in the Obama White House – are responsible for the worst government corruption in American history. President Trump is a crime victim who was targeted by a seditious conspiracy by Obama, Biden, Clinton and their Deep State allies." [13x13x1] [] READ MORE [] [180x150x3] [] 2022-06-06 DC Court Case Exposes Clinton, FBI Targeting Trump in “Russia Collusion” Scandal [] Source: Judicial Watch [] Hillary did it. And the FBI helped. That’s the Occam’s Razor conclusion behind court action in Washington that added new details about the true forces behind the “Russia collusion” allegations. John Durham lost his case. The jury acquitted Washington attorney Michael Sussmann on the only charge Durham managed to bring: a single count alleging that Sussmann lied to the FBI when he brought it allegations of a link between Trump and Moscow’s Putin-connected Alfa Bank. [13x13x1] [] READ MORE [] [Contribute] [] [32x32x1] [] [32x32x2] [] [32x32x3] [] [32x32x3] [] Judicial Watch, Inc. 425 3rd St Sw Ste 800 Washington, DC 20024 202.646.5172 © 2017 - 2023, All Rights Reserved Manage Email Subscriptions [] |

Tanake, **** It’s Aminah, 7 Directions of Service Policy Director, writing with some breaking MVP news, and what we’re doing about it. In February, over 12,000 of us signed a petition to the Forest Service urging them to SAY NO to MVP’s crossing of the Jefferson National Forest. We just got the unfortunate news that they’ve decided to allow MVP to cross.

clean_body: DC action announcement and ways you can plug in from wherever you are! | | Tanake, ** It’s Aminah, 7 Directions of Service Policy Director, writing with some breaking MVP news, and what we’re doing about it. In February, over 12,000 of us signed a petition to the Forest Service urging them to SAY NO to MVP’s crossing of the Jefferson National Forest. We just got the unfortunate news that they’ve decided to allow MVP to cross. | At the same time, the , and multiple threaten to fast-track the project, in addition to gutting the essential environmental and community protecting laws we rely on. In the face of it all, more and more everyday people are joining our cause. Powerful youth, like WV climate activist , are stepping up as leaders. Our coalition stands united, and we are ramping up resistance efforts. Here are ways you can plug in: Thursday June 8th in Washington DC, we are bringing the frontlines to President Biden's doorstep. Join us for the Biden, #StopMVP Now Action! FREE roundtrip transportation from NC to DC on 6/8 - \- tell your Senators to oppose fast-tracking the MVP and a free pass for dirty energy! Join us for a free on May 27 to our MVP Resistance Fund | | | | For free roundtrip transportation from NC to DC on 6/8 - | | | Sent via . To update your email address, change your name or address, or to stop receiving emails from 7 Directions of Service, please .

Saturday May 20th @ Lake Jackson VFD
| | |

|
---
| Dear Friends,
Please join me for my re-elect campaign kickoff this Saturday morning, May 20th, at the Lake Jackson Volunteer Fire Department in Manassas!
Over the last four years, you've joined me as we've fought for lower property taxes, a safer community, and sensible, citizen-first development. With your help and a new governing majority committed to these issues we will once again make Prince William County the best place in our commonwealth to live, work, and raise a family.
---

name: Pramila Jayapal
subject: Addressing the root cause of migration
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
From day one, Republicans made it clear that they would pursue this unworkable approach.
#
Peter,
The House Republicans' immigration proposal is cruel, extreme, and unworkable. **That's why I voted no.**
In a moment, I'll explain just why I felt it so important to take a stand against this legislation. But first, I'd like to ask you to support our movement so that we can keep standing up to unjust and unethical leadership in our democracy. [**If you can, please chip in a donation of any amount to grow our momentum and continue fighting for change.**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/42030?refcode=em20230516-2491&t=1&akid=2491%2E420207%2Euh36dz)
**[Donate](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/42030?refcode=em20230516-2491&t=2&akid=2491%2E420207%2Euh36dz)**
From day one, Republicans made it clear that they would pursue this unworkable approach. Their proposed immigration bill would:
* Gut asylum access for people arriving from countries across the world.
* Bar anyone who seeks protection by entering the country between ports of entry from ever being able to obtain asylum, even if they are an unaccompanied child or fleeing from a totalitarian dictatorship.
* Mandate indefinite family detention and the detention of children.
* **And so much more.**

I am sick and tired of this cruel madness, Peter, _and I know you are too._ The GOP must stop treating immigrants like political footballs and scapegoats for the problems we face as a nation. **Passing a bill like this will not open up space for bipartisan compromise — but it WILL continue to normalize xenophobic and hateful rhetoric in our politics.**
The progressive proposals introduced by Democrats protect the dignity and human rights of immigrants and asylum seekers. If implemented, they will help build a pathway to citizenship for people who come to our country to build a better life and end our broken, for-profit immigration detention system.
By creating a more humane immigration system that recognizes the horrific conditions that force migrants to flee, we can strengthen our economy, protect human rights, and end this cruel treatment.
**Peter, we must put the pressure on those who continue to push inhumane and cruel bills such as this Republican immigration proposal.****And I need you by my side in this fight.**[**If you stand with me, please chip in $5, $10, $50, or any amount you can afford to boost our momentum and continue building our democracy rooted in love and compassion.**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/42030?refcode=em20230516-2491&t=3&akid=2491%2E420207%2Euh36dz)
**[Donate](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/42030?refcode=em20230516-2491&t=22&akid=2491%2E420207%2Euh36dz)**
Together,
Pramila Jayapal

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20230516-2491-footer&t=23&refcode2=2491_420207_uh36dz&akid=2491%2E420207%2Euh36dz)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/did-your-info-change/?t=24&akid=2491%2E420207%2Euh36dz)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=25&akid=2491%2E420207%2Euh36dz)

Paid for by Pramila for Congress

name: James Comer
subject: Big news about the “Big Guy”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Comer for Congress**

Peter, This week, I issued a subpoena to FBI Director Christopher Wray for an FD-1023 form that a whistleblower said links Joe Biden to a criminal scheme.
We’ve been wondering why so many foreign nationals paid the Bidens so much money, and we could be very close to finding out.
**This FD-1023 form that the FBI has links Joe Biden himself to a criminal scheme involving money for policy decisions during his vice presidency.**
It is with a heavy heart that I fear our Commander-in-Chief may be compromised by foreign actors, and I’m going to do everything in my power to deliver the whole truth to the American people.
These revelations destroy the Democrat’s and media’s false narrative about Joe Biden and his family, and they are going to fight until the end to stop me from exposing their lies.
I am under constant attack, and they are only going to intensify as I get closer to providing Americans the facts. **[My only defense is fighting back and defending my integrity and credibility, and I rely on grassroots conservatives to help me do that. ](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=9584def8d5be494d8026a437f33273f1&_e=c-I39BeGNWWVa7T4eoySwQr8JqFOLX7yuWo9ztKm-kGpj9ovGPD0WzAP-IKA_5ZyujLa3GCCwIhjWw5ArbS8o0FIuwOAJDpiBLO4MctxH5YCzuO0nq_LkJHlYZZetgi9e0NzmLjxMvQ_6KOPnoD74QVWt9IzLKNhxE7nSKfd5WtWSK141ASRwkqyRyWPuWmfZIr2_W1ys8tR_sZsi_FwpyQWWS8kpghA-70F6sRWzgT4AK7bcLmwUGKgsaIqoeJctAwvXhBkBTaVcOlEaYXlJDaWp0uOJTHmXX4NdGMTPKetu6WA8kBvXC4gmu3YeyUpHKMIVlQXgQmYu9mYQwlFpBYM5JzrqmAT4KQg3FyKSOb_jPehlbT5nj-NqV3CfC--SAXQ5YsBkUaI_O0AbaIuJQ%3D%3D)**
| [ **DEFEND COMER** ](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=9584def8d5be494d8026a437f33273f1&_e=c-I39BeGNWWVa7T4eoySwQr8JqFOLX7yuWo9ztKm-kGpj9ovGPD0WzAP-IKA_5ZyujLa3GCCwIhjWw5ArbS8o0FIuwOAJDpiBLO4MctxH5YCzuO0nq_LkJHlYZZetgi9e0NzmLjxMvQ_6KOPnoD74QVWt9IzLKNhxE7nSKfd5WtWSK141ASRwkqyRyWPuWmfZIr2_W1ys8tR_sZsi_FwpyQWWS8kpghA-70F6sRWzgT4AK7bcLmwUGKgsaIqoeJc1Q7mLIDQNxwmCVOcwB6gq4hy1tOcp6Whnn8_i38eQfMjOhr9WrB3zidGOj9sxjlQD_eKbswgTATEp-C9-9Piy9GGFBGsNw1ZpLnQCWIkJpA5IUdu2opitMtwUTucVbKjs35S5ouiFn1xfn319mcTDA%3D%3D)
---
Like I’ve said before, county boys from West Kentucky are a tough breed, _**we don’t back down and we don’t cave to pressure from high and mighty big city liberals on cable TV.**_
But that’s not going to stop the folks in the mainstream media from attacking me and trying to destroy the credibility of my work and the good name I’ve spent an honest life building.
**[So please, if you’re able, chip in a couple bucks so my team and I can mount a defense to the onslaught of attacks that have already begun.](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=9584def8d5be494d8026a437f33273f1&_e=c-I39BeGNWWVa7T4eoySwQr8JqFOLX7yuWo9ztKm-kGpj9ovGPD0WzAP-IKA_5ZyujLa3GCCwIhjWw5ArbS8o0FIuwOAJDpiBLO4MctxH5YCzuO0nq_LkJHlYZZetgi9e0NzmLjxMvQ_6KOPnoD74QVWt9IzLKNhxE7nSKfd5WtWSK141ASRwkqyRyWPuWmfZIr2_W1ys8tR_sZsi_FwpyQWWS8kpghA-70F6sRWzgT4AK7bcLmwUGKgsaIqoeJcjhrPra9sMZCTmCr4AGAL0N547GlcfP5OVbu892I0FR0BYmEWXBaIpefu5ujNEVFmt3viXOpm6YU7mu5TmrUWT5qrCVKxSE9SrXqNcsrR7rjLlkRI-zL1Hxq0Nre5SZ5kg-kq9vdhf1FwRnzBEQCTmg%3D%3D)**
If you can’t, please take the time to say a prayer for our country, we’re going to need it.
With Courage,

| | [**BREAKING: House Republicans PASS MAJOR Border Security Package**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=5f47e82194fc4d21a25d8ec8a8e3bb3c&_e=fzwQ_52RgGP8ZJlO-BVCHK38i_kufjf5dtzCyz67T5y3x8_EC8wwMgVi6hgmhYI9UOAjKz3OdyRtDGx7OJohAyQYZhXarBB_p5nfPmLzNvzvqSfd99BkswjQZv7N4ZBP2EGWSLuXJWgyWeFKpK8BNIThQ1uNFzymf5FF-WjvNHh1CRZ5sRqKh7i5JayERNHpaaCBcL77DOO-gyv75AYvXvbct-As3QMPgmkyPme3SnKCYqoANYz8dTbRsJBpd_nexFk2iAarHbTRqRuaW518AQAsax_AFLSLLLgrf_GjKagIJnN3kikfjMKG9RWwk4fhnPNhuln3VEgHfIhaM7_VJCGb-ELQRPdL6yQVsc2AjVt1njafJ0d_Cd4SW7TN3y2SE71YRGtjNok-B91gLHxp1Q%3D%3D) Peter, this a critical first win for addressing Joe Biden’s open border crisis. Heritage Action successfully fought for critical provisions in this legislation that will actually secure our border and keep Americans safe, such as:
* **Closing legal loopholes to end the asylum fraud**
* **Ending “Catch and Release”**
* **Reimplementing policies like Remain in Mexico**
* **Completing the border wall**
* **Mandating E-Verify to ensure legal employment**
* **Supplying Border Patrol with the necessary personnel and tools**

Now, the legislation moves to the Senate, where anti-solution Chuck Schumer will refuse to allow consideration of border security and allow Joe Biden’s intentional policy of open borders, fentanyl, and chaos to continue. It will now be up to the American people to decide which direction they want the country to go: safe and secure borders or chaos, drugs, and mayhem. **We need your help to keep the momentum of grassroots activists going and to see this fight through to the end.** [**Can we count on your immediate support to fuel our fight to secure the border?**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=5f47e82194fc4d21a25d8ec8a8e3bb3c&_e=fzwQ_52RgGP8ZJlO-BVCHK38i_kufjf5dtzCyz67T5y3x8_EC8wwMgVi6hgmhYI9UOAjKz3OdyRtDGx7OJohAyQYZhXarBB_p5nfPmLzNvzvqSfd99BkswjQZv7N4ZBP2EGWSLuXJWgyWeFKpK8BNIThQ1uNFzymf5FF-WjvNHh1CRZ5sRqKh7i5JayERNHpaaCBcL77DOO-gyv75AYvXvbct-As3QMPgmkyPme3SnLKqueZBMxAwTvvjIoNgSRd9koQvQ3STwMvmqgm5OVuwPjiw4RCfOx1P3kGVH0bogeTzm9RnWAu1eFALTOaAP9sbW1N0XYuYdibwqRPpY3tJwUFwkpXGAG9_hSubMMFeATpM420WX5Ebnf9by5HsKobWmOX0eI-v6uZ8yvE2BxEVw%3D%3D)

clean_body: But this fight is far from over| | | | | Peter, this a critical first win for addressing Joe Biden’s open border crisis. Heritage Action successfully fought for critical provisions in this legislation that will actually secure our border and keep Americans safe, such as: Closing legal loopholes to end the asylum fraud Ending “Catch and Release” Reimplementing policies like Remain in Mexico Completing the border wall Mandating E-Verify to ensure legal employment Supplying Border Patrol with the necessary personnel and tools Now, the legislation moves to the Senate, where anti-solution Chuck Schumer will refuse to allow consideration of border security and allow Joe Biden’s intentional policy of open borders, fentanyl, and chaos to continue. It will now be up to the American people to decide which direction they want the country to go: safe and secure borders or chaos, drugs, and mayhem. We need your help to keep the momentum of grassroots activists going and to see this fight through to the end. Thank you,Ryan WalkerVice President of Federal Policy Heritage Action | Heritage Action is proud to be the most effective grassroots conservative organization around. It’s one thing if they come after me. But I won’t let them attack you.
| | | [ ](https://email.win.donaldjtrump.com/c/eJw8kUGPmzAQhX-NuYHssRmHA4dNrWwl1Ko9dfcUObaTTIoNAtOI_vqKKOn1e0-j92lsHHs6ry3TewZwJT8zACbfGECn9h_fsfvVmfLH-7qWBmt131L4wgDyOob_1eeVKkRL_Ua1KXwLbgfOFaEVuFOAUoMurq0UyquTUE7sfMBzY1E3GBQXrjkpPGFBLXCQvBYoGg68rjQC2jqcBDpED4opfqdU-SHZ3t_ytMSxckMs-vaa8zg_Jh0YHObglilUd0pT8FtjY_ZPKG0MEzlb3gZKuTwvyU-WZkqX0g0xUs4hMDgk13OoHZehrgX3rmmYPCw5HmPwtEQmzVMXNzgPy-QCk8bR0T6Zs3G0dElMmpfSKxlSDikzaRquGgZ4TD15Js3-d_f-9xI_P34-4OMh0ozftP7avd0-i6n14536nmbUTPHLtmBT-xcAAP__QKaMbA)

Friend,
Honestly, I’m used to all of the many attacks from our enemies.
That’s the battle I signed up for. It’s part of the job.
_...But a line is crossed when they attack**YOU.**_
**The Left is now shamelessly attacking the _innocent AUDIENCE_ members at my CNN town hall who were cheering, applauding, and laughing.**
That perfectly sums up the nasty Left.
For all of their phony cries about the “end of democracy,” Democrats don’t want you to have the right to make up YOUR own mind and have YOUR own voice.
_But very soon, you will once again have a President who respects YOUR rights and will always put YOU first._
**Now, let’s show our many enemies that they cannot silence the greatest political movement in history.**

clean_body: It’s one thing if they come after me. But I won’t let them attack you. | | | Friend, Honestly, I’m used to all of the many attacks from our enemies. That’s the battle I signed up for. It’s part of the job. ...But a line is crossed when they attackYOU. The Left is now shamelessly attacking the innocent AUDIENCE members at my CNN town hall who were cheering, applauding, and laughing. That perfectly sums up the nasty Left. For all of their phony cries about the “end of democracy,” Democrats don’t want you to have the right to make up YOUR own mind and have YOUR own voice. But very soon, you will once again have a President who respects YOUR rights and will always put YOU first. Now, let’s show our many enemies that they cannot silence the greatest political movement in history. Thank you, | Donald J. Trump 45th President of the United States Contributions to Trump Save America JFC are not deductible for federal income tax purposes. name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: Because of the GOP, we aren't safe from guns anywhere. Gen Z has had enough of this, and Voters of Tomorrow has been key to turning out Gen Z in such massive numbers they've upended our electoral landscape.
body:
The school-shooting-drill generation has had enough
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Td80b699a-05df-4dca-86d1-5afd23dd0dcc/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, **The massacre in Allen, TX last weekend was horrifying & heartbreaking. Those who lost their lives include a five-year old child, just beginning life.** _I'm not gonna go into statistics. I don't have the heart to. So, just three things:_ **1)** [**_We can stop this any time we elect enough Democrats. Democrats support the measures that have ended these tragedies in every other democracy._**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tf4216e3a-e71c-45bf-83f5-e400c6ac3358/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) **2) _Because of the GOP, we aren't safe anywhere._** **_Houses of worship. Malls. Schools. Dance clubs. It's only getting worse._** **3) _Gen Z is, sadly, the school-shooting-drill generation._** **_They've had enough of this, and the past two elections it's been a top issue turning them out in record numbers, breaking electoral records._** **_Voters of Tomorrow has been key to turning out Gen Z in such massive numbers they've upended our electoral landscape. Continuing to swell their presence at the polls is our only way to stop this utter madness._** [**_Will you join a heartbroken Blue Amp Action in giving $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can to Voters of Tomorrow?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T9713ff5d-6644-4949-bb8f-02edee5a6f21/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) **This. Must. End.** Cliff
---
|
---
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
|
---
| | | | [**DONATE NOW**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T831bb0a8-bb86-4cb6-9784-816681ded1ad/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| **Blue Amp Strategies**
1776 Mentor Ave. #411 | Norwood, Ohio 45212
513.438.0171 | info@blueampaction.com
---
| Having trouble viewing this email? [View it in your web browser](https://blueampstrategies.salsalabs.org/votersoftomorrow-allentxshooting5-n?wvpId=368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | |
---
| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T4d581352-66e8-4254-bde6-948966936380/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: Secure & Prosper
subject: 'Long Guns Pointed at Me and My 7 Children': Pro-Life Dad Tells Lawmakers About Arrest

Helen Gym, a community organizer, teacher, and former City Councilmember, is running an insurgent mayoral campaign against self-funding millionaires and the entrenched political establishment**— and in the final hours of this race, polling shows Helen with a razor-thin lead.** [**Can you chip in now to support Helen’s campaign in the final stretch?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63384023/406590765/-1378499150?refcode=AU_HHG_FR_GEN_GEN_NO_20230516_PM3_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDEwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YmRhYjdjMS0xY2Y0LWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pCkWnZLu6kqFxPGKzwL5VGai4AvmZOQctIP1tmfMmRI=) Helen first made headlines in 2012, after Philly closed 23 public schools in a year. The Mayor at the time had slashed the city’s education budget and shuttered schools, libraries, rec centers, and fire departments, putting the safety and wellbeing of Philly’s most vulnerable communities at risk. And do you know who was there at every turn fighting against school closures and winning back resources that community members needed to thrive? **Helen Gym.** For over 30 years, Helen has stood up to the status quo and delivered results. When schools were understaffed and water fountains had lead in them, she stepped up to guarantee safe drinking water, nurses, and counselors in every school. When low-wage workers were being exploited, she passed legislation to guarantee reliable schedules. And when Philly had one of the highest rates of eviction in the country, Helen passed legislation that cut evictions by 70%. **I'm proud to support Helen Gym for mayor, because she’s running to return power where it belongs — in the hands of the community. I know what it’s like to be told that my ideas are 'too big' or 'too hard' and that 'it’s better to keep quiet.' And I also know that our power lies in our connections to each other, and that a burgeoning people-powered movement from Philly to New York to Chicago and beyond is going to transform the status quo that has held this country back for too long.
It will take all of us fighting together, in every city and in every corner of this country, to win the future we deserve — a future where housing is a human right, immigrant families are welcomed, workers are protected, and our communities are safe and vibrant.

subject: Urgent: Title 42 just ended but asylum is still at risk
body:

Peter — First implemented by Trump but expanded by Biden under the guise of public health efforts, Title 42 denied hundreds of thousands of Black and brown immigrants their right to seek safety.
After we joined countless immigrant justice groups to fight Title 42, it finally ended just a few days ago — **but asylum is still at risk.**
President Biden’s administration wasted no time announcing a new rule to make it harder for people to obtain asylum.
**We need to use the end of Title 42 as an opportunity to embrace immigrants and reject division. Will you chip in to help us fight back against inhumane asylum restrictions that endanger immigrants?**

Whether to be reunited with family, for economic opportunities, or for safety, people will always move.
The U.S. has the power to help welcome and support people in hard times. And we have a responsibility to make sure people can seek asylum with dignity.

clean_body: Help UWDA fight back against policies that restrict asylum and endanger immigrants. | | | | | BREAKING: Title 42 just ended but asylum is still at risk Biden just announced sweeping measures to make it harder for people to obtain asylum. Help us fight back against asylum bans and any rules that criminalize asylum seekers by making an emergency donation: | | Peter — First implemented by Trump but expanded by Biden under the guise of public health efforts, Title 42 denied hundreds of thousands of Black and brown immigrants their right to seek safety. After we joined countless immigrant justice groups to fight Title 42, it finally ended just a few days ago — but asylum is still at risk. President Biden’s administration wasted no time announcing a new rule to make it harder for people to obtain asylum. We need to use the end of Title 42 as an opportunity to embrace immigrants and reject division. Will you chip in to help us fight back against inhumane asylum restrictions that endanger immigrants? name: Gerrymandering Watch (via the NDRC)
subject: “Control of House Could Hinge on Redistricting Battles Playing Out in State Courts” (New York Sun)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President
body:
|
---

Team, President Obama recently said, **“Redistricting is no longer a once-a-decade event. The fight for fair maps is happening right now.”**

He’s right. Key states could redraw their Congressional districts before the next election – and the makeup of those maps could determine which party wins the House majority. | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/63384396/406592339/-644827789?amount=30&refcode=EM_RTI_20230516_FR_5T_redlight922_527&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjc2NjY0N2YwLTFkZjQtZWQxMS05MDdjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=dbg9HtNp6ILGBSJ-qB4YswavQbbpTWTySDT5pyVlHwY=)

Donate to the NDRC](https://click.everyaction.com/k/63384397/406592340/-644827789?amount=30&refcode=EM_RTI_20230516_FR_5T_redlight922_527&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjc2NjY0N2YwLTFkZjQtZWQxMS05MDdjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=dbg9HtNp6ILGBSJ-qB4YswavQbbpTWTySDT5pyVlHwY=)
---
Ahead of last November’s elections, our movement helped secure what the _New York Times_ called “the fairest House map of the last 40 years” – but the GOP is already trying to roll back that progress:
“Republicans are readying to plow ahead with **ambitious gerrymandering** . . . [they] could more than double their five-seat House majority through redistricting alone.”

_– POLITICO_

clean_body: | Team, President Obama recently said, “Redistricting is no longer a once-a-decade event. The fight for fair maps is happening right now.” He’s right. Key states could redraw their Congressional districts before the next election – and the makeup of those maps could determine which party wins the House majority. | = = Ahead of last November’s elections, our movement helped secure what the New York Times called “the fairest House map of the last 40 years” – but the GOP is already trying to roll back that progress: “Republicans are readying to plow ahead with ambitious gerrymandering . . . [they] could more than double their five-seat House majority through redistricting alone.” – POLITICO = Team, the NDRC is committed to this fight for the long haul, so we’ll keep working to secure fair maps state by state across the country. Will you donate now to help us keep going? If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = – The NDRC = = Since 2017, the NDRC has executed a comprehensive redistricting strategy that shifts the redistricting power, creating fair districts where Democrats can compete. Our victories have been made possible by our strong community of grassroots supporters. = If you want to receive periodic updates from the NDRC on our fight for fair maps, text MAPS to 36787. Text HELP for help, STOP to end. Msg & Data rates may apply. name: Jameson Ellis
subject: Is Dan Crenshaw's legislation a final solution or a temp fix?
body:
Here are my thoughts...

| | | |
---
**Re: Peter **
In a tweet earlier today, my opponent mentioned that Texas is overwhelmed with the influx of illegal immigrants. He went on to talk about how our resources here in Texas are stretched too thin.

Before we go any further, here's my response to his tweet that I shared across all social media channels.
Here's a truth bomb that might rattle some perspectives... showering the federal government with more dollars isn't the key to reigning it in.
More money won't solve the border crisis or any other issue America faces.

Consider this - when we pump funds into behemoth bills, brimming over with countless provisions, a hefty chunk of that money often takes a scenic detour, far from its intended course.

It's like trying to find a single grain of sand on a vast beach - quite an impossible task.

We've become adept at papering over cracks instead of fixing the foundational issues.

We dress up temporary fixes as final solutions when they're just holding back the tide.

**Here are a few ways we can tackle the root of the problem:**

* **Term Limits for Congress** \- Need I say more?
* **Single Subject Bills** \- Easy-to-read legislation the people understand.
* **Repeal the 16th Amendment & Restore Jeffersonian Tax Principles** \- The FairTax Plan would eliminate the IRS and 99% of corruption caused by unelected bureaucrats and special interests.
* **Repeal the 17th Amendment & Restore State Control** \- This amendment would empower the people to simultaneously hold their state and federal legislature accountable.
* **Outlaw Congressional Insider Trading** \- Because we don't send representatives to DC to better their financial situations at the expense of working-class Americans.
* **Article V Convention of States** \- Because unelected bureaucrats in Washington, D.C. shouldn’t be making sweeping decisions that impact millions of Americans.

Those are some of my solutions, but I'd like to hear directly from you.

What are other solutions that will tackle the root of the problem?
_For Liberty,_
| | |

While the American people live under the constant stress of gun violence with mass shootings making the news seemingly every week, House Republicans are choosing once again to ignore the problem.

They bow to the gun lobby, but their constituents have made it clear they want far more than “thoughts and prayers”—they want concrete action.

New stats show that gun deaths among America’s kids rose 50% in the last two years. We must stand up for our families and kids.

clean_body: | This has gone on far too long. While the American people live under the constant stress of gun violence with mass shootings making the news seemingly every week, House Republicans are choosing once again to ignore the problem. They bow to the gun lobby, but their constituents have made it clear they want far more than “thoughts and prayers”—they want concrete action. New stats show that gun deaths among America’s kids rose 50% in the last two years. We must stand up for our families and kids. | | In the last legislative session, I’m proud to have helped pass a bipartisan gun safety law that closes critical loopholes—like the one that allowed convicted domestic violence offenders to purchase weapons. I trust responsible gun owners, but these common sense measures are something all of us can get behind. Some of the only ones who haven’t caught on are Congressional Republicans. That needs to change NOW. Thank you, Sharice * | = | Click here to from Sharice Davids' email list. PAID FOR BY SHARICE FOR CONGRESS Sharice for Congress 13851 W. 63rd St. #303 Shawnee, KS 66216 United States

# We're halfway there - I need your help to reach my goal!
It's about halfway through May and in Indiana that means we start thinking about the Indy 500. I'm in a race of my own in Fort Wayne - I had an active primary and came out in a strong position to challenge Tom Henry for mayor of Fort Wayne. I need your help to raise the funds we'll need. When I sent this newsletter we had just over half of the funds raised I need in May for the budget we set for the fall campaign. **Can you help me reach this goal?**
---
| | [Support Tom Didier](https://api.neonemails.com/emails/tracking/click-link/g5GsKVIWwiuuRFeTYRA3jd8kS1LM75rndG3aUOcSWgA=/fZivO02rS1JRaeYbIyaA5h-biGJblInGfS_hmwwz92s= "Support Tom Didier")
---
Our team in Fort Wayne is excited to restore Republican leadership to the Summit City. We've seen what a great job Mayor Steve McMichael and his Republican city council have done in our neighboring city of New Haven. **I'm eager to work with him and our Allen County Republican leaders to unleash Fort Wayne's potential - but we need your help to get that done**. Tom Henry knows he is in for a fight and has been stashing money away for the fall campaign. The good news is we don't have to match him dollar for dollar, we just need to raise enough to get the message out to voters. Every contribution to my campaign goes to helping us knock more doors, make more calls, and send more mail to voters.
---
| | [Donate to Tom Didier](https://api.neonemails.com/emails/tracking/click-link/g5GsKVIWwiuuRFeTYRA3jd8kS1LM75rndG3aUOcSWgA=/fZivO02rS1JRaeYbIyaA5mdCPeCshwYB53ZNZVhM8XI= "Donate to Tom Didier")
---
Recurring contributions help us cover overhead costs for our office and the software we need to run the campaign, but anything you can give is appreciated. I know that we'll be successful in November with your support. God Bless, P.S. - We can get there in November, but I need your help to get across the finish line. [Any contribution you can make](https://api.neonemails.com/emails/tracking/click-link/g5GsKVIWwiuuRFeTYRA3jd8kS1LM75rndG3aUOcSWgA=/fZivO02rS1JRaeYbIyaA5pZ8Oh4RQFhPZP0yiVxznRE= "Any contribution you can make") gets us closer to our goal. Be sure to check out my upcoming events below!
---

subject: We’ve got one more shot!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the HER Time PAC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee
body:
HER Time PAC [https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP46/1/102543/images/HerTimePrimary.png]
Hey Peter,

We fell just a bit short of our mid-month/mid-quarter fundraising goal last night — but we extended our deadline by just 24 hours!

We’ve got another shot at raising what we need to keep operations going on all fronts, from re-electing vulnerable Congresswomen to protecting abortion access across the country, but now we REALLY cannot afford to come up short.

I’m asking you personally if you’d be able to chip in any amount today to support our work. I know we ask a lot, but there’s too much on the line right now to not hit this goal.

Here’s a personal link for you to use: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/htp-em-may2023 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/htp-em-may2023]

Thanks in advance!

— Katie

clean_body: HER Time PAC [] Hey Peter, We fell just a bit short of our mid-month/mid-quarter fundraising goal last night — but we extended our deadline by just 24 hours! We’ve got another shot at raising what we need to keep operations going on all fronts, from re-electing vulnerable Congresswomen to protecting abortion access across the country, but now we REALLY cannot afford to come up short. I’m asking you personally if you’d be able to chip in any amount today to support our work. I know we ask a lot, but there’s too much on the line right now to not hit this goal. Here’s a personal link for you to use: [] Thanks in advance! — Katie Sent from my iPhone HER Time PAC HER Time PAC 2120 University Ave Berkeley, CA 94704 United States her-time.com [] | team@her-time.com [team@her-time.com] Paid for by the HER Time PAC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
