Fellow American -

I have a clear vision for how to win the White House in 2024: **a grassroots, bottom-up campaign made of people just like you.**

We're about to hit a major campaign milestone - 35,000 unique donors in just months of campaigning. Unlike my opponents who have years of politicking under their belts, we started with NOTHING and have built this movement.

[](http://links.vivek2024.com/u/click?_t=07471d1165224e98aee1aca8cd71f6e2&_m=de4711de874747a7b5f362673cbb4fb7&_e=sK2a_oaG2Edb7VmJpbi5aoZtNSxfMOy9fW-x9v9ooGBJbwNiz5Q6ayFdZFgQ46EHCFOYJq4JwsfwC33EJXG_EH51dlFM2AhBSN65RYjdFESEJtzow4m-LIJUDUACn85faH1UPLnft453b0oXZHoWe_bmy9VIsH5VTxPC98rQiYqsA2GRg0QYqJpBxha9L3rf6hpOWPE6MiBM8k6kbpvzy4TEJcATI7Er0pWKLXpTHn1z4bUpUFgAe8q0xEn3l1IIih_Ys4UXVAqwmeICLtPVfHOFz9eNR-UAAB85tYaP1RTszFRtbnd4bQ-E0NNmIKGWZXzznOuBUTbx-oZ0C9ovSk_ozbwXLoh7w_PmpsLI_CDAvMStp4CXKqhgErkhiUSCZbJLr70-G9xiGH6ss6_7eQ%3D%3D)
So here's what I am asking of you today: **[will you be one of the unique donors I need to get a prime spot on the debate stage? Make it a small donation - every dollar makes a huge difference when it comes to planning our "Great Uprising."](http://links.vivek2024.com/u/click?_t=07471d1165224e98aee1aca8cd71f6e2&_m=de4711de874747a7b5f362673cbb4fb7&_e=sK2a_oaG2Edb7VmJpbi5aoZtNSxfMOy9fW-x9v9ooGBJbwNiz5Q6ayFdZFgQ46EHCFOYJq4JwsfwC33EJXG_EH51dlFM2AhBSN65RYjdFESEJtzow4m-LIJUDUACn85faH1UPLnft453b0oXZHoWe_bmy9VIsH5VTxPC98rQiYqsA2GRg0QYqJpBxha9L3rf6hpOWPE6MiBM8k6kbpvzy4TEJcATI7Er0pWKLXpTHn1z4bUpUFgAe8q0xEn3l1IIW9td5XRtfyoGWQ9i_7bCpzyaEEDM5CZPM7QUixrvTwt1GHBf82VSqL6Hnblv0I2j0CmRwrr1uQq4LuR-u_5yM9Vsze117EbKFGTLJrV1UVadBRavPYvf418c1Y-iUuMXmwveuq-vqom1S6ivu5yJfQ%3D%3D)**

As I have traveled the country, I'm more convinced than ever that our best days are actually, truly - not in some cheesy politician kind of way - but actually ahead of us. That we are not in some inevitable national decline.

**[Be a part of our movement, Fellow American, by becoming our 35,000th donor!](http://links.vivek2024.com/u/click?_t=07471d1165224e98aee1aca8cd71f6e2&_m=de4711de874747a7b5f362673cbb4fb7&_e=sK2a_oaG2Edb7VmJpbi5aoZtNSxfMOy9fW-x9v9ooGBJbwNiz5Q6ayFdZFgQ46EHCFOYJq4JwsfwC33EJXG_EH51dlFM2AhBSN65RYjdFESEJtzow4m-LIJUDUACn85faH1UPLnft453b0oXZHoWe_bmy9VIsH5VTxPC98rQiYqsA2GRg0QYqJpBxha9L3rf6hpOWPE6MiBM8k6kbpvzy4TEJcATI7Er0pWKLXpTHn1z4bUpUFgAe8q0xEn3l1IIHvrYZhx1TCDyIzM7Lv99KYh7kojcIUdHi382FFHVOOkbl6vtGMIO-bZe13Ln366TEOBoiWNsqgxcQ8tUclHw39VBej5LspdAWSqKOs6xq-fFOhslDUKk3Jc8FVnZSF4M3o-CctB9wYvRl9GxU3q_7Q%3D%3D)**

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

body:
We are in a critical situation. | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63385646/406598607/17860314?refcode=ea.31f16339-24f4-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ms=ea.31f16339-24f4-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMzMTAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMzFmMTYzMzktMjRmNC1lZDExLTkwN2MtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=C3gizHIfWJwfvAqeJlQUb5FzH0rWlt5VF3tXLw994W8=)
---
Hi Peter, it’s Ron from Team Brandon.

[I'm heading into a meeting, so I'll keep this brief: Our mid-month deadline is just hours away, and we’re still $2,675 short of our goal. Can you rush a donation right now to help Brandon catch up?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63385651/406598612/-761526316?refcode=ea.31f16339-24f4-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ms=ea.31f16339-24f4-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMzMTAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMzFmMTYzMzktMjRmNC1lZDExLTkwN2MtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=C3gizHIfWJwfvAqeJlQUb5FzH0rWlt5VF3tXLw994W8=)

Please understand that this deadline could make or break our campaign. With _another_ big campaign filing deadline approaching at the end of the month, falling behind could be catastrophic.

We've set an ambitious $10,000 target that we need to hit to stay competitive with Tate Reeves and his millionaire buddies.

subject: Kentuckians are at the polls!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ANDY BESHEAR FOR GOVERNOR
body:

clean_body: | | If you want to help The Collective PAC build Black political power up and down the ballot, and across the country, then you’re in the right place. If you'd like to unsubscribe | | | It’s Election Day in Philadelphia, Peter! This is our LAST CHANCE to power Collective PAC-endorsed Black champion Cherelle Parker to victory in today’s Democratic Primary. | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately. | | | | | | Peter, we’ve said it before, and we’ll say it again: We’re committed to electing Black progressive champions up and down the ballot, across the country — and Philadelphia mayoral candidate Cherelle Parker is a perfect example. With Black mayors currently leading the four largest cities in America, it’s clear that Black voters are demanding representation in our government louder than ever — and we’re determined to give it to them, starting in Philadelphia! If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately. | | | | | | — The Collective PAC The Collective PAC is strategically focused on creating a truly equitable democracy where our nation’s local, state and federal governments have diverse and talented elected leadership and Black people are fully represented in positions of power to create the policies necessary to progress our communities forward. Since our inception in 2016, we have helped 110 candidates win general elections at the local, state and federal levels. We strive to support the next wave of progressive and unapologetic Black candidates who will usher in a sea of change in our political system while helping America fulfill its promise of democracy by creating a government that will truly be for the people and of the people. name: Cori Bush HQ
subject: Building momentum to fix the housing crisis
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cori Bush for Congress
body:
Your support helps us amplify Cori’s voice on housing insecurity and continue pushing for dignified, people-centered solutions to address the housing crisis.
#
Peter, we're building momentum in our fight for housing justice.
In March, we announced that Cori re-established the Congressional Caucus on Homelessness alongside three of her colleagues.
And earlier this month, the Caucus received its first briefing on the Biden Administration's plan to reduce homelessness by 25 percent by 2025.
[**Housing is a human right, and Cori won't stop fighting until we solve this housing crisis for everyone. Can you chip in $5 to help us continue generating public support and the political will to fix this problem?**](https://act.coribush.org/go/238?c0=cori-em-20230516.BfqK3z&refcode=em20230516-2703&t=1&akid=2703%2E1082990%2E410ZyE)
**[Donate $5](https://act.coribush.org/go/238?c0=cori-em-20230516.BfqK3z&refcode=em20230516-2703&t=20&akid=2703%2E1082990%2E410ZyE)**
Cori knows firsthand what it's like to live unhoused, and her perspective and passion on this issue make her an invaluable advocate in the Caucus and in Congress.
Right now, it's estimated that 580,000 individuals are unhoused in this country. Our policies are failing 580,000 people each and every day — and our government has a moral responsibility to take real action.
Your support helps us amplify Cori's voice on housing security and continue pushing for dignified, people-centered policy solutions to address the housing crisis. [**Can you chip in today?**](https://act.coribush.org/go/238?c0=cori-em-20230516.BfqK3z&refcode=em20230516-2703&t=21&akid=2703%2E1082990%2E410ZyE)
**[Donate $5](https://act.coribush.org/go/238?c0=cori-em-20230516.BfqK3z&refcode=em20230516-2703&t=40&akid=2703%2E1082990%2E410ZyE)**
Thank you,
Cori Bush HQ

**[Contribute ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cori-em-footer?refcode=em20230516-2703-footer&t=41&refcode2=2703_1082990_410ZyE&akid=2703%2E1082990%2E410ZyE) **
---
Follow us on **[Facebook](https://www.facebook.com/VoteCoriBush/)** , **[Twitter](https://twitter.com/CoriBush)** , **[Instagram](https://www.instagram.com/coribush/)** , and **[visit our website](https://coribush.org/)**. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Mail us: Cori Bush for Congress, 75 North Oaks Plaza, St. Louis, MO 63121.
Paid for by Cori Bush for Congress

Peter, Did you see Michelle’s announcement this morning? **She’s running to represent TX-15 — and the campaign officially launches TODAY.** We have our work cut out for us. We’re up against the worst of the worst — Monica De La Cruz, her Trumpian allies, and all the Big Money they can muster. It’s going to take all of us working together to take them on. **And the amount of support we can get on day one is VITAL to building the lasting power needed to win.** **[Will you become a founding donor to Michelle Vallejo’s campaign by chipping in $10 right now? Every single dollar we raise now matters.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953ySVaDaV5oWUMSiiW973_z_Zv1Lq14huz-FAP2L0N7p1RCpKJIExiZr4YJCorEyLhvakFI1UTvOOsScGV8UL5Tv3w6LCh7CSJRQnXuu5VfvOCAmYGXI3zgSHaxcFDhtcyJV9Qu2zrliSeHgBezohIjkrVk7JoW2-qjYeJhl1tc9zonnkkjct1QmkYNBrMk2VSos9e4MJKCY6fuy7hn3R-dhhnK3aR2g7uWg81JxV5YnpEj7Kw8bMxRpPN8G6iaa0HtQXQqHzJ1bCRVebaMX_29dpG70DyII-xiI5ZR2mGgN1oGnhg73cuBpay4p1nDxgN29t6y0Jag8LVewwkyR9_GS/3w8/xfrV_8sXQf6irMm0Zwf30w/h1/YAAywLGAkpyqlw-JB5AmnGQlxCdzOevrWypNgG4QeN4)** These first 24 hours are HUGE for us, Peter. That’s because what we raise today will be seen by _everyone._ That matters. A lot. Let us explain: For news outlets, political pundits, and especially Monica De La Cruz, our fundraising numbers will be used to gauge how much of a threat we are. **And we want to make sure they see thousands of people like you stepping up and supporting a campaign that stands for all South Texans.** We want to make sure they know from ON DAY ONE how formidable our movement really is. **[To do that we need as many people reading this email as possible to make a contribution of any size that you can afford right now. Your name will be a brick in the foundation of this campaign — and what sends a message to our opponents.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953ySVaDaV5oWUMSiiW973_z_Zv1Lq14huz-FAP2L0N7p1RCpKJIExiZr4YJCorEyLhugxmR5KAJZvNHN7pujqKXrNitF1SGvR_lh6TzHllX-OT4TmtEak6ijzkxQ-pJe42spYFmwj_PFazhb3wvEIbT3Pnezh9ggY0GmPjO9eLyMTndpVJ2aXU2veBIcETCISmVxCh_MSLCJ0wa8G8gSJzUXUOytYTFZc_837dhFJhMVueswcnDHsduNf-GC_y4I5s-AytDrmAzsOoYpWYgOn63bAItPOlgBLH_V6PzC_PRnlxw8KkBB3H-ItOSzs5W9a5Q1_XS37axAzqdQiAUXgTNi/3w8/xfrV_8sXQf6irMm0Zwf30w/h2/Z9eFCIYZ0K03tWdMrHy9GRMq9DoaziNoCUq5VBBRHlE)** Because remember, Monica De La Cruz is going to be paying close attention. Her well-connected corporate donors will be paying attention. The Republican establishment will be paying close attention. **Let’s give them something to be worried about.** Juntos, we can. Team Vallejo _\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: Michelle Vallejo [info@michellefortx15.com]
Date: May 16, 2023, 9:26 AM
Subject: An important announcement:_ **Hola Peter,****my name is Michelle Vallejo, and I am running for Congress to represent TX-15.**
In just a bit, I’m going to ask you to become a founding donor to our campaign. But first, I want to tell you a bit about myself and why I’m jumping into this race. I come from a big family of immigrants, farm workers and entrepreneurs. My parents, immigrants who made their way to the Rio Grande Valley from Mexico, did a little bit of everything to make ends meet. But running Pulga (flea market) Los Portales, serving thousands of our community members on a weekly basis and helping dozens of working-class entrepreneurs start their businesses, defined my family's values — our South Texan values. But my life changed forever when I was in college. While at Columbia University, after years of fighting multiple sclerosis, my mother took her last breath at just 46 years old. It was then I decided the best way to honor her legacy is to fight for a better future for my family. To fight for a better future for ALL of us — including you, Peter. Every day, I see how hard the people of South Texas work just to scrape by. At our family’s pulga, dozens of vendors come each week, hoping to make enough to put food on the table. They are the overlooked emprendedores who make our community strong. **I’m working for stronger and healthier neighborhoods in TX-15 and I have a plan to make this happen.** It starts with fighting for quality affordable healthcare, protecting workers, providing good-paying jobs and a thriving economy, protecting women’s reproductive rights — and that’s just the beginning. **[But to accomplish all of this, I need your help to jumpstart this campaign and put us in the best possible position for the fights ahead. Can you make a contribution and become a founding donor today? What we are able to raise today, and in these first few weeks, will be our first chance to show the state — and our opponents — just how much grassroots power we have.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953ySVaDaV5oWUMSiiW973_z_Zv1Lq14huz-FAP2L0N7p1RCpKJIExiZr4YJCorEyLhsQ_adh2lqZDWMYZUN4CiCymObwoX64iupzUXjVK4QAIv2dgXmgSYrTXy_PvhrRJzyIg184Y4dqN0ml9Z5fL4K4cTuu6AlGXIV9c8xp8Hw0qaikiRRMNl8OGCvH0UR4pbNvzDXgqXYNke58RIfJ5Yf0raK-B4erpJ798aeY3e4Bn61RszpmXWAB_DlRZscfVTw3VaUxKXOrvpDXqf4PA7gRjvinBtJCdEjVLHx32LFwKE-LqJ053pBGNWKR6JUxDzJbpjjQG6xP2GqJ25yPZwdj/3w8/xfrV_8sXQf6irMm0Zwf30w/h3/WzuY0qlz2pMF2v7l1i1G0OM15kXb_D-Gz0BMkIQSN14)** **[Become a Founding Donor](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953ySVaDaV5oWUMSiiW973_z_Zv1Lq14huz-FAP2L0N7p1RCpKJIExiZr4YJCorEyLhs44DFxSyTp8puA1_bafx3zJRPhUliTo_PO6rg6MrqNexIv4vBVdUeKfDXAbCRwhmtOanz9NX69WBQOCWRkltlwh5q7vBE0rC-LyWCUo6boFhcUCPNe1yR50RFYAdKqGvmTI2lfvA470S1t5Wyv47eJQmLYH4Cmm9UptqvKEnlP9rMDzUZf_T_cCoXFMaVG6FdyWCr-KKW20bokLHzqcEDiV4CKtadM3IohBTbZMS0lr_IBSQVzr0csZKSiiSodCzLwYdT1yJljmIWpb7KEA6Jp/3w8/xfrV_8sXQf6irMm0Zwf30w/h4/IYz-fK22JpUDFWEEGx9AS5902_jZpSbi2R7v9Poglv4)** We’re at a critical moment for the future of South Texas. Monica De La Cruz makes a lot of promises to us, la gente. But in Congress, her record tells a different story. Her budget bill makes devastating cuts, from slashing veterans’ healthcare to taking away millions from our schools, and even jeopardizing Medicare and Social Security. What’s more, she’d let the government interfere in women’s private medical decisions and take away our freedoms. She wants to distract us with extremist issues in hopes that we won’t notice how badly her policies are hurting our communities. And, more importantly, so that we won’t notice how powerful we can be if we all come together to fight for a better world. South Texas needs an advocate — no a una politica vendida. I’m not afraid of the fight ahead because I’ve been underestimated and questioned before. Time and time again while growing up, I dealt with questions about why I spoke Spanglish, or why I mixed English and Spanish, about how I wore my curly hair and whether it looked too frizzy or if it was professional enough. But instead of letting that change me, I chose to proudly represent my roots through my education and work. It’s why I decided to return to the Rio Grande Valley and get to work. And it’s something I’ll continue in this fight to become your next Congresswoman of TX-15. ¡Vamos por Quince! Michelle Vallejo

name: Conservatives Give
subject: Ancient Christianity: a new free course from Hillsdale
body:
I've always been fascinated by the story of the earliest Christians.

| This sponsored message from Conservatives Give is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f706c8e2b6924442867acc29bb10e341&_e=eGv8qI3u-L9WWfMWi6iCPo1o6_F8CIS4JSLlX1-Jw_xX4hg0fqczG7-kTu67aUJEWZBsd51pAHkTRBAiHwmbWiYmSb9WMx9mcTv64sixRVIOU1FTeouU_aa9a9p-KGRmflp0xHdE-uKJlIsA2ylXPmHxoTzt9YhMYehhG3xkk6ujtIuAGTEkjkzmpscsLD-pgfVnSWltzepF3CyRzfNWKya_XR5gvzGvtDCd3WPAF72SIWryu0H4ppa5pSdxjDdpA5tWHvmJiGbWrUYoK1b6qi-3HllnJfkER5ah_4Q7YjmMI5dzUWpznWLF-UnmV0foskG0PNbGVd3KH3EqAFxJbbnaNaG5XSoKKo-YkeP0oMXL-vmdG8JvjfXyAKrpj9VdDWM1UHNNxXeF_MeyNo9n4ONwjDacHsc_9bJ-qglhwPg%3D)
---
| | Dear Friend,

I've always been fascinated by the story of the earliest Christians.

I wanted to learn more about how they worshipped and prayed, faced persecution and hardship, and settled theological disputes.

But, beyond reading the New Testament and some of the stories of early Christian martyrs, it was daunting to figure out how to proceed. I always got lost in foreign names and locations and the complicated history of Imperial Rome. The result was a large gap in my understanding of how the Christian faith took shape and spread from the apostles through the age of Constantine.

To uncover this fascinating history, we've produced our newest online course, "Ancient Christianity," which we'll release on May 23.

In this course, Professor Kenneth Calvert is your guide through the first four centuries of Christianity as he explains the remarkable ways the new faith transformed the Roman world.

**You can watch the video trailer for the course and preregister today using the secure link below:**

**[https://online.hillsdale.edu/landing/ancient-christianity/prereg](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f706c8e2b6924442867acc29bb10e341&_e=eGv8qI3u-L9WWfMWi6iCPo1o6_F8CIS4JSLlX1-Jw_xX4hg0fqczG7-kTu67aUJEWZBsd51pAHkTRBAiHwmbWiYmSb9WMx9mcTv64sixRVIOU1FTeouU_aa9a9p-KGRmflp0xHdE-uKJlIsA2ylXPmHxoTzt9YhMYehhG3xkk6ujtIuAGTEkjkzmpscsLD-pgfVnSWltzepF3CyRzfNWKya_XR5gvzGvtDCd3WPAF72SIWryu0H4ppa5pSdxjDdpA5tWHvmJiGbWrUYoK1b6qoyXdMgTsAtD607Pd-JhPrfbPqkQKH2UjRBP_mXBX2SOE6yVS0x84dSBZjatI3XSpc2dSGB2qU5ImPsLzNjfDeoC_8OJh8_QVIsYzEMJQCXWDTa2KAwYcZpUW8Vlx6Mek13knX92eR-SnaEO5REpW14%3D)**
I hope you join us in learning more about the courage and faith of the first Christians.

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

Conservatives Give
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_

And I’m asking you to stand with me.
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63387411/406604926/-576970961?refcode=em_fr_2023.05.16_b1_cd_all&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMWI4ZDE1ZC0yOGY0LWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=myZXsqThuTrAFEHean8U8iv76R4OE2h8P9jXqHOE7_c=) Hi Derek,

I know receiving a lot of emails this early in the race can be frustrating, but it’s because we are fighting for our common good, and we know we won’t win without you.

**[My team is looking to raise $3,000 by tomorrow night so that we can fight back against attack ads from extreme Republican groups, cut through the noise to reach western Pennsylvanians, and prove that our people-powered team from 2022 is still standing strong. Can you chip in to help us get there?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63387412/406604927/-576970961?refcode=em_fr_2023.05.16_b1_cd_all&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMWI4ZDE1ZC0yOGY0LWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=myZXsqThuTrAFEHean8U8iv76R4OE2h8P9jXqHOE7_c=)**

Derek, we are in a crucial moment as a country, a country that I love deeply and think is worth fighting for. **And let’s be honest: The right-wing extremists in charge of the House aren’t equipped to deal with the challenges we’re facing.**

With Kevin McCarthy leading the charge, House Republicans are focused on protecting tax cuts for billionaires, banning abortion, slashing benefits for veterans, and doing nothing to strengthen our democracy. I’m not afraid to stand up to them, Derek, _and I’m asking you to stand with me._

**[This is a grassroots-funded campaign, so I’m counting on your support. We still need to raise $1,400 before Wednesday night. Can you chip in $15 or whatever you can today to help us hit our goal before time runs out?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63387413/406604928/-576970961?refcode=em_fr_2023.05.16_b1_cd_all&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMWI4ZDE1ZC0yOGY0LWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=myZXsqThuTrAFEHean8U8iv76R4OE2h8P9jXqHOE7_c=)**

Thank you so much for your support,

Chris Deluzio | | Chris Deluzio is a voting rights lawyer and Iraq war veteran representing Pennsylvania's 17th District in Congress. He's a champion for our unions, and he's fighting to guarantee good healthcare for every American, taking on corporate power, and advocating for bold action to protect and strengthen our democracy. [Please chip in to help Chris build a strong campaign that can win against the Republican machine.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63387414/406604929/-576970961?refcode=em_fr_2023.05.16_b1_cd_all&amount=3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMWI4ZDE1ZC0yOGY0LWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=myZXsqThuTrAFEHean8U8iv76R4OE2h8P9jXqHOE7_c=)

clean_body: And I’m asking you to stand with me. | = Hi Derek, I know receiving a lot of emails this early in the race can be frustrating, but it’s because we are fighting for our common good, and we know we won’t win without you. = Derek, we are in a crucial moment as a country, a country that I love deeply and think is worth fighting for. And let’s be honest: The right-wing extremists in charge of the House aren’t equipped to deal with the challenges we’re facing. With Kevin McCarthy leading the charge, House Republicans are focused on protecting tax cuts for billionaires, banning abortion, slashing benefits for veterans, and doing nothing to strengthen our democracy. I’m not afraid to stand up to them, Derek, and I’m asking you to stand with me. = Thank you so much for your support, Chris Deluzio | | Chris Deluzio is a voting rights lawyer and Iraq war veteran representing Pennsylvania's 17th District in Congress. He's a champion for our unions, and he's fighting to guarantee good healthcare for every American, taking on corporate power, and advocating for bold action to protect and strengthen our democracy. = | = = | Paid for by Chris Deluzio for Congress Chris Deluzio for Congress PO Box 16210 Pittsburgh, PA 15242 United States Chris Deluzio is a United States Veteran. If you don’t have a chance to read that whole article, I’ll give you the TL;DR:
Backed by dark money groups, Republicans are coordinating and replicating legislation to suppress the freedom to vote across the nation in a desperate attempt to retain power and enact their extremist agenda. In 2023, they’ve already passed 19 laws in 11 states to restrict access to voting or add new restrictions to the administration of elections, and they’ve introduced hundreds more. Among the laws passed is SB 222, which Gov. Brian Kemp signed this month to criminalize county workers and deny them funds that keep our elections system functioning.
Their anti-voter attempts may seem “under the radar,” but as the Political Director at Fair Fight, I want you to know that our team is diligently tracking these insidious efforts. **And when extremists attempt to strip away our freedoms, we take action.**
Fair Fight is closely monitoring national voter suppression trends and bad actors, training volunteers to identify and combat voter disinformation in Georgia, providing organizing and fundraising support to our pro-voter partners in states with rampant voter suppression, and building Democratic power to reject the far-right’s anti-voter agenda.
We’re so grateful for your support, and hope you’ll be here for the long haul as we continue to push for free and fair elections.
Let’s keep fighting, 💪
Nicole

State Democrats are facing six crucial special elections **_today_** – these elections could have a HUGE impact on chamber margins in the Pennsylvania and New Hampshire Houses.

name: Mike Thompson
subject: June 24, 2023
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mike Thompson For Congress [unsubscribe](https://support
body:
|
---
| | Peter,

We are all heartbroken by the tragic mass shootings and every day gun violence that plagues our nation.

That's why I want to personally invite you to join me in taking action to end gun violence at this year's Rock the Ride. Please take a moment to read the invitation from my team below and RSVP today.

Let's make a difference together,

Mike

* * *
**_Forwarded Message:_**

Mike is a huge advocate for Gun Violence Prevention. As a lifelong hunter and gun owner himself, he knows firsthand the obligation to ensure firearms are used responsibly. That’s why he’s introduced a bipartisan bill to expand background checks and close any loopholes that might lead to devastating shootings.

While Mike is working with his colleagues to enact common-sense gun reform into law, there’s a way you can get involved! Join Mike in the sixth annual Rock the Ride Napa Valley which will be held on Saturday, June 24!
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63387883/406606547/313167857?source=EM_NBI_MT_20230516_INV_RTR_0_ID_TeamThompson_NA_NA_RocktheRide&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDQ0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNTJlNGVlNy0yOWY0LWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=flQyqFDs1Vy0DSz7GJdy5KbyEvftSlLfHwwydyfx4ZY=&emci=9c2e4ee7-29f4-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=a52e4ee7-29f4-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=2678920)
Rock the Ride USA was created to raise funds for local and national nonprofit organizations working to end gun violence. Every day in our country 30 people are killed with a gun, with hundreds more injured. Communities across our country are devastated all too often for us to stay silent.

**_[Will you take part in making a difference on June 24, 2023? clean_body: | | | Peter, We are all heartbroken by the tragic mass shootings and every day gun violence that plagues our nation. That's why I want to personally invite you to join me in taking action to end gun violence at this year's Rock the Ride. Please take a moment to read the invitation from my team below and RSVP today. Let's make a difference together, Mike Forwarded Message: Mike is a huge advocate for Gun Violence Prevention. As a lifelong hunter and gun owner himself, he knows firsthand the obligation to ensure firearms are used responsibly. That’s why he’s introduced a bipartisan bill to expand background checks and close any loopholes that might lead to devastating shootings. While Mike is working with his colleagues to enact common-sense gun reform into law, there’s a way you can get involved! Join Mike in the sixth annual Rock the Ride Napa Valley which will be held on Saturday, June 24! Rock the Ride USA was created to raise funds for local and national nonprofit organizations working to end gun violence. Every day in our country 30 people are killed with a gun, with hundreds more injured. Communities across our country are devastated all too often for us to stay silent. ** — Team Thompson | Authorized & Paid For By Mike Thompson For Congress Mike Thompson for Congress PO Box 10541 Napa, CA 94581 United States

Our rural county organizing program increased Democratic success in the rural counties we had the resources to invest in by three points in 2022 – **enough to flip battleground states across the country.**
Now, we’re in the process of scaling up our program to do just that by investing in rural progressives throughout six key states: Arizona, Georgia, Michigan, Nevada, Pennsylvania, and Wisconsin.

body:
Enough is enough.

| |
---
Hi, Peter, great to meet you. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63387935/406606744/-938248794?refcode=230516_jh_split_img&ms=230516_jh_split&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDU3MjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMWQ4NDA2MWEtMmFmNC1lZDExLTkwN2MtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=pkQVnyVslrGwRWBFF4OCegidnTYOTL0WCJvxgaQnshI=) My name is Jade Harris, and I'm running for the 3rd Virginia State Senate District to represent the area that I've always called home. I served as the first ever Vice-Mayor of my hometown, Glasgow, Virginia, as well as on its town council. Now, I'm running to bring that dedicated progressive spirit to Richmond. I'm a Rockbridge County native – a community in the Shenandoah Valley with a love for farming, rural values and, unfortunately, Donald Trump. **I got into this race because I was brought up on rural values where there was no place for rabble rousing, BS, or lies.** Looking at the politicians that represented my family and neighbors, the political BS was all I could see. At the same time, Virginia's infrastructure, job environment, and public education system are in desperate need of revitalization. **Republicans have made Virginia the center of partisan debate on those issues. I'm running for the Virginia State Senate because I understand that the time for debate is over – we need to get real and get to work.** In Richmond, I'll fight for expanded mental healthcare access, reproductive choice, strengthening unions, and supporting our farmers. That's why I'm immensely proud to be endorsed by United Rural Democrats, an organization that understands the need to put partisanship aside and deliver for rural communities. [**_It's more important than ever to elect Democrats to office – especially in Virginia where the margins are razor thin. I'm running for the Virginia State Senate because I understand that the time for debate is over – we need to get real and get to work. In Richmond, I'll fight for expanded mental healthcare access, reproductive choice, strengthening unions, and supporting our farmers. That's why I'm immensely proud to be endorsed by United Rural Democrats, an organization that understands the need to put partisanship aside and deliver for rural communities. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately: = = = = Thank you for your support, Peter. \- Jade Harris, Democratic Candidate for the Virginia State Senate | United Rural Democrats (URD) is leading the effort to rebuild the Democratic Party in rural America. If we're going to take back our country, we need a 50-state strategy to organize in every community across the country. Will you support our network of activists on the ground as we work to rebuild our party's infrastructure and flip these areas blue? = = PAID FOR BY UNITED RURAL DEMOCRATS Email is a critical way to stay in touch with our supporters, but if you wish to unsubscribe, you may do so . United Rural Democrats PO Box 44 Tampico, IL 61283 United States

body:

The United States endured **18** separate climate disasters in 2022 with a total cost of _**$165 billion**_ , according to the annual report from the National Oceanic and Atmospheric Administration.

The annual report highlights the extreme effects of climate change as the frequency of climate-related disasters is increasing. The cost of climate change is not just monetary, the loss of life is also increasing. **_We need to take action now and hold the fossil fuel industry and their cronies accountable._** [_**Will you contribute $5 today to help fuel our efforts to end the reign of the fossil fuel industry?**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/63387905/406606653/931978131?refcode=BLU-JANE-20230516-1-EM&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImI3MWVkNmY3LTI5ZjQtZWQxMS05MDdjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=AHTi71ES3T43DHgdhO7P_qqGz-ExcrTzK3uLUnUwNSQ=)
| [CONTRIBUTE ](https://click.everyaction.com/k/63387907/406606656/931978131?refcode=BLU-JANE-20230516-1-EM&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImI3MWVkNmY3LTI5ZjQtZWQxMS05MDdjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=AHTi71ES3T43DHgdhO7P_qqGz-ExcrTzK3uLUnUwNSQ=)
---
**That’s why we need to elect climate champions in down-ballot races across the country.** Our mayors, city council members, commissioners, and many more local leaders have the power to enact crucial legislation at the local level that would combat climate change.

[_**Will you contribute $5 today to support the Jane Fonda Climate PAC as we gear up to support more climate champions?**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/63387909/406606658/931978131?refcode=BLU-JANE-20230516-1-EM&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImI3MWVkNmY3LTI5ZjQtZWQxMS05MDdjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=AHTi71ES3T43DHgdhO7P_qqGz-ExcrTzK3uLUnUwNSQ=)

name: Ro Khanna
subject: Americans deserve freedom from medical debt
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ro for Congress
body:
https://rokhanna.com [https://rokhanna.com]

Friend,

Our current healthcare system is broken:

$275 for a vial on insulin.

$8,000 for an MRI.

$20,000 for an ER visit.

These grim examples illustrate the stark reality of medical debt for millions of Americans, even those who have health insurance.

The United States is the richest country in the world; no one here should go broke because they fall sick. Yet medical debt, which impacts nearly 1 in 3 people, is the leading cause of bankruptcy for middle- and working-class Americans.

It’s time to wipe the slate clean and cancel all medical debt.

Sign the petition: Demand that Congress deliver freedom from medical debt for millions of Americans. [https://act.rokhanna.com/a/forgive-medical-debt-petition?contactdata=qV0vMoedPK2xamp9re4taKjtdWtiw1E1aGix7H7tpDW1oQ2/jdjj5T8TCofc67oAgbbQIi6umyoU0obEgxHPGUJbyqnC38PxzUmQ/lqLjaIZ4IOnNRRDpeMQHQY3ZE/G2LsWj04SiigooPAyrqs1CA==]

Sign the Petition [https://act.rokhanna.com/a/forgive-medical-debt-petition?contactdata=qV0vMoedPK2xamp9re4taKjtdWtiw1E1aGix7H7tpDW1oQ2/jdjj5T8TCofc67oAgbbQIi6umyoU0obEgxHPGUJbyqnC38PxzUmQ/lqLjaIZ4IOnNRRDpeMQHQY3ZE/G2LsWj04SiigooPAyrqs1CA==]

I’m proud to announce that Bernie Sanders and I are getting ready to introduce the Freedom from Medical Debt Initiative, game-changing legislation that would end the burden of astronomical doctor bills. Our initiative will pressure Congress and the White House to protect patients from the horrendous price-gouging and predatory debt-collecting tactics that bankrupt hardworking Americans every day.

Sign if you agree: Every American deserves Freedom from Medical Debt. [https://act.rokhanna.com/a/forgive-medical-debt-petition?contactdata=qV0vMoedPK2xamp9re4taKjtdWtiw1E1aGix7H7tpDW1oQ2/jdjj5T8TCofc67oAgbbQIi6umyoU0obEgxHPGUJbyqnC38PxzUmQ/lqLjaIZ4IOnNRRDpeMQHQY3ZE/G2LsWj04SiigooPAyrqs1CA==]

Healthcare is a right—it shouldn’t come with a price tag. Freedom from Medical Debt is the first step in establishing Medicare for All. This is a bill that every American deserves.

In solidarity,
Ro

name: Josh Hawley

Peter, it’s Emilia. I wanted to reach out to make sure you saw my team’s message (below) from earlier this month – it’s important.

I can’t even begin to stress just how dangerous their platform really is.

[**The only way to safeguard our freedoms and protect the American people from this radical, out-of-touch GOP agenda is to take back the House Majority. name: Our Revolution
subject: Election Alert in Philly
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
Peter Willis,

Today is Election Day in Philadelphia, and
Our Revolution, Bernie Sanders, AOC, and more are going all-out to elect
union organizer and former teacher Helen Gym.

Thanks to our progressive organizing, Helen is ahead in the polls, but the

name: David Trone
subject: Response Requested (one question on the debt ceiling)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by David Trone for Maryland
body:
Peter,

MAGA Republicans are refusing to raise the debt ceiling.

But when Trump wanted to raise it? They obliged not once, not twice, but THREE times without batting an eye .

Their objectives are clear.

MAGA Republicans are hellbent on bringing the government to a standstill so that they can do what they do best: perpetuate a culture war on critical issues like climate change, infrastructure, and more.
I’m fed up, but I want your perspective.

Do you believe Congress should evade an economic crisis and possible recession and raise the debt ceiling? Take the one question survey right now >> https://secure.ngpvan.com/4uZCKFnhS06QlLYwXZg05A2

>> YES. We need to raise the debt ceiling to save the economy. >> https://secure.ngpvan.com/4uZCKFnhS06QlLYwXZg05A2

>> NO. We can allow Republicans to crash the economy. >> https://secure.ngpvan.com/4uZCKFnhS06QlLYwXZg05A2

Thank you for sharing your opinion!

– David Trone

Take the Survey [https://secure.ngpvan.com/4uZCKFnhS06QlLYwXZg05A2]

[**May 16, 1860:** The Republican National Convention met over the course of three days to nominate candidates for President and Vice President. The relatively new political party nominated Abraham Lincoln and Hannibal Hamlin, who went on to win their election. President Lincoln became the first Republican President, and he appointed all of his Republican opponents to positions in his cabinet.](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=046bc55a49884232bc9523742c6e4213&_e=ZR8xGudgRSUes1taf4pwHDTSdG7ZDIKTckQiiPZaZr0owBqb-fkq2gG2_RiQL8eqDjAQvb-Bg1vNINCmcKprwnLA4VUtcaSaTekEQSFJHA_l_YWzevIXcrejpYGN5T1UqD6KZanNyWd7C_wvs6pZNSVH5nRSCHMW9iIIvJZ6B6-9dz-Ae5U2xkcHSwwUEgkm0-DjqygkZomFTfenH1Cmr7OEb5ibMy4LwM3PAOlgqCRs6pqGnzcpZQpjCzZF5a9yzJI6y8eAkqRmuP3pX_YpFE2G-5EiY6WQ96rU3ATVoUNWOv3MparosPcb2pPS0epgEHEFWvKTT0sz0barizLvDNkMnZkwUfuRv2oyrctnsbw%3D) **Source -[wikipedia.org](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=046bc55a49884232bc9523742c6e4213&_e=ZR8xGudgRSUes1taf4pwHDTSdG7ZDIKTckQiiPZaZr0owBqb-fkq2gG2_RiQL8eqDjAQvb-Bg1vNINCmcKprwnLA4VUtcaSaTekEQSFJHA_l_YWzevIXcrejpYGN5T1UqD6KZanNyWd7C_wvs6pZNSVH5nRSCHMW9iIIvJZ6B6-9dz-Ae5U2xkcHSwwUEgkmrIU9OOIiSxARV_RBMYDAY1DwKLmeM65SAvPZnSyT-MmSSmpZCCsAD_qUoSrUwk_YN5fu0jQqo_Bb7N7sIA5PDA-1hivAwpXy1P7oyAKpgENzcDtUy3o65cGvpMsIi_IS5M6GdY73poJGCYDiY7jrO5O3AwnnKApRQGdy8knnD0w%3D)[](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=046bc55a49884232bc9523742c6e4213&_e=ZR8xGudgRSUes1taf4pwHClgkRZf6os7N6-9MYUff4iiTJK3Ruf7FmNdRoys1uylUlfkOkgH8OvDnWvRYsacLAG-pK9qLeLFQkNmYHpBXRaqq-ytVbqCmKdjhU9Wx6xuvBR3oJNAJ-CLHzgXMItLOO62S7qZuXpr0BqhbnZX1nO0pBS5SeBHF2KRuLVcudGSJMDyoLz2jd34TZ__oCpQ6SsI8G-ZX0NqbTxM9FR75S2Ft_sI6gTsqKVJQaD2wvDD)**

[**May 16, 1918:** Congress enacted the Sedition Act of 1918 following the Espionage Act to prevent government and military criticism during wartime. The act made it an imprisonable offense to use disloyal, profane, scurrilous, or abusive language about the American government, Armed Forces, or flag. [**May 16, 1986:** Iconic Hollywood classic ‘Top Gun’ premiered across the United States, where it instantly captured American audiences’ attention. The film was an immediate success, becoming the top-earning movie of 1986. name: Michelle Vallejo
subject: The path to a blue Texas runs through TX-15
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
| **Hola folks, my name is Michelle Vallejo, and I am running for Congress to represent TX-15.**

Border communities like ours are so often overlooked — but the reality is that TX-15 is _the_ most competitive race in Texas and one of our best shots at turning Texas blue and taking back the House.

I’m running for Congress because I see just how hard everyday, working people are struggling just to get by. Juntos, we have a chance to build a better future for South Texas and for ALL of us — including you.

[**But before I can get to Congress and fight to do just that, I need your help to put us in the best possible position on our launch day. Will you become one of our founding donors by splitting a donation between this campaign and Voter Protection Project today?**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/45350?t=6&akid=7754%2E878179%2Eyl4dGx) | [BECOME A FOUNDING DONOR »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/45350?t=7&akid=7754%2E878179%2Eyl4dGx)
---
We’re at a critical moment for the future of Texas. Republican politicians like Ted Cruz and Monica De La Cruz in TX-15 make a lot of promises — but in Congress, their records tell a different story. One full of devastating budget cuts from slashing veterans’ health care to taking away millions from our schools, to even jeopardizing Medicare and Social Security. On top of that, they’d let the government interfere in women’s private medical decisions and take away our right to choose what to do with our bodies.

**We need real leadership in Congress — someone who is ready to stand up and fight the hard battles to protect our rights to vote, to make choices about our own bodies, and to thriving, healthy communities.**

I’m not afraid of the fight ahead because I’ve been underestimated and questioned before. But instead of letting that change me, I chose to proudly represent my roots through my education and work. It’s why I decided to return to the Rio Grande Valley and get to work.

[**Friend, we have a chance to take back the House AND the state of Texas. The path to turning Texas blue runs through TX-15, and that’s why I’m asking you to step up and make a split contribution between this campaign and Voter Protection Project.**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/45350?t=8&akid=7754%2E878179%2Eyl4dGx)
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Michelle Vallejo and VPP will go through immediately:
[CONTRIBUTE $10 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/45351?t=9&akid=7754%2E878179%2Eyl4dGx)
---
[CONTRIBUTE $25 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/45352?t=10&akid=7754%2E878179%2Eyl4dGx)
[CONTRIBUTE $50 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/45353?t=11&akid=7754%2E878179%2Eyl4dGx)
[CONTRIBUTE $100 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/45354?t=12&akid=7754%2E878179%2Eyl4dGx)
[Or a custom donation »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/45350?t=13&akid=7754%2E878179%2Eyl4dGx)
¡Vamos por Quince!

Michelle Vallejo
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=7754%2E878179%2Eyl4dGx). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=7754%2E878179%2Eyl4dGx).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=7754%2E878179%2Eyl4dGx) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=14&akid=7754%2E878179%2Eyl4dGx). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=7754%2E878179%2Eyl4dGx)
---
[Donate Just One Time »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/124?t=5&akid=7754%2E878179%2Eyl4dGx)

name: State Freedom Caucus Network
subject: Freedom Caucus Update
body:
Freedom Caucuses don’t just make a difference at the state level. When they raise their voices in opposition to the horrible policies of the Biden Admin, they get results for you at the federal level too. | | [Unsubscribe](http://links.statefreedomcaucus.co/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=1b6c04157c924c98ad4a6127d8bd1e6c&_s=b896d6a2c1a1445eb9fcb2a87e7ce4b3&_t=u-e9VvEFtl1NVcWTdh5qPgj3auqS9E5v14HalHdWznRT-jylp9Jy46Hfv-YS3d0bJIg4cQ-hgj7TaKwsw8c4TgMWH6APMyMfcN3cmtTwYRk%3D) | [Mark as Junk](http://links.statefreedomcaucus.co/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=1b6c04157c924c98ad4a6127d8bd1e6c&_s=b896d6a2c1a1445eb9fcb2a87e7ce4b3&_t=u-e9VvEFtl1NVcWTdh5qPgj3auqS9E5v14HalHdWznRT-jylp9Jy46Hfv-YS3d0bJIg4cQ-hgj7TaKwsw8c4TgMWH6APMyMfcN3cmtTwYRk%3D)

|
---
Friends, You've heard about it in the news. The Biden Administration recently attempted to implement a truly absurd rule that would increase fees on responsible homeowners to subsidize those with bad credit. As if hardworking families haven't suffered enough in Joe Biden's America, now they wanted to punish those who take care of their credit and harm future mortgage borrowers. In response, all 11 State Freedom Caucuses signed a [letter](http://links.statefreedomcaucus.co/u/click?_t=1b6c04157c924c98ad4a6127d8bd1e6c&_m=b896d6a2c1a1445eb9fcb2a87e7ce4b3&_e=4x6GWYKEFprSYNxGgm-hWdXAxHbAgBvTdDCdC1rUFGs4l8D4Y2Pf9_o9t4V5mSYcuxSSfVUaK00TDOE99SIUErp0QJsQvkWraLEa02AcPVD-WbCdTxCXTdS5uwkbwKNpcAGMXVDDFfottDr6fU1nYZagnWeFhxjdfkg_0nR618wzKXu5_CkT60DqUXHPVQMG7dW-fBvpEZySv8tPxJeLXHNJSWYCiuBDXApHxAbBxt5j5BBFRfmdsUhoUmdgQbNS) to FHFA Director Sandra Thompson demanding they rescind this terrible new regulation. It wasn't long after that [they did just that.](http://links.statefreedomcaucus.co/u/click?_t=1b6c04157c924c98ad4a6127d8bd1e6c&_m=b896d6a2c1a1445eb9fcb2a87e7ce4b3&_e=4x6GWYKEFprSYNxGgm-hWdKnsJZm-Uy8ywdABzunz08EckaWnsbEK31YR4GbetpwA8Tmm52fEVZ3jAc0pyDG4-588g2PgCm3Wb9hNhG52x04vBajVjfma4pGz7JuJZyxotz0D2VjRR4P1xQIenN_Lg5hg_vEE6rqka8ZkrKJ4NyADsAgmIuV9YPUcuCEEqFePrIBUwNvteIWeCNA3G5TlxGEy0sSEixHVQeAQN1KweSjCLJM2mAtDzzojvwhKkg_mpLNhSpg4niKNuM7wnyjC74EcIHXfvJY9KTIWyE4T9qySM3CPh2s1VLA0YY9fDRB_J3xd_gOp49YzF0kuOVLfTYP9hYouut_RCJ_VhaWYnZYClH1IRJAARrFYQcT8G0Q) Freedom Caucuses don't just make a difference at the state level. When they raise their voices in opposition to the horrible policies of the Biden Admin, they get results for you at the federal level too. **Arizona:** It's no surprise, but Democrats are furious at the Arizona Freedom Caucus. The AZFC negotiated a budget with Democrat Governor Katie Hobbs that protected the state's school choice program. Most Democrat lawmakers opposed the bill because they are owned by the teachers' union. The budget, sponsored by AZFC Chairman Jake Hoffman, also delivered some serious tax relief - to the tune of $260 million. The state's most toxic leftist columnist said Hobbs "got rolled" by the AZ Freedom Caucus. [ ](https://substackcdn.com/image/fetch/f_auto,q_auto:good,fl_progressive:steep/https%3A%2F%2Fsubstack-post-media.s3.amazonaws.com%2Fpublic%2Fimages%2Ff09903c1-b88d-4f5e-93d6-89e8e4a65682_412x307.png) The AZ Freedom Caucus also led the way on House passage of HB 2545. The bill would prevent the state from enforcing any rules created by international public health entities like the progressive World Health Organization. The AZFC helped write the bill, pushed it to the House floor, and got it over the finish line. This is one example of our state freedom caucuses echoing support for the House Freedom Caucus in Washington. HFC member Rep. Andy Biggs of Arizona is the lead sponsor of HR 79, a bill that would require the United States to immediately withdraw from the WHO. The Network also is helping other state freedom caucuses pass similar legislation. **South Carolina:** The Palmetto State wrapped up its legislative session last week. You may recall that the year began with the RINO leadership in the House kicking the SC Freedom Caucus out of the GOP caucus for refusing to sign their loyalty pledge to never criticize a fellow Republican. Liberal Republicans were constantly undermining the good work of the SC Freedom Caucus throughout the session. But the good news is that the conservative grassroots is livid with the RINOs. The York County GOP became the _**sixth county**_ Republican Party in SC to officially censure the House GOP leadership. This follows similar moves by Lexington, Anderson, Newberry, Pickens, and Greenville. Together, these counties represent over 1.4 million people. That's almost 30 percent of South Carolina's popular. And it represents a huge portion of the state's Republican base. [ ](https://substackcdn.com/image/fetch/f_auto,q_auto:good,fl_progressive:steep/https%3A%2F%2Fsubstack-post-media.s3.amazonaws.com%2Fpublic%2Fimages%2Fed03ec8d-672e-4d7c-95f1-7d63974deb8d_1188x930.png) **Pennsylvania:** The PA Freedom Caucus is taking on two particularly egregious left-wing agendas in the Keystone State. Rather than address skyrocketing crime, Democrats in the legislature are attempting to repeal the state's "Stand Your Ground" law, that allows you to legally defend yourself from being attacked. [ ](https://substackcdn.com/image/fetch/f_auto,q_auto:good,fl_progressive:steep/https%3A%2F%2Fsubstack-post-media.s3.amazonaws.com%2Fpublic%2Fimages%2F9f605976-c8b1-44ac-bbb4-d0376466d8e3_1194x1286.png) In addition, every PAFC member voted against funding Penn State University due to their hospital's policy of providing sex changes to children. More on that to come this week. **Louisiana:** The Bayou State's legislature just began its session and things are already heating up. In our [last email](http://links.statefreedomcaucus.co/u/click?_t=1b6c04157c924c98ad4a6127d8bd1e6c&_m=b896d6a2c1a1445eb9fcb2a87e7ce4b3&_e=4x6GWYKEFprSYNxGgm-hWaTuxjSE4E1QE7ksx2yhXXNdFVICWCNuRgGpqYi95TeuhxoDyfTeqGlzC8Qd225QS9JmUJe00rs5sIkMf8kP5GEdIMpb7oMbsmBv5r83fH9Re3-nXdRcKkEs5bQpnTcBQHOEuyzRvGuN2cve_wNDyJp7kojhnbbzO6x3KD3j1jVuKiZOzV1TX8xZuy4CdFwwbvVzzlaty0R2vM1eurPMv2I%3D), we talked about the madness that occurred at the Capitol after the LA Freedom Caucus led the charge to stop the grooming of children in schools and ban sex changes for minors. A lot of [victories](http://links.statefreedomcaucus.co/u/click?_t=1b6c04157c924c98ad4a6127d8bd1e6c&_m=b896d6a2c1a1445eb9fcb2a87e7ce4b3&_e=4x6GWYKEFprSYNxGgm-hWU9KS_0GY_3_68OeLyFc8t_y2G36rPe1xolilquZaF0P0JA9G3v6q_u3W7yJJXawYBoGGc4antFhxkQGjBYuGLCZ3OPiyJGhZMHFxqlQ3S_3S5uLnzoQZalpUdWHtWtp9xmj1WYQ5hUCQ6mB2uTg8uU8AJ4IcMwnYz83lGrJtmGL8V1cjCU2aYtjjpgoUYVDaK7lRAQm8bUCwIfOQIeiZ01qMdHa0jkj9h2llGD846d9HSoENdMYE0Pygd4JqL7In9pOOoCWtDp6UE8uam5YNJ_Faeww8-qNPntZDQkpLRRN) have already occurred, such as bills passed banning covid vaccine mandates forever, bumping up the penalties for fentanyl dealers, and requiring financial literacy courses in schools. More will be coming down the pipeline very soon so stay tuned. **Idaho:** Since the Idaho legislature is out of session, two of our IDFC members [traveled](http://links.statefreedomcaucus.co/u/click?_t=1b6c04157c924c98ad4a6127d8bd1e6c&_m=b896d6a2c1a1445eb9fcb2a87e7ce4b3&_e=4x6GWYKEFprSYNxGgm-hWeskTgwIrtqq1B-brFxrwtRdIAbs48Uny_m5klNfVbygE6O4RkiDQBG9GZNo-VJNViGXPx53lK4OyQyKCz4yE1wyhe9Z3ljkR_XMs_FPUycCXUbZ2wdOFcNlRMKST1AhmeaujMQrKJcmfQ-dSVG8KYiv_GwwFw8Ea1Io9kB68Sdcf5OfHFYfdCcK9QwIeloJKvVQO-0bTiwvOFczUlL43gLGYOFfZkg9jdXIu6FRjO7N) to the southern border to witness the crisis unfold firsthand following the end of Title 42. **JOIN THE FIGHT** Your help is critical in building out a network of patriots and freedom fighters throughout our nation's state capitols and in your home state. There are two ways you can help: **1.[Subscribe](http://links.statefreedomcaucus.co/u/click?_t=1b6c04157c924c98ad4a6127d8bd1e6c&_m=b896d6a2c1a1445eb9fcb2a87e7ce4b3&_e=4x6GWYKEFprSYNxGgm-hWaTuxjSE4E1QE7ksx2yhXXOFWmWQ-rsXjF_5OV3a_fYUhVSS1tJraRdWP6tY4r-CgGTLrcDeEAcJ-yN1zQzck9yozyB4YgsArujqdPXhSaJiGVSGcDY1ANfQMSIhGww4hY2vinYIcpXbCdqoHuPrHze3i_ZCishT7-9jcknJHe7pdYbzaljHyPwJAX8pbsBC7w%3D%3D) to our free newsletter.** **2.[Make a contribution](http://links.statefreedomcaucus.co/u/click?_t=1b6c04157c924c98ad4a6127d8bd1e6c&_m=b896d6a2c1a1445eb9fcb2a87e7ce4b3&_e=4x6GWYKEFprSYNxGgm-hWfExP4ycQPBdFjD5L-85riESE-cvHjX8PzIraWCkdTRdzU8MuqoPMzXYBcc8LsL-fw8SQs8I-Uv8vGlK0jtLJlI3XT4IjltzDnHong1eE3bmQ2bm9Vsy_MTFoLf9F_mtjVfKXQqbtVoErQkNuDha-vguEQnQYxaewzfDCU3B_Ujr5KmyeHeYIwn_Oe8jox9rz0N4PfOEf7xTNiu84xw2gtRuUj3KbRDLKqY2e3f7e4V77A1LoxqGDoeM5JVJwjuXIA%3D%3D) to help us advance the cause of liberty.** Thank you for considering this urgent request and for doing so much to help fight for freedom across the nation. **Keep fighting,**

**Andy Roth**
_President
State Freedom Caucus Network_ [DONATE](http://links.statefreedomcaucus.co/u/click?_t=1b6c04157c924c98ad4a6127d8bd1e6c&_m=b896d6a2c1a1445eb9fcb2a87e7ce4b3&_e=4x6GWYKEFprSYNxGgm-hWfExP4ycQPBdFjD5L-85riESE-cvHjX8PzIraWCkdTRdzU8MuqoPMzXYBcc8LsL-fw8SQs8I-Uv8vGlK0jtLJlLTCkksBAgqBh9n4NdpP_9Fp5COPwN4PFtp1z_qZscnXzkHEaLpRUH5RCBpIGvBeOyv0GHSEVTb-VFFJODqw6PDDRhvhKk1rnoiEGedmatoUH--rANz-P4ljS1a9ndYVn_9o504KRudms08yk124TfV0RHSF4NFfmtKrXifaMm12Q%3D%3D) P.S. Your help is critical in building out a network of patriots and freedom fighters throughout our nation's state capitols and in your home state. Please consider a [contribution](http://links.statefreedomcaucus.co/u/click?_t=1b6c04157c924c98ad4a6127d8bd1e6c&_m=b896d6a2c1a1445eb9fcb2a87e7ce4b3&_e=4x6GWYKEFprSYNxGgm-hWfExP4ycQPBdFjD5L-85riESE-cvHjX8PzIraWCkdTRdzU8MuqoPMzXYBcc8LsL-fw8SQs8I-Uv8vGlK0jtLJlKVxo31_KYAW2Pln7olp3mGxoC6gpz3vPDozMy2NyL3x5zXKe6Y_40Igvy3nZeST5JoZfvRsM2ncdI93G-S5A5pREDico2B9p5Y-lisnLSwTkQSPPXwCcb8YWcg4Lx3i7poJU3E6PuZeIKxgcU3y3k-a5Aq7bHg3XtSjXcCEyXIcQ%3D%3D) and join us as we work to advance the cause of liberty.

It wasn't long after that Freedom Caucuses don't just make a difference at the state level. When they raise their voices in opposition to the horrible policies of the Biden Admin, they get results for you at the federal level too. Arizona: It's no surprise, but Democrats are furious at the Arizona Freedom Caucus. The AZFC negotiated a budget with Democrat Governor Katie Hobbs that protected the state's school choice program. Most Democrat lawmakers opposed the bill because they are owned by the teachers' union. The budget, sponsored by AZFC Chairman Jake Hoffman, also delivered some serious tax relief - to the tune of $260 million. The state's most toxic leftist columnist said Hobbs "got rolled" by the AZ Freedom Caucus. The AZ Freedom Caucus also led the way on House passage of HB 2545. The bill would prevent the state from enforcing any rules created by international public health entities like the progressive World Health Organization. The AZFC helped write the bill, pushed it to the House floor, and got it over the finish line. This is one example of our state freedom caucuses echoing support for the House Freedom Caucus in Washington. HFC member Rep. Andy Biggs of Arizona is the lead sponsor of HR 79, a bill that would require the United States to immediately withdraw from the WHO. The Network also is helping other state freedom caucuses pass similar legislation. South Carolina: The Palmetto State wrapped up its legislative session last week. You may recall that the year began with the RINO leadership in the House kicking the SC Freedom Caucus out of the GOP caucus for refusing to sign their loyalty pledge to never criticize a fellow Republican. Liberal Republicans were constantly undermining the good work of the SC Freedom Caucus throughout the session. But the good news is that the conservative grassroots is livid with the RINOs. The York County GOP became the sixth county Republican Party in SC to officially censure the House GOP leadership. This follows similar moves by Lexington, Anderson, Newberry, Pickens, and Greenville. Together, these counties represent over 1.4 million people. That's almost 30 percent of South Carolina's popular. And it represents a huge portion of the state's Republican base. Pennsylvania: The PA Freedom Caucus is taking on two particularly egregious left-wing agendas in the Keystone State. Rather than address skyrocketing crime, Democrats in the legislature are attempting to repeal the state's "Stand Your Ground" law, that allows you to legally defend yourself from being attacked. In addition, every PAFC member voted against funding Penn State University due to their hospital's policy of providing sex changes to children. More on that to come this week. Louisiana: The Bayou State's legislature just began its session and things are already heating up. In our , we talked about the madness that occurred at the Capitol after the LA Freedom Caucus led the charge to stop the grooming of children in schools and ban sex changes for minors. A lot of have already occurred, such as bills passed banning covid vaccine mandates forever, bumping up the penalties for fentanyl dealers, and requiring financial literacy courses in schools. More will be coming down the pipeline very soon so stay tuned. Idaho: Since the Idaho legislature is out of session, two of our IDFC members to the southern border to witness the crisis unfold firsthand following the end of Title 42. JOIN THE FIGHT Your help is critical in building out a network of patriots and freedom fighters throughout our nation's state capitols and in your home state. There are two ways you can help: 1. to our free newsletter. 2. to help us advance the cause of liberty. Thank you for considering this urgent request and for doing so much to help fight for freedom across the nation. Keep fighting, Andy Roth President State Freedom Caucus Network P.S. Your help is critical in building out a network of patriots and freedom fighters throughout our nation's state capitols and in your home state. Please consider a and join us as we work to advance the cause of liberty. | Building on the model of the House Freedom Caucus, the State Freedom Caucus Network helps establish State Freedom Caucuses and provide the high-level staff, strategy, and community conservatives need to succeed across the country. | State Freedom Caucus Network 300 Independence Ave SE Washington, DC 20003-1021

name: =?utf-8?Q?Zak=20Malamed?=
subject: Did you already know this?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Zak for Congress
body:
#
Hi friend, my name is Zak Malamed. 👋
[](https://zakforcongress.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=30c2554cf0cbb2d4d7d50d7c7&id=90c62b80ec&e=15d98230e6)
I’m the Democrat who just filed to run against George Santos.
[](https://zakforcongress.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=30c2554cf0cbb2d4d7d50d7c7&id=a0188129ce&e=15d98230e6)
I don’t need to rehash all the lies he’s told. You already know.
[](https://zakforcongress.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=30c2554cf0cbb2d4d7d50d7c7&id=fb637e984f&e=15d98230e6)
But did you also know that Santos represents a critical swing district that could determine which party controls the House majority? **Before it turned red last cycle, New York’s 3rd District voted for Joe Biden in 2020.**
[](https://zakforcongress.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=30c2554cf0cbb2d4d7d50d7c7&id=d32ec44024&e=15d98230e6)
Heck, in the 60+ years my family has lived in Great Neck, the only other time we elected a Republican to Congress was in 1980 during the Reagan Revolution. We cannot let the MAGA madness win.
I grew up in this district on Tain Drive. Attended public schools, celebrated my b’nei mitzvot, and got my first internship here. Say hi to my parents! 👇
[](https://zakforcongress.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=30c2554cf0cbb2d4d7d50d7c7&id=4e683edae9&e=15d98230e6)
I spent the last four years leading a major advocacy organization and campaigning against MAGA Republicans in the most competitive districts across the country.
Now, the MAGA madness is on my doorstep. So I’m stepping up to run for Congress, because my neighbors deserve serious, honest leadership in the U.S. House. **But I can’t do it alone — we need you on the team if we’re going to win!**
[**Will you be one of our first Founding Donors to unseat George Santos? Make a donation today so we can launch with momentum.**](https://zakforcongress.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=30c2554cf0cbb2d4d7d50d7c7&id=1bcbdf049c&e=15d98230e6) **[Become a Founding Donor››](https://zakforcongress.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=30c2554cf0cbb2d4d7d50d7c7&id=03ec9f8b4d&e=15d98230e6)**
---
**This isn’t just a vanity race against a serial liar.** It’s one of the best opportunities in the country to flip a red district so we can retake the House majority. And it’s a critical bellwether in the fight against MAGA extremism. The pundits, press, and politicians are watching NY-03 closely.
I hope you’ll choose to invest in our campaign today. This is not like all of the other political emails you get. [**We are actually $25,000 from a major milestone that will prove the viability of this campaign. Can you help us meet it?**](https://zakforcongress.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=30c2554cf0cbb2d4d7d50d7c7&id=9955ed4889&e=15d98230e6)
With gratitude,
**Zak Malamed
** Candidate for NY-03
[](https://zakforcongress.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=30c2554cf0cbb2d4d7d50d7c7&id=a466c1ca59&e=15d98230e6)
**[Donate](https://zakforcongress.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=30c2554cf0cbb2d4d7d50d7c7&id=505736497e&e=15d98230e6)**
---
Paid for by Zak for Congress
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://zakforcongress.us21.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=30c2554cf0cbb2d4d7d50d7c7&id=9bec16b14b&e=15d98230e6&c=ccd377bbde). Mail us: Zak for Congress, PO Box 220421, Great Neck, NY 11022.

We know the truth – **_Donald Trump lost Georgia. He lost the popular vote. AND he lost the White House._**

In 2020, America refused to support Trump’s fascism. Now he’s back, and we need to put an end to Trump once and for all.

clean_body: He said Raffensperger “OWED” him votes | | | Donald Trump is STILL falsely claiming he won Georgia in 2020 – in fact, he claims that Georgia’s Secretary of State, Brad Raffensperger, “owed” him votes! That’s right – at the CNN town hall where Trump was able to broadcast his lies to tens of millions of Americans, he continued his big lie and claimed he won Georgia. We know the truth – Donald Trump lost Georgia. He lost the popular vote. AND he lost the White House. In 2020, America refused to support Trump’s fascism. Now he’s back, and we need to put an end to Trump once and for all. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: **= = = = = =** Trump can lie all he wants, but the truth is, he lost Georgia in 2020. name: Team AOC
subject: What’s going on with immigration?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
We’re here to explain.
| Explained: Immigration, Title 42, & AOC
---|---
You may have heard a lot of talk about immigration recently. **So what's going on?**
**Title 42 expired last week.** Title 42 was a law used by the Trump administration to quickly expel immigrants, under the pretense of the COVID-19 pandemic. With Title 42 gone, immigration is likely to increase.
To address the expected influx at the border, President Biden announced new immigration policies, including a transit ban that would ban migrants for 5 years if they don’t first seek refugee status in the country they are traveling through on their way to the U.S. **Several of these policies are based on the belief that if you make it deeply difficult for migrants to come here, then they’ll stop.**
**Respectfully, we disagree.** From a policy perspective, there’s not a lot of evidence a deterrence-only strategy works (under Title 42 immigration actually _increased_). Plus, our country needs to add to our workforce to meet the labor demand. We need immigration.
### **Do you like receiving these policy explainers?**
**[YES](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20230516.dr-CN-&refcode=em20230516-4330-P_OTH_EXP_IMM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=4330%2E2526796%2ENKYkL0)**
**[NO](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/18572?refcode=em20230516-4330-P_OTH_EXP_IMM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=4330%2E2526796%2ENKYkL0)**
**Alexandria is advocating for a different way.** Last week, Alexandria led a letter to President Biden asking him to shorten the waiting period for asylum seekers to obtain work authorization permits.1
Asylum seekers who have already arrived in the U.S. must currently wait at least 6 months to work legally — **with many waiting up to a full year.** This doesn’t make any sense. These migrants want to work, our country needs their labor, and, when recently arrived migrants can’t work, it overburdens nonprofits and local governments.
This type of compassionate immigration reform isn’t a niche idea — work authorization reform has support across the ideological spectrum of the Democratic Party, including Senate Majority Leader Chuck Schumer and Democratic Leader Hakeem Jeffries.
**We at Team AOC believe seeking asylum is a human right.** A compassionate immigration system is necessary to make our country strong. We will keep you updated on how this story progresses, and how Alexandria and Democrats are responding.
In solidarity,
Team AOC
Alexandria and Team AOC are committed to making important, complex policy issues accessible to everyone.
**[To support our work, chip in here →](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20230516.dr-CN-&refcode=em20230516-4330-P_OTH_EXP_IMM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=4330%2E2526796%2ENKYkL0)**
1 - [**Axios:** New York Dems push Biden to loosen job rules for asylum seekers](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/18589?t=4&akid=4330%2E2526796%2ENKYkL0)

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20230516?refcode=em20230516-4330-P_OTH_EXP_IMM&t=5&refcode2=4330_2526796_NKYkL0&akid=4330%2E2526796%2ENKYkL0)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20230516-4330-P_OTH_EXP_IMM&t=6&akid=4330%2E2526796%2ENKYkL0)**

name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: Our four-day workweek
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter, we have
something important to share with you.

As we fight to recruit and elect progressives to Congress, our team made
the decision that to combat burnout [ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/134475?t=1001&akid=28983%2E1203867%2EiIf5G2 ]we would adopt a four-day work
week:

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/134465?refcode=em20230516-28983&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&akid=28983%2E1203867%2EiIf5G2 ]The Guardian: Progressive organization Justice Democrats adopts
four-day work week
We’re truly living up to the values we’re fighting for. It’s better work.
It’s healthier workers. And we’re not alone, in February Senator Bernie
Sanders called for a four-day, 32-hour workweek as well.

We believe that every worker deserves a four-day workweek. Because while
work is important, there is more to life than grueling workweeks that
seemingly never end. We’re fighting for every worker to have a
sustainable, four-day workweek with a living wage.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/134465?refcode=em20230516-28983&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1003&akid=28983%2E1203867%2EiIf5G2 ]If you believe in the future of a four-day workweek, will you
contribute $3 right now to help us elect progressives who
will make it a reality?

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/134465?refcode=em20230516-28983&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1022&akid=28983%2E1203867%2EiIf5G2 ]Contribute $3

We're fighting for a world where everyone can enjoy a three-day weekend
without having to worry about their next paycheck. Thank you for being a
part of that fight.

In solidarity,

Justice Democrats

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=1023&akid=28983%2E1203867%2EiIf5G2 ]here. We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong.

Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=1024&akid=28983%2E1203867%2EiIf5G2 ]Centers for Disease Control and your state public health department.

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20230516-28983-footer&t=1025&refcode2=28983_1203867_iIf5G2&akid=28983%2E1203867%2EiIf5G2

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1026&akid=28983%2E1203867%2EiIf5G2

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
JusticeDemocrats.com
10629 Hardin Valley Rd, #226
Knoxville, TN 37932
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

name: Abigail Spanberger
subject: I have a clear goal
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger for Congress
body:
Republicans at the state and federal levels have made it clear they’re out to roll back these freedoms no matter the consequences and regardless of how a majority of Americans feel.

| Peter,

A few days ago, my team wrote to highlight what’s at stake when it comes to the future of reproductive rights in Virginia and our country as a whole.

Republicans at the state and federal levels have made it clear they’re out to roll back these freedoms no matter the consequences and regardless of how a majority of Americans feel. And with _**millions of Virginian women of reproductive age**_ _**at risk**_ of losing the healthcare they’re entitled to, _**I’m stepping up.**_

I hope one day to codify _Roe v. Wade_ into law and protect reproductive rights at the federal level. To continue advocating for that goal, [_**I need your support to continue serving our community. Will you make a contribution to my campaign today?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63391989/406614407/1394223873?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20230516-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDM4NTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOTQyYjMwMWQtMzFmNC1lZDExLTkwN2MtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=PlVDorKHoKOk__QFUvpkfnRT1_y78LLRgOpWy1Zx7ls=)

Peter,

Ever since the Supreme Court overturned _Roe v. Wade_ , Republicans in states across the country and at the federal level have moved to _**restrict or completely eliminate reproductive rights.**_

It’s a dangerous pattern that has threatened the health of countless Americans, and if Republicans grow their majority in Congress in 2024, **_they will only become more aggressive in their restrictions._**

Abigail believes in a person’s fundamental right to choose, which is why she’s fearlessly working to codify _Roe v. Wade_ into law. _**Around 58% of American women aged 13-44 live in a state hostile or extremely hostile to abortion**_ – Abigail is doing all she can to prevent Virginia from joining that cohort. And with _**2 million women of reproductive age here in Virginia,**_ that work is all the more important.

She will always work to protect reproductive rights, but to continue that important work, [_**we need your support to re-elect her. Will you contribute to our campaign today?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63391992/406614410/1394223873?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20230516-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDM4NTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOTQyYjMwMWQtMzFmNC1lZDExLTkwN2MtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=PlVDorKHoKOk__QFUvpkfnRT1_y78LLRgOpWy1Zx7ls=)

clean_body: Republicans at the state and federal levels have made it clear they’re out to roll back these freedoms no matter the consequences and regardless of how a majority of Americans feel. | Peter, A few days ago, my team wrote to highlight what’s at stake when it comes to the future of reproductive rights in Virginia and our country as a whole. Republicans at the state and federal levels have made it clear they’re out to roll back these freedoms no matter the consequences and regardless of how a majority of Americans feel. And with millions of Virginian women of reproductive age at risk of losing the healthcare they’re entitled to, I’m stepping up. I hope one day to codify Roe v. Wade into law and protect reproductive rights at the federal level. To continue advocating for that goal, = | = Read more from my team here: = Peter, Ever since the Supreme Court overturned Roe v. Wade , Republicans in states across the country and at the federal level have moved to restrict or completely eliminate reproductive rights. It’s a dangerous pattern that has threatened the health of countless Americans, and if Republicans grow their majority in Congress in 2024, they will only become more aggressive in their restrictions. Abigail believes in a person’s fundamental right to choose, which is why she’s fearlessly working to codify Roe v. Wade into law. Around 58% of American women aged 13-44 live in a state hostile or extremely hostile to abortion – Abigail is doing all she can to prevent Virginia from joining that cohort. And with 2 million women of reproductive age here in Virginia, that work is all the more important. She will always work to protect reproductive rights, but to continue that important work, = | = Anti-choice firebrands like Ron DeSantis – who recently signed an appalling 6-week abortion ban in Florida – are making political moves in our own backyard, where our own Republican governor has pledged to restrict reproductive rights. Abigail is on the frontlines advocating for reproductive healthcare protections at the federal level. = | | | = | = | = | = | = Thank you for your support, Team Spanberger | | = Paid for by Spanberger for Congress Spanberger for Congress P.O. Box 3112 Fredericksburg, VA 22402 United States | | | ---|---|--- Abigail Spanberger is a proud Democrat, former CIA officer, and representative for Virginia's 7th Congressional District. She believes in leadership that flows from our shared American values of integrity, responsibility, and decency, and she wants to work to move this country forward together. **Peter, I’ve got a huge announcement that should bring a smile to your face and hope to your heart:** former federal prosecutor, Will Rollins just announced his campaign for Congress in California’s 41st district -- one of the most important races in the country in the effort by Democrats to retake the House.

Will stunned political experts in 2022 when he came so close to winning against right-wing Republican, Ken Calvert. It ended up being one of the closest races in the country. He outperformed every projection and was the only Democratic challenger in California to win the independent vote. That’s a big deal.

There is no question in my mind that in this upcoming election, with the Presidency on the ballot, the larger turnout will be the key to victory IF we have a strong campaign.

I have committed my energy, time, and money to this race, and today I am asking you to start Will off with a show of support that will send him a message that we are behind him 100 percent.

[_**I’ll share more about why I'm backing Will, but first, I have an important request: Could you split a $10 donation between Will’s campaign and Fight for Progress to help him launch with strength? clean_body: Taking back Congress could come down to holding my seat. = Friend, my campaign for reelection is already heating up to be one of the most competitive House races in the nation. Both the Republican and Democratic Congressional Committees have designated my district a top target, with Democratic leadership declaring it a must-win election for us to retake the House. I don’t take those stakes lightly, and neither do my allies at the Illinois Democratic County Chairs’ Association (IDCCA).= = I’m no stranger to a tough fight. GOP mega-donors and their Super PACs spent millions against me in 2022. I still came out on top. Without the IDCCA and grassroots support from individual donors like you, though, things might have turned out very differently. If we’re going to win again, we’ll need that same level of support from start to finish — because the GOP are wasting no time trying to flip my seat red. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately and will be automatically split between Eric Sorensen and the IDCCA. = = = = = = Thanks, Congressman Eric Sorensen (IL 17th) | | | | GET TEXT UPDATES FROM THE IDCCA! | | | | | | = = | | | | Contributions or gifts to the Illinois Democratic County Chairs' Association are not tax deductible.
