name: =?utf-8?Q?Larry=20Elder?=
subject: Why I’m Running For President
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ELDER FOR PRESIDENT 24
body:
Steve Hilton recently asked me on Fox News what’s gone wrong under the Biden administration. My response: “What’s gone right?” | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/elderforpresident.com/230516-why-im-running-f2302c?e=0be619cbaa)
---
| | | [ ](https://larryelder.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6a42253df6197f177f9e13389&id=825feb904d&e=0be619cbaa)
---
|
# Why I'm Running
---
| Peter , I am living proof that the American Dream is alive and well. I grew up in lower middle-class Los Angeles when racism was a pervasive reality, and segregation was still the law in many states.

Today, every American has the opportunity to realize their God-given potential. Despite this, many of our political leaders, including our current president, insist that racism, sexism, and bigotry hold millions of Americans back. This is nonsense and a lie used to divide and distract us from critical issues. Democrats love to stick their knife into the mustard jar of racism and spread it over everything.

Meanwhile, crime is ravaging our great cities, public schools are failing our children, illegal migration and lethal drugs are flooding across our porous borders, and food and gas prices are spiraling out of control.

Steve Hilton recently asked me on Fox News what’s gone wrong under the Biden administration. My response: “What’s gone right?” I’ve never seen a president do so much damage in so little time.

---
| [ ](https://larryelder.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6a42253df6197f177f9e13389&id=7031e1534e&e=0be619cbaa)
---
|
---
| | |
---
| **America is in decline, and we may soon be in collapse — but this is not inevitable. It is a choice made by detached and cynical politicians like Joe Biden and his pals in the Democratic Party.**

Our cities can be livable again, parents should have the freedom to choose the best schools for their children, and we must secure our southern border.

As a California resident, I've seen firsthand how decades of Democrat rule have turned the Golden State into an unaffordable dystopia for many. I won't let them do the same to America.

I believe that our best days can be ahead of us, and that we can enter a new American Golden Age, but we must choose leaders who want to bring us there. That’s why I’m running for president.

Please chip in today with a gift of $5 or more. We cannot afford to wait—not anymore.

**I’m Larry Elder, and we’ve got a country to save.**

---

subject: The FBI Had No Actual Evidence on Trump
body:
What You Need To Know Today! No images? [Click here](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-e-alrhdjy-trhiujldw-s/) [](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-alrhdjy-trhiujldw-r/)
## **Happy Tuesday!**
[](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-alrhdjy-trhiujldw-y/) **Grow your organization and keep the momentum going with our powerful platform.** [Schedule a CaucusRoom Live demo today!](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-alrhdjy-trhiujldw-j/) **FBI Had No Actual Evidence** The [**conclusion of the Durham report has finally been released** ](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-alrhdjy-trhiujldw-t/)and former President Trump has finally been vindicated! **Saves $109 Billion** The House GOP's Limit, Save, Grow Act to raise the debt ceiling contains within it a vitally important reform** -- [work requirements for able-bodied adults to qualify for Medicaid.](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-alrhdjy-trhiujldw-i/)** **It's Not Really Fair** Are you curious how **[much aid other countries have sent to Ukraine](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-alrhdjy-trhiujldw-d/)** compared to the United State's contribution?

**Slap in the Face** **[Homeless Veterans](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-alrhdjy-trhiujldw-h/)** and **[wedding guests](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-alrhdjy-trhiujldw-k/)** have been booted from hotels in upstate New York to make room for the growing influx of migrants. **It's a Simple Request** The Secret Service says they are **[not legally obligated to turn over emails that identify visitors](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-alrhdjy-trhiujldw-u/)** to Biden's homes in Delaware. **Off-White?** A new **[alternate term for 'WHITE' has dropped](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-alrhdjy-trhiujldw-o/)** , please adjust your language accordingly. **Let****'s [have a good laugh](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-alrhdjy-trhiujldw-x/)!**
* Which **[service](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-alrhdjy-trhiujldw-m/)**?
* High **[and low](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-alrhdjy-trhiujldw-c/)**.
* This is **[next](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-alrhdjy-trhiujldw-q/).**
* Stupid is as**[stupid does](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-alrhdjy-trhiujldw-a/).**

Friend, we've known from the start that George Santos was a fraud – **he lied about his education, his career, his background, and has still _refused_ to step down from Congress.**
Now, he's facing federal charges for deceiving donors, stealing from his own campaign and lying to Congress about being a millionaire, and cheating to collect unemployment benefits he didn't deserve.

**Even after it was announced that Santos is facing 13 federal charges, he continues to insist not only that he won't resign ... but that he wants to run for reelection in 2024!!!** There's no doubt about it: Santos is unfit to serve in Congress.
American Bridge is focused on holding Republicans accountable – which is why we filed an FEC complaint against Santos back in January.

name: Julia DeGraw
subject: No Free Pass for Ports!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Oregon League of Conservation Voters
body:
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/63396816/406619848/1024851383?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQ3ZTczMTg0LTM3ZjQtZWQxMS05MDdjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=U13Y7P6CTCF8a4jhWaWK-sxgyUxgaH4iz_2m-0X5KtE=&emci=2b78cf56-34f4-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=47e73184-37f4-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=2107230) | | | Hello Peter, Our innovative land-use laws have protected all the things we love about Oregon – our communities, wildlife, water, and economies across the state. The Major Threat Port Exemption bill (HB 3382 with the -3 and -4 amendments) would essentially override all protections, including our land-use laws, in and around three ports: Astoria, Coos Bay, and Newport. **Our lawmakers are meeting today for a possible vote on this bill in committee.** [**We need to urge our lawmakers to vote NO on HB 3382 and its amendments now.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/63396817/406619849/1024851383?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQ3ZTczMTg0LTM3ZjQtZWQxMS05MDdjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=U13Y7P6CTCF8a4jhWaWK-sxgyUxgaH4iz_2m-0X5KtE=&emci=2b78cf56-34f4-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=47e73184-37f4-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=2107230) If passed, three major Oregon ports would be subject to extensive dredging and other environmentally harmful activities without input from the communities nearby. The current -3 and -4 amendments as proposed set a dangerous precedent, allowing corporate interests to fast-track development and bypass land-use laws. This bill would render the efforts of local elected leaders, the voices of community members, and relevant protections such as Estuary Management Plans adopted by the local government nearly meaningless. For our communities in the South Coast, Coos Bay Estuary is the backbone of their economy, which has depended on industries like fishing and recreation for generations. Estuaries provide homes for a wide variety of fish and wildlife species, including our iconic salmon. They also play an important role in reducing climate change, acting as natural climate solutions and [sequestering carbon 10x more efficiently than forests](https://click.everyaction.com/k/63396818/406619850/-2094943770?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQ3ZTczMTg0LTM3ZjQtZWQxMS05MDdjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=U13Y7P6CTCF8a4jhWaWK-sxgyUxgaH4iz_2m-0X5KtE=&emci=2b78cf56-34f4-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=47e73184-37f4-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=2107230). **Instead of creating shortcuts for corporate profit, coastal communities are urging our lawmakers to do everything they can to sustain the regenerative local industries that allow the South Coast to thrive.** All of this would be threatened if major ports were exempt from our land-use laws and environmental protections. As we increasingly face the impacts of climate change, it is all hands on deck to uphold state and local environmental and land-use laws, balancing conservation with quality of life and economic growth. **The Port Exemption Bill (HB 3382) would fast-track port development for the sake of profit without protections for the essential cultural and ecological resources that are essential to Oregon’s coastal ecosystems and economies.** If developers want to expand our ports, they need to comply with our land-use laws. **[Add your voice to stop HB 3382 with its -3 and -4 amendments now.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/63396819/406619851/1024851383?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQ3ZTczMTg0LTM3ZjQtZWQxMS05MDdjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=U13Y7P6CTCF8a4jhWaWK-sxgyUxgaH4iz_2m-0X5KtE=&emci=2b78cf56-34f4-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=47e73184-37f4-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=2107230)** Thank you for taking action, Julia DeGraw
Coalition Director, OLCV | |
---|---|---

Bad news, team: Nate Silver’s FiveThirtyEight just reported that **Donald Trump’s approval rate is RISING -- fast!**

name: =?utf-8?Q?Marc=20Molinaro?=
subject: May Update from Rep. Marc Molinaro
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marc for US Inc
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/7a4c3226f558/molinaro-meets-with-schoharie-locals-on-inflation-law-enforcement-9328557?e=a39a20e5dd)
---
| |
---
|
---
| It's been a busy month in Congress as I continue to work on the issues that matter most to you. But before I highlight some of the recent work I've been doing, I wanted to talk about an inexcusable issue that is happening to our local veterans.

You may have seen it in the news - [Migrants from NYC are being bussed to Upstate NY and displacing homeless veterans](https://molinarofordutchess.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7a5de207e774ea8a3851d76c&id=e50224a459&e=a39a20e5dd). This is absolutely inexcusable and will not be tolerated. Rest assured that I have taken immediate action and will do everything I can in my power to right this wrong.

Follow me on [social media](https://molinarofordutchess.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7a5de207e774ea8a3851d76c&id=6f4352a9df&e=a39a20e5dd) to stay up to date on this important issue.
---
|
---
| |
---
**_FIGHTING FOR RESPONSIBLE GOVERNMENT_**

I voted to lift the debt ceiling and rein in inflation spending. The Senate has not.

The projected default date is June 1st. Senators shouldn't be going home while veteran benefits, Social Security and Medicare, and pay checks to the military hang in the balance. I'm fighting to make sure they don't.

\- ["Rep. Marc Molinaro (R-N.Y.) led... calling on Schumer to cancel the upcoming state work period in the Senate."](https://molinarofordutchess.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7a5de207e774ea8a3851d76c&id=b19c3f123d&e=a39a20e5dd)
\- ["House GOP pushes Senate to cancel recess over debt ceiling"](https://molinarofordutchess.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7a5de207e774ea8a3851d76c&id=3c87f796f4&e=a39a20e5dd)
---
|
---
| |
---
**_TACKLING THE FENTANYL & OPIOID CRISIS_**

Deadly drugs like fentanyl are pouring across our borders and into Upstate NY - fueling a local opioid epidemic. See what action I'm taking to stop it:

\- "[US Reps push for ways to combat flow of fentanyl](https://molinarofordutchess.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7a5de207e774ea8a3851d76c&id=2d1389f418&e=a39a20e5dd)"
---
|
---
| |
---
**_CHANGING HOW WE CARE FOR THOSE WITH MENTAL HEALTH & SUBSTANCE ABUSE DISORDERS_**

As County Executive, I developed the stabilization center model for NYS and now am working to deliver funding for one in Columbia County.

\- ["Wellness Hub would divert those in crisis from courts, motels and ER"](https://molinarofordutchess.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7a5de207e774ea8a3851d76c&id=eea57a740a&e=a39a20e5dd)
---
|
---
| |
---
**_PROTECTING OUR ENVIRONMENT_**

I led on this issue when I was in local government, and am proud to lead this bipartisan effort now in Congress. Protecting our environment, now and for future generations, has to be a priority.

\- ["Bipartisan NY-NJ Watershed Protection Act Back Before Congress"](https://molinarofordutchess.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7a5de207e774ea8a3851d76c&id=143918d00c&e=a39a20e5dd)
---
| **Will you help me keep fighting for Upstate NY?**
**Contribute today. Every dollar makes a difference.**
---
| | [DONATE TODAY](https://molinarofordutchess.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7a5de207e774ea8a3851d76c&id=b31fad9124&e=a39a20e5dd "DONATE TODAY")
---
| | | Paid for by Marc for US Inc.
---
| | | | | | [](https://molinarofordutchess.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7a5de207e774ea8a3851d76c&id=1bff3f538e&e=a39a20e5dd)
---
| | [](https://molinarofordutchess.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7a5de207e774ea8a3851d76c&id=c6b9c0c017&e=a39a20e5dd)
---
| | [](https://molinarofordutchess.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7a5de207e774ea8a3851d76c&id=97269926fd&e=a39a20e5dd)
---
|

You can [update your preferences](https://molinarofordutchess.us5.list-manage.com/profile?u=b7a5de207e774ea8a3851d76c&id=c09d4b0dd6&e=a39a20e5dd&c=28f51ef686) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://molinarofordutchess.us5.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=b7a5de207e774ea8a3851d76c&id=c09d4b0dd6&e=a39a20e5dd&c=28f51ef686).

name: Alan Keck
subject: Today’s the day!
body:
...the polls are open and we are making Kentucky win again!
[](https://keckforkentucky.cmail20.com/t/y-l-pjhykx-dytiuyidkd-r/) [🗳️ FIND YOUR POLLING LOCATION HERE](https://keckforkentucky.cmail20.com/t/y-l-pjhykx-dytiuyidkd-j/) _Today 's the day friend! The polls are open and we are making Kentucky win again!_ _**I just cast my ballot in my hometown of Somerset and I wanted to reach out to see if you 're planning on voting too!**_ [](https://keckforkentucky.cmail20.com/t/y-l-pjhykx-dytiuyidkd-t/) _If you 're ready to vote, but don't know where to go, we've got you covered!_ [__**Find your polling location here, and be sure to get in line by 6pm Eastern, 6pm Central to cast your ballot!**__](https://keckforkentucky.cmail20.com/t/y-l-pjhykx-dytiuyidkd-i/) [🗳️ FIND YOUR POLLING LOCATION HERE](https://keckforkentucky.cmail20.com/t/y-l-pjhykx-dytiuyidkd-d/) Today's the dawn of a new day in the Commonwealth-a new chapter in a story that'll see us leave Kentucky better than we found it. _But it 'll take all of us-**with not one person ready for change sitting this out** -to make that new day, that new chapter a reality._ [__**So, find your polling location here, and be sure to get in line by 6pm Eastern, 6pm Central to cast your ballot for a Kentucky that wins!**__](https://keckforkentucky.cmail20.com/t/y-l-pjhykx-dytiuyidkd-h/) God Bless. Alan Keck ### | [Unsubscribe](https://keckforkentucky.cmail20.com/t/y-u-pjhykx-dytiuyidkd-k/)

subject: BREAKING: I just forced a House floor vote on the expulsion of George Santos
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Robert Garcia for Congress
body:
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63397414/406621963/938567526?refcode=header&noskip=true&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0Y2ZkMzY1My0zY2Y0LWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tVj1aaj6qhG-3HblZ71Z8Xpiukq7RAvwsU7rAEVAruQ=)
Friends -
I just forced a House floor vote on the expulsion of George Santos from Congress.
It’s time for Kevin McCarthy to act. House Republicans now have 48 hours to schedule a vote. I’m forcing them to go on the record about whether they support this admitted liar and fraud, or whether they will choose accountability.
From where I stand, the choice is simple. We must come together as Congress to expel George Santos. He is a fraud, a liar, and deceived his voters. It’s time for him to go.
[**If you agree that people deserve better, join me to call on my House colleagues to vote to expel George Santos now. We need two-thirds of the House to vote with us to expel him.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63397415/406621964/726103505?refcode2=4cfd3653-3cf4-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&refcode=em230516-1-t1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0Y2ZkMzY1My0zY2Y0LWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tVj1aaj6qhG-3HblZ71Z8Xpiukq7RAvwsU7rAEVAruQ=&emci=dc8439cd-3bf4-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=4cfd3653-3cf4-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=16877361)
News that federal prosecutors are filing 13 criminal charges against George Santos should have been the final straw for Kevin McCarthy to realize the danger Santos poses to our democracy, but he refuses to act.
Now, Republicans have a chance to demonstrate to Americans that nobody is above the law and you cannot lie your way into Congress.
[**Join me in calling on my House colleagues to vote to expel George Santos.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63397416/406621965/726103505?refcode2=4cfd3653-3cf4-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&refcode=em230516-1-t1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0Y2ZkMzY1My0zY2Y0LWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tVj1aaj6qhG-3HblZ71Z8Xpiukq7RAvwsU7rAEVAruQ=&emci=dc8439cd-3bf4-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=4cfd3653-3cf4-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=16877361)
This will be a true test of whether House Republicans will put party politics over people.
Robert Garcia

clean_body: = Friends - I just forced a House floor vote on the expulsion of George Santos from Congress. It’s time for Kevin McCarthy to act. House Republicans now have 48 hours to schedule a vote. I’m forcing them to go on the record about whether they support this admitted liar and fraud, or whether they will choose accountability. From where I stand, the choice is simple. We must come together as Congress to expel George Santos. He is a fraud, a liar, and deceived his voters. It’s time for him to go. News that federal prosecutors are filing 13 criminal charges against George Santos should have been the final straw for Kevin McCarthy to realize the danger Santos poses to our democracy, but he refuses to act. Now, Republicans have a chance to demonstrate to Americans that nobody is above the law and you cannot lie your way into Congress. This will be a true test of whether House Republicans will put party politics over people. Robert Garcia * Paid for by Robert Garcia for Congress Robert Garcia for Congress 65 Pine Ave #348 Long Beach, CA 90802 United States This email was sent to . [**May 16, 1860:** The Republican National Convention met over the course of three days to nominate candidates for President and Vice President. The relatively new political party nominated Abraham Lincoln and Hannibal Hamlin, who went on to win their election. President Lincoln became the first Republican President, and he appointed all of his Republican opponents to positions in his cabinet.](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=f78c8f18f76a45ac82f81f9ab76bbcb5&_e=eTb8IY2tGMYzVBDCnfLjIp5K8B5RGCcOteKDJ7oIfOyFGADsU7XHrXyxmK5Q3I_eAUtQHxhHptD0ESC_00qjcIK5yC3_0Lkeai9aG1DkFZweNJklJwz9M8ZRYmWzwYp6rY4_Kyvr17vcitQo18c5Rig43pBUWmVN1q6SCCDHTFm28IWiYwjlE-v4NDMKaZyDg7uJCTsjzxiDyP0_TOQL1wRxPhoi0TtuDV3JM8F1VnIHMs38vq4RGjgHrId0pZjmK2_L_mhOibw9tYFzmnE9JCXIgBHrW5T9W8oovsAWaLOqGmu9Dekr4VrL55aRraajpPICP6DdMxK-eoqtaxhkbNkND_XHvu24f7sEfotdaCU%3D) **Source -[wikipedia.org](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=f78c8f18f76a45ac82f81f9ab76bbcb5&_e=eTb8IY2tGMYzVBDCnfLjIp5K8B5RGCcOteKDJ7oIfOyFGADsU7XHrXyxmK5Q3I_eAUtQHxhHptD0ESC_00qjcIK5yC3_0Lkeai9aG1DkFZweNJklJwz9M8ZRYmWzwYp6rY4_Kyvr17vcitQo18c5Rig43pBUWmVN1q6SCCDHTFm28IWiYwjlE-v4NDMKaZyDGvS0OBYue_gcICx1ZLijCT0axFzGCYLLd_DDuOO_w4aHviayqfcn-DU7G4_SUXXPQgIymA6fmQca1AyW_57dFy6W1uglfFaEx6oRql8gF0IRf3ywkCR7aE7pzFMF8toW92KaNfnjmoCmjacBMHVg-VQXggqA6tyb3NxWj80QsOc%3D)[](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=f78c8f18f76a45ac82f81f9ab76bbcb5&_e=eTb8IY2tGMYzVBDCnfLjIqIBG_MdHkbj1q0Uv8rVpjVjp3dqJtqpcccPMxN7NUi3M1TgRlc6CCgga-va_RWXWUuIPuWbweCo4Bgp02PPGLJ8qphApx4P-7S85tLAWfuDGber2vn8EyXb4qP_xKZ4VNvpxupMyALVNyhBGXxuUEWFpGXy8Fr4C4CStTuq6SSqRyjeWYxMWW016BzXTCfJEQYZVe1Do6kzWicqbKTlh-TTnrmUOwLEJsBrT0GMbaF-)**

[**May 16, 1918:** Congress enacted the Sedition Act of 1918 following the Espionage Act to prevent government and military criticism during wartime. The act made it an imprisonable offense to use disloyal, profane, scurrilous, or abusive language about the American government, Armed Forces, or flag. It was repealed in 1920.](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=f78c8f18f76a45ac82f81f9ab76bbcb5&_e=eTb8IY2tGMYzVBDCnfLjIp5K8B5RGCcOteKDJ7oIfOytqAaJth7pimHWe7OYrYKRZjrqbObjrCei6hyG8WIp-QERvfwR8e60f-8oKVQeC7P4zXcTiYhB0rVOB1705rVRQGPxq7qfAihw-UJpsPzF9Ta2dYrYmCyxNYCM1XFiOxRQ4mKfDKNCuegbK5rYOzHj2BJnLuJJls4ypOotqWqO13f96v_y8N0wlgsNwPfFsPvb1bKisg_NWak4kptKIa5137rO-1ow6jm_cTs7V87tiUntUo4unJuE8Wr3wPv8fXkwGGsDmj08tED8BqASzTPVm8rEfzvUZCXJPDqrzSdUNA%3D%3D) **Source -[wikipedia.org](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=f78c8f18f76a45ac82f81f9ab76bbcb5&_e=eTb8IY2tGMYzVBDCnfLjIp5K8B5RGCcOteKDJ7oIfOytqAaJth7pimHWe7OYrYKRZjrqbObjrCei6hyG8WIp-QERvfwR8e60f-8oKVQeC7P4zXcTiYhB0rVOB1705rVRQGPxq7qfAihw-UJpsPzF9Ta2dYrYmCyxNYCM1XFiOxRQ4mKfDKNCuegbK5rYOzHjOLUpTmEJ_-SHFeVoOluA8lsxCy-z6hUf5TKZkrSMYFNS2j65BI2SIhONZYr-7ElRr0VFLo4e37RYVzhuqCl_IUmw-EnPyKvXMWbNV6NM7E0jS04vYVRz6ax9uXL-JS_mBs1-EUitchlHBn77VzqvxQ%3D%3D)**

[**May 16, 1986:** Iconic Hollywood classic ‘Top Gun’ premiered across the United States, where it instantly captured American audiences’ attention. The film was an immediate success, becoming the top-earning movie of 1986. It continued with a successful IMAX release in 2013 and its re-release in 2021 in anticipation of Top Gun: Maverick.](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=f78c8f18f76a45ac82f81f9ab76bbcb5&_e=eTb8IY2tGMYzVBDCnfLjIp5K8B5RGCcOteKDJ7oIfOydYRknHXVRkwwdnm7ok0_kKlptr9ylaoHRKvicIjMu153mIPwXDzjMDE1-jkrfKvYSq2HyEitARAaiITjMD8Dll8_bLPogH__8vR1-3QA0uCdo9bBzQujNV2IF6mPcjFU_JPUwhS74TVxy2isLmrGnqdMZZ5HBphM1c73Iw0cCh8lBaQ2J8JT4wHMJGy-8BrU%3D) **Source -[wikipedia.org](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=f78c8f18f76a45ac82f81f9ab76bbcb5&_e=eTb8IY2tGMYzVBDCnfLjIp5K8B5RGCcOteKDJ7oIfOydYRknHXVRkwwdnm7ok0_k4EG3AWD2rFhtTAn2znVVVQS6Qy5qi6V-msYgbEppxVXfsinkBXFHJZmKs0kX72Ayyfg5LRHpb0PAEn2ApJV5NBVDBUnKxCu3JYyUyBgCpQtVRXAlodmzWy2IidUqUBU26PrVsvI-_O5xY1L2YjFBGynvWla1cOIhWLv5RLuQLRg%3D)**

name: Team Casey
subject: Three things you need to know
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC
body:
We won’t be able to defeat the GOP without serious grassroots support.
# [](https://go.bobcasey.com/go/144?t=1&akid=55%2E552475%2E2SRnst)
Peter, here are three things you need to know about our race.
1. **Pennsylvania is one of the most competitive battlegrounds in the nation.** In 2020, President Biden won PA by only 80,555 votes and in 2016 Clinton lost by only 44,292 votes.

2. **CNN put PA on the list of “Most Likely to Flip in 2024” Senate seats.

**
3. With over $381 million dollars spent in the 2022 U.S. Senate race in PA, **we won’t be able to defeat the GOP without serious grassroots support.**

Knowing these facts, what do you say, Peter? **[Will you chip in toward our goal of raising $5,000 in grassroots donations today so we’ll have the resources to re-elect Bob Casey, hold this seat, and keep the Senate blue?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20230516-1?refcode=em20230516-1&refcode2=55_552475_2SRnst&akid=55%2E552475%2E2SRnst)**
**[Donate Now ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20230516-1?amount=5&refcode=em20230516-1&refcode2=55_552475_2SRnst&akid=55%2E552475%2E2SRnst)**
Early investments in critical Senate races like ours will make all the difference. That’s why we’re so grateful to everyone who is able to chip in to this email.
More soon,
Team Casey

name: Eric Sorensen
subject: Do you have a moment?
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63398345/406625566/-665437442?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZmNhZmEyYy00M2Y0LWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RBM9RBRMbL-ckD-TP12Ma2iNdQi147mzQZENHPg2mvE=)
Peter, I’ll try to make this quick:

I’m reaching out because we’re officially halfway through our second fundraising quarter of 2023, but we’re not quite halfway to our fundraising goal. This isn’t one of those desperate email pleas, but we are pacing a bit behind and could use some help catching up.

**[Will you chip in a contribution today to help us pick up the pace? Any amount helps, but $3 from you would go a long way in helping close this gap.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63398346/406625567/-665437442?refcode=em-5.16.23-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZmNhZmEyYy00M2Y0LWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RBM9RBRMbL-ckD-TP12Ma2iNdQi147mzQZENHPg2mvE=)**
| [Donate $3](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63398347/406625568/-665437442?refcode=em-5.16.23-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZmNhZmEyYy00M2Y0LWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RBM9RBRMbL-ckD-TP12Ma2iNdQi147mzQZENHPg2mvE=)
---

There are a couple important reasons why we can’t lose momentum now.

For starters, a new Republican opponent just announced their campaign against me. We haven’t heard much yet, but we do know they attended a big GOP fundraiser dinner in our district alongside Florida Governor Ron DeSantis.

We’re also facing a barrage of new digital attacks from National Republicans. They’re explicitly targeting Democrats they consider to be the most “at-risk” in 2024.

We can’t let these early attacks go unanswered, Peter, and the reality is that it costs money to get our message out. That’s why we’re determined to meet all of our quarterly fundraising goals, and we can’t accept any less in a district as competitive as IL-17.

**[So, will you help us stand strong by contributing whatever you can today? clean_body: | = Peter, I’ll try to make this quick: I’m reaching out because we’re officially halfway through our second fundraising quarter of 2023, but we’re not quite halfway to our fundraising goal. This isn’t one of those desperate email pleas, but we are pacing a bit behind and could use some help catching up. = | = There are a couple important reasons why we can’t lose momentum now. For starters, a new Republican opponent just announced their campaign against me. We haven’t heard much yet, but we do know they attended a big GOP fundraiser dinner in our district alongside Florida Governor Ron DeSantis. We’re also facing a barrage of new digital attacks from National Republicans. They’re explicitly targeting Democrats they consider to be the most “at-risk” in 2024. We can’t let these early attacks go unanswered, Peter, and the reality is that it costs money to get our message out. That’s why we’re determined to meet all of our quarterly fundraising goals, and we can’t accept any less in a district as competitive as IL-17. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Thanks again for having my back. disclaimer_text: Paid for by Martin Heinrich for Senate

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63398410/406625890/-272948131?refcode=AU_MTH_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20230516_PM1_V2_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYTk2YmIyOS00NGY0LWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kRGesZyft7ZjTdCRSF7Ml_TiGOkGW4SNwYyN3AnU9Vk=&emci=abbeaf09-3cf4-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=da96bb29-44f4-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=252045)

In one of the richest countries in the world, our children should never go hungry. That’s why I just joined my Senate colleagues in introducing the _Universal School Meals Program Act_ — which would give free meals to all students, regardless of income. New Mexico's universal school meals program became law earlier this year, and I am committed to making it a reality nationwide with the _Universal School Meals Program Act_. **[Will you show your support by becoming a citizen co-sponsor of the _Universal School Meals Program Act_? Add your name below:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63398411/406625891/926475022?refcode=AU_MTH_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20230516_PM1_V2_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYTk2YmIyOS00NGY0LWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kRGesZyft7ZjTdCRSF7Ml_TiGOkGW4SNwYyN3AnU9Vk=&emci=abbeaf09-3cf4-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=da96bb29-44f4-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=252045)** | [BECOME A CITIZEN CO-SPONSOR](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63398412/406625892/926475022?refcode=AU_MTH_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20230516_PM1_V2_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYTk2YmIyOS00NGY0LWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kRGesZyft7ZjTdCRSF7Ml_TiGOkGW4SNwYyN3AnU9Vk=&emci=abbeaf09-3cf4-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=da96bb29-44f4-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=252045)
---
Hunger can make it difficult for students to do what they go to school for: learn. So it’s no surprise that research shows that kids who have more access to food can see improved academic performance.
I’m proud that New Mexico was the fifth state to approve a universal school meals program. This program will soon change the lives of hundreds of thousands of kids and their families. But we need to take the next step and act to give every child free meals no matter where they live.
**[We need to ensure that no child goes hungry and all children are set up for success. If you agree, please sign on as a citizen co-sponsor of the _Universal School Meals Program Act_ :](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63398413/406625893/926475022?refcode=AU_MTH_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20230516_PM1_V2_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYTk2YmIyOS00NGY0LWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kRGesZyft7ZjTdCRSF7Ml_TiGOkGW4SNwYyN3AnU9Vk=&emci=abbeaf09-3cf4-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=da96bb29-44f4-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=252045)**

name: Sherrod Brown
subject: We must hold bank executives accountable
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF SHERROD BROWN
body:
| | |
---
Friend – this morning, I questioned the former executives of Silicon Valley Bank and Signature Bank during a Senate hearing.

Executives got rich off of mismanaging these banks. It's time the American people get some answers – and as chair of the Senate Banking, Housing, and Urban Affairs Committee, I'm committed to making sure this never happens again.
**Only in corporate boardrooms can you run your business into the ground, and somehow manage to come out ahead. We've seen this play out time and time again, and I'm sick and tired of it.**
Workers make one mistake – like overdrafting an account – and get dinged with fees and penalties. But when bank executives and giant Wall Street firms do something much worse – like run their bank into the ground and crash our economy – they're given a golden parachute.
**It's time these bank executives and big corporations face accountability. I'm leading the charge in the Senate, but if we're going to get this done, I need to know you're with me.**

**[Please, before midnight tonight, will you respond to my urgent live poll and let me know you're in this fight with me?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63398565/406626632/-1228844697?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&ask=5&amounts=250,100,50,25,5&code=jtk194-su-nd-v2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNTIyZWUwYy00NWY0LWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cDXHLUQCFClHXDdSrabfFnc6QEm-ug-rjw4GCDutPwQ=&emci=55d3a71d-fcf3-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=b522ee0c-45f4-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=18332626)**

clean_body: | | | Friend – this morning, I questioned the former executives of Silicon Valley Bank and Signature Bank during a Senate hearing. Executives got rich off of mismanaging these banks. It's time the American people get some answers – and as chair of the Senate Banking, Housing, and Urban Affairs Committee, I'm committed to making sure this never happens again. Only in corporate boardrooms can you run your business into the ground, and somehow manage to come out ahead. We've seen this play out time and time again, and I'm sick and tired of it. Workers make one mistake – like overdrafting an account – and get dinged with fees and penalties. But when bank executives and giant Wall Street firms do something much worse – like run their bank into the ground and crash our economy – they're given a golden parachute. It's time these bank executives and big corporations face accountability. I'm leading the charge in the Senate, but if we're going to get this done, I need to know you're with me. | | Should Congress hold corporate executives accountable? | | | | Live poll expires at 11:59 p.m. on May 17, 2023. Thanks for speaking out. Sherrod | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
